name: James O'Keefe
subject: Meet the Man the Elites Fear
body:
I’ve seen what they’re capable of. That FBI raid? They treated me like a terrorist, all to protect their own. The lawsuits? A flood meant to drown me. But I’m still standing because this matters—because you deserve to know how they’re gaming you.

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zol22pcea5n4rectvauon30kt7v4q06bljob7240_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ge6or4c1h2bs)
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1jkcfo2mefiq9ditc7q7paa4105b7537ndf6p5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ge6or4c1h2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I founded OMG (O'Keefe Media Group) to do what the mainstream won't: expose the powerful with raw, unfiltered truth. We caught IRS officials on hidden cameras, bragging about their AI overreach--how they're building a surveillance net to track your every dollar. _The Post Millennial_ called it "chilling," and X users said it's "the kind of journalism we've been starving for." That's OMG: no fluff, just facts, straight from the source.

But this work comes at a cost. I've been jailed on trumped-up charges, had my home raided by the FBI over Ashley Biden's diary, and faced endless lawsuits from the left. Why?

Because I won't stop. I don't have a personal life--just a relentless drive to uncover corruption. I've built OMG from the ground up to fight for people like you, [**and now we need**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8b0po8canartu1oe2pij13iqfk3tebgmkdfj24o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ge6or4c1h2bs)**[**$64,600 by June**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z66nsq1qa5nu8jbuu2tsa3pjc44dahmhpge18h3g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ge6or4c1h2bs)**[**to keep going. Will you join us?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z63jhig8f14jd98can6a25q2ucaha1nt14n7ajvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ge6or4c1h2bs)

**People call OMG a "wrecking ball" against the establishment. **

When we dropped the IRS tapes, it wasn't just a story--it was a warning shot.

Supporters say we're "rewriting the rules of journalism," while critics whine we're "too aggressive." Good. **The truth isn 't polite**.

But fighting the system takes resources--cameras, lawyers, guts--and we're running low. [**Your support keeps us in the game, digging into the shadows the elites want hidden.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zseks5jvkv38vl27icrjscshthvhu6rf6llj5t3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ge6or4c1h2bs)

I've seen what they're capable of. That FBI raid? They treated me like a terrorist, all to protect their own. The lawsuits? A flood meant to drown me. But I'm still standing because this matters--because you deserve to know how they're gaming you.

OMG's got more exposes ready to drop, [**but**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztuuisfqs91da7pra8qkhp69uk04nj9nchovtn0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ge6or4c1h2bs)**[**$64,600 by June**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9hqpir48kv0jligvdrqgmuovues9v1k05ehelro_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ge6or4c1h2bs)**[**is our lifeline. Without it, we fade, and they win.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkfidah12inv83ec0e28rjshoihuecj9dq7kjq00_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ge6or4c1h2bs)

If you're sick of the lies, the cover-ups, the smug insiders laughing at us, then this is your fight too. [**Your donation today --$20, $100, whatever you can--fuels work the mainstream's too scared to touch**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7dtludbp9s5388u27oa4cajbv1f1fptvri9a6ug_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ge6or4c1h2bs).

I'm not here to play nice; I'm here to win. Thank you for considering this. **With you, we 're unstoppable.**

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

subject: August: Only Citizens Vote Month!
body:
Start making plans now to ensure that the SAVE Act is passed and signed into law!
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** It's no secret that there is still work to be done on election integrity. A transparent, secure, and honest system isn't controversial--it's common sense and fundamental to any nation driven by its people.
One key reform that must be implemented: ensuring only U.S. citizens can register to vote. Our polling shows **[86% of Americans agree](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794abc2989f/1edb9794abc1d6d7 "https://www.teapartypatriots.org/noncitizen-voting")** that citizen-only voting is a must.The House has already passed the Safeguarding American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act, which mandates documentary proof of citizenship at registration. Today, loopholes still allow noncitizens to register to vote. The SAVE Act closes those gaps--but to pass the Senate, it will need bipartisan support to overcome a filibuster.
Most likely, the SAVE Act will ride on a continuing resolution in September. **That 's why we're dedicating August as _Only Citizens Vote Month_ --to build momentum for final passage, so that President Trump can finally sign it into law.****
**Here 's where we'll need **you** : watch for a short sign-up form coming soon, so we know how you can help, and we know where to send resource to help you plan.
While the Senate debates the One Big, Beautiful Bill and rescissions package right now, and we take action on those priorities, let's also ready ourselves to push the SAVE Act across the finish line later this summer.
**So, keep an eye on your inbox for details and planning tools. In the meantime, please start thinking about how you 'll join this effort--and let your network know to get ready.****
**Just imagine waking up one morning to the certainty that only citizens can register --and vote--in America!
In liberty,Jenny Beth Martin __ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************

Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene**[put melodramatic Democrat Rep. Melanie Stansbury in her place](https://substack.com/redirect/54550cbc-8a73-4c62-b89a-d3a5e1487c84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for giving an anti-Trump rant that crossed the line.
Greene wasn't playing around...
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/54550cbc-8a73-4c62-b89a-d3a5e1487c84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

"Let me say this to you Mr. Trump. 250 years ago, the people of this great nation rejected a reckless abusive king and we won't go back!" Stansbury said. "We will hold this administration accountable... be strong, we will fight back!!"
Greene began her closing remarks, **[scolding Stansbury for her pointed message to Trump.](https://substack.com/redirect/54550cbc-8a73-4c62-b89a-d3a5e1487c84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1a70dcf1-7ebc-416b-8dd2-09c4ecf93dde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Democratic governor told NBC News, Sunday, **["Come after me. Arrest me. Let's just get it over with, tough guy"](https://substack.com/redirect/1a70dcf1-7ebc-416b-8dd2-09c4ecf93dde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after border czar Tom Homan warned that Newsom and LA Mayor Karen Bass could face federal charges for obstructing ICE operations.
* **Homan threatened felony charges for officials who interfere with immigration enforcement** \- The border czar said anyone who crosses the line faces felony charges for "knowingly harboring and concealing an illegal alien" and impeding law enforcement, as violent anti-ICE protests continued for a third day in Los Angeles.
* **Trump deployed 2,000 National Guard troops while Newsom plans legal action** \- The president federalized California National Guard troops to respond to the violence, prompting Newsom to announce he'll file a lawsuit Monday challenging the deployment, claiming Trump failed to coordinate with state officials and calling it an example of "authoritarian tendencies."

# ABC "reporter" suspended after crashing out on Stephen Miller
ABC suspended Terry Moran after he called White House Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller **["a world-class hater" in a spiteful X post](https://substack.com/redirect/5e4eded4-d75f-44ce-828b-8c93fccba51e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , Sunday.
* **The national correspondent posted the attack** on X early Sunday morning before deleting it, prompting White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt to call out ABC for their "so-called journalist's" unprofessional behavior.
* **The suspension came hours after the White House criticized ABC's coverage** \- Leavitt told "Sunday Morning Futures" that ABC would "have to answer for" Moran's social media attack, emphasizing that someone "supposed to be an unbiased and professional journalist" shouldn't be making such partisan statements.
* **This adds to ABC's recent controversies involving biased coverage of Trump** \- The network previously faced criticism for fact-checking Trump more than Kamala Harris during their presidential debate, and recently settled a defamation lawsuit after host George Stephanopoulos called Trump a "rapist" during a March 2024 interview.
* **Stephen Miller responded by calling it evidence of broader media bias** \- **[Miller posted](https://substack.com/redirect/4bad466a-aa5c-4a83-a9f8-d6c7250200bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that Moran's "public meltdown" revealed how "privileged anchors and reporters" in corporate media are actually "radicals adopting a journalist's pose," suggesting Moran had "pulled off his mask" and exposed the true nature of mainstream journalism.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5e4eded4-d75f-44ce-828b-8c93fccba51e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
# Israel blocks Greta Thunberg's weird stunt
Israel's defense minister ordered the military **[to prevent Greta Thunberg's aid flotilla](https://substack.com/redirect/336a88e1-280c-49ab-b068-4e6d46b0c0ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from reaching Gaza, refusing to allow any breach of Israel's blockade.
* **Defense Minister Israel Katz directed the IDF to use "any means necessary"** to stop the vessel "Madleen," which is carrying the Swedish climate activist and 11 other activists along with humanitarian supplies like baby formula, medical supplies, and children's prosthetics.

* **Israel cited national security and its longstanding blockade policy** \- Katz said Israel would "act against any attempt to break the blockade or assist terrorist organizations," referencing the naval blockade Israel has maintained on Gaza since 2007 to prevent weapons smuggling to Hamas and other militant groups.
* **The Freedom Flotilla Coalition accused Israel of threatening unlawful force** \- The group organizing the mission, which departed Italy earlier this month and was about 160 nautical miles from Gaza as of Sunday, called their effort a "peaceful act of civil resistance" and said they "will not be intimidated" by Israel's threats of intervention.

Friend,

President Trump has been trying to deliver on his promise to **get violent illegal criminals out of our country** , but he's been facing _opposition at every turn._
* More than 60 liberal activist judges overstepping their power and legislating from the bench by blocking deportation orders
* Far-Left organizations flooding the courts with lawsuits
* Blue state officials refusing to comply with federal law
* Democrat congressmen and judges helping illegals evade capture by ICE
* Democrat congressmen storming ICE facilities to defend criminal illegals and interfere with operations
* Democrat congressmen visiting El Salvador to return a deported illegal gang member to the US
* Violent anti-ICE riots breaking out in the streets of cities like Los Angeles

[SUPPORT TRUMP'S DEPORTATIONS >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsc7vhrvj3ctmkq7vbmtgoebgj789cqe85of9e90_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ie0oj0c3h2bs)

_**While President Trump is working to restore law and order, the radical Left is working to dismantle it.**_

They're pouring in money to fund lawsuits and protests, support congressmen who cause obstructions, and launch campaigns to demonize President Trump and ICE. That's why we _desperately_ need your help.

We've set a rapid-response goal:_raise $50,000 by MIDNIGHT to fuel the fight to deport violent illegal criminals_ and secure our nation.

body:

| **_THIS IS AN AUTOMATED MESSAGE FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com:_**

We’re reaching out to Democrats who have not added their signature to our time-sensitive letter to Bernie Sanders.

[**We have limited spots left. Please confirm your signature is submitted before we close this letter at midnight:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90860?t=6&akid=20135%2E878179%2Egft0Z6) | [**15 SIGNATURES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT: THANK SENATOR BERNIE SANDERS FOR LEADING THE FIGHT AGAINST TRUMP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90860?t=7&akid=20135%2E878179%2Egft0Z6)
---
Thank you,
Voter Protection Project

**\- - - - - - Begin Forwarded Message - - - - - -**
From: Signature Due @ 11:59pm (VPP)
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject: WOW! Bernie Sanders just dropped the hammer:
**_BERNIE SANDERS JUST DROPPED THE HAMMER!_**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90860?t=8&akid=20135%2E878179%2Egft0Z6)
[**Are YOU with Sen. Sanders?? You’ve been hand-selected to sign our card THANKING Bernie for his hard work and joining his fight against Trump! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90860?t=9&akid=20135%2E878179%2Egft0Z6)
[**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90860?t=10&akid=20135%2E878179%2Egft0Z6)
---
TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Senator Bernie Sanders,**

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Trump resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, but you keep us hopeful that we can fight back.

**I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats _across the country_ stand with you.**

Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and save our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90860?t=11&akid=20135%2E878179%2Egft0Z6) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90860?t=12&akid=20135%2E878179%2Egft0Z6)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
If we don’t hit our 500 signature goal, **Bernie Sanders may think Democrats are abandoning his fight.** Please sign by MIDNIGHT!

_\- The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20135%2E878179%2Egft0Z6). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20135%2E878179%2Egft0Z6).**

subject: I’m now forced to say it

body:

---
Friend,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... **
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Friend...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---
And the _ONLY_ way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to it.
---
_...Just ask President Trump!_
---
The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757.**
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z0ve9itv26t6qemeip3g8kugjjgppnm2284cp7q0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ie8p34c1h2bs)
__
---
_So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. _

name: Indiana GOP
subject: Invitation to the 2025 Southern Indiana State Party Dinner
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | | Good afternoon, I am reaching out to share some exciting news with you! Today we are announcing our **2025 Southern Indiana State Party Dinner**. **Governor Braun** will be joining us to discuss all the ways his administration is working towards a freer and more prosperous future for Hoosiers. And political leaders, from statewide elected office holders to grassroots conservative activists, will be there to celebrate Southern Indiana and the incredible work being done to keep Indiana red and elect results-driven conservative leaders. Southern Indiana played a key role in the red wave we saw in 2024, and **it is up to all of us to keep that momentum going for 2026!** I would love for you to join us on **Monday, July 14, 2025** , in Evansville, to welcome Governor Braun, celebrate the hard-won victories you have been a part of, and prepare for the future. **Details available upon RSVP.** **To RSVP, please email Danielle at****[RSVP@indiana.gop](mailto:RSVP@indiana.gop)**. I hope to see you there! Warm Regards, Lana Keesling Chairwoman Indiana GOP
---

name: Eva Piatek, Evergreen
subject: URGENT: Senate inches closer to passing its disastrous budget bill
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Speak out and let them know we're paying attention
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3667817/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
| **🚨****DEVELOPING:** Senate Republicans just released a portion of their disastrous budget bill proposal, following the House’s lead with a plan that would kill jobs, raise household energy bills, and worsen pollution.

They’re hoping we won't notice their efforts to fast-track the bill, but we’re going to let them know we’re watching—and that we won't stand for this assault on clean energy. **Email your senators right now.** [TAKE ACTION](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3667818/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Friend—

Over recent days, two key Senate committees have released draft text for portions of the Republicans’ tax megabill—**and it’s a gut punch to their constituents.**

Like the House’s version we told you about a few weeks ago, their proposals would fully repeal critical investments that are lowering household costs, cleaning up toxic air pollution, and saving lives. And once again, it’s frontline communities—those hit hardest by decades of fossil fuel development and some of the nation’s highest energy burdens—that will pay the steepest price.

This play to rob working families in order to give billionaires massive tax breaks is outright criminal, and we need to make it loud and clear that Congress can’t get away with it.

**You’ve already emailed Senators McCormick and Fetterman about voting NO,**[**but since there’s so much at stake in Pennsylvania if clean energy investments and programs get nixed, will you email them again about what we stand to lose in the budget passes?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3667819/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[WRITE TO YOUR SENATORS](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3667820/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Why should Senators McCormick and Fetterman be worried? Because the clean energy incentives that could get gutted have allowed Pennsylvanians to reduce energy costs—and without them, **Pennsylvania families could see their household energy bills go up by nearly $60 a year by 2030 and $80 a year by 2035.**

As someone who campaigned on lowering energy prices for Pennsylvanians, McCormick in particular should understand how undoing these popular policies will keep our energy costs unnecessarily volatile and expensive. [**Send a message to tell him you won’t stand for the roadblocks his party is putting up against clean energy, which we know is cheaper and faster than fossil fuels.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3667821/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[SEND A MESSAGE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3667820/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Thanks for your continued advocacy, |
---
| | |
---
### Eva Piatek
Digital Lead - Email
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |

body:
I recently warned you about the far-Left Arlington County Board choosing to REFUSE to cooperate with ICE — even for violent criminals and terrorists. | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/prAUIUAKd8Zf839eitt1dkHtdSkXmwtG-9YP1zM96nOT4eSZsUdgdARrSYycFbCMgkeBBU1fskr9W0sPlX0doS3RkGtdCsjU5zS8G0e--Z7piff0U5oJSMxuIQ8Fmwo7BBWm1UwrI-V0pdbcDrwhXcSoZWHQorFQmXak6MdGOpJonw9nIQzw5syn/ogCwsrFUOCMUSEFhkBCxWxQv3kH8LnAU/9)_
Peter,

I recently warned you about the far-Left Arlington County Board choosing to REFUSE to cooperate with ICE -- _**even for violent criminals and terrorists.**_

**Now, their criminal-first, victim-last policy is already backfiring.**
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/4h1toEZ2fRoXqDrFVXblglpfKY6VXuKq2hPrHxgKFfX15cZR1NDgKpNq43AfBOQk28C7lVRsOgbKwlY05HJSc_EBGt-XcP5tcEmOKIkkew0Ukfn_-ILTuJa7A1ljJo_lzhWa4gVOZmRYh7FC9wkO2SNNjYsvBuSkaykyZoKu3TzvPQJBLZnghjivUJ1nNzKyjA_TSV10JfCdg1Hmtx6KATULyQxuQflcPgNie1aIbjsTkbSQ0tEKgQCbwwkH133dAXI3aKZVqHwS0NjPSv4ZLPchjrfKekomeFmcm6JUuE-TyUtl24bCZpu3Ep0-Ht_8XGO-3Httnz8GUyfvxJ2zXQT7ekEpin9fNuT7PY_4ytaZ7n96Y--2sAwDIJ-S_3oYysqIzft53WtBno02E2upVCCnOyIGkd8zTdrvR_E8ubFl_1ey9lczsG75_iIQW36Ik80OXeIrn6z-EQeUulAdz9l7M8tGDqxTopDsqkWWZb_lIGZvIC7Aame1tojQ59GIUMM4qy01_ZjMagC5Jh1suww3GnMsjB71_IjVruYckqNmzVQ9ojuDylwsA-VeDd4zzNdEHGvkNu3Tltu3k0U2jJITeRUeuIXStai-7uMzONIQVDXUkMY-Bytx6tZw-Ah45DTPTzGV79DpTrZqfMBiLEst8kDgAUY2NrGS/KdRHeGpWIt5ggdyG92eK4uRAvauaCHDm/9)
---
As a result of this reckless policy change, [_**Arlington County Police are being forced to DISBAND their Gang Unit.**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/xWj1z8vae4pqeefPLfonI-slm5cOSs2u5rsfGionbdBs0dcCOPsmNThyjvIZ2oq6pTM0f86GMZaBBSj3XIWEDAkRM5z7flNtrc-MlSObqDmvlDST6UajIS2vOYtR6_D70Eg7tP89OYdRlN6TWmbUGNYfCh-PYjEU87T6_GCBXEloheFtp7BiJlLAQdsvpx-kw3eParNlEGH1mGoIDfVKsmOcJunlfbkXc1tpMnfNft10I_AENlPqp1PWwdlgUSPwprrgPRT2S69vsoiAgUb2PIVqrL_GzMTku8Qd20kCCADAc5jDLriP1M9AsQmotlWYF-iPDVSBj0ngJQQD793qVOTXn4RnI_DjnoVi1nthrnKgcgoHjEWgo0uFB34SVGzndJ0RDZj9lHAeUja7vHw0ELzE7zm_Xah0lf0VNih_KAISzqSxZDM4hLJij5d3A7RyoUv5YUl54qhqGqAOZ8OxyX75Un1Aj1L74rmLVT0jG023TEPcB1btCwvSXniRBkQhomDYJDn5pTmuNGCAwWNFk0-1cu0IkQ2GB_fQr7FWGWDFO4RM0ys4YzKKSE01av1CM3pG5v9MMKEXh_K4nV86OJ_YgCcPuiFn5O13R9G_dWPVuz1i2oeG9IWyC6p9RbNBWiXyyWDvrxlKMDaJGe1wznX2Ciw3HuUMjD-P/8Fo2Yrj4bYi2oIS8fyoHsCK6VZVEtBAV/9)
_Even worse,_ the brave men and women of the Arlington PD Gang Unit have been reassigned to focus on property crime -- _not getting violent offenders off of our streets._
---
[ **STAND FOR A SAFE VIRGINIA** ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/S8wdbIieEmeF5yKEdXXM_V1lUUblpA0thV5qEpeGkB4n0WEVyTt2LtqGjCgPMIF3Uz1VQ8D0STPtDj5q1kOK_dTBjH11CZnMFHFKF4vxbeBgeyWy-CiaFVuryxkAYgT4BBQGEoJg0kmKVQqYzBpK6qSQ5oxz_ckSw_09SiYHZRCn-h_iNhip5GE3FiJ_8QeZJZ39Z7sx5eQghC4qqx8q6HURtuJLx4XhVXkCp-POpeWzMWIe-KQD544ASJFFGwUIqNOR0xo4PqHWHUdCGurv1X4q5Z314ZGgFCugTeD39148GvhffXCTwxUWTCgYD_LpUdXK4AOzzBs75yf9xc4t2yA3Yw7rbgBCLJOh9kGZK9PRTM9oqdzPHfTe9Ekx88S2nHRfg9jTuQmpB5tiicyMfSaz-4NSS2l67GQZyz4wP-B-CwIcdjgmdU3fwaICCMJOESiITfnD-6rZI4KqpMNUvd9k8xYqfqEooBD9QPBRbHuDGJA7pCunG9NzKr53HrNLH6QIddH4iVSyRqSym9olac2-VjCBBuOHU3FGHEulQh2kMh3At1PZtrmJ67PhZKgEjaeA_4D54Y6J7FlYkrIjitJJu35n19ECM0V6vDpo31hN066Fu4QD8cXCk3_XTaOHrDzOXdi2O00reAYUlhioiY5Nc96RWfikuK9I/z1kJJ-e7nHdvlX_Weep6DBZBsxXT9sOX/9)
---
Since most criminal activity referred to ICE involves gangs, Arlington is choosing to cut ties with immigration authorities, _effectively turning its back on fighting gang violence._
As Virginia's top law enforcement officer, I won't stand for this -- **my office is working nonstop to keep Virginia safe, even if politicians refuse to do so.**

But I can't do it alone, Peter. If you believe sanctuary cities have no place in Virginia, [_**stand with us to put an end to this nonsense.**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/F7a2Tr4QS1YotrhhYbL4szSKyPOO5Av7MrlE8fm2gcKgzyPSEZZSafcG2-YtLtcVviDB_ZCPz5PXwK-wGmquGW5s-bTcMNYyZxrFLh_ckOgqmD4STZ8HrWNZiXmS1VkVxxRaWAf0cGQlktpX-LDaITxna-PIHBKWtuNQ4-ZBcG5HX4djhXgSNPqOuc3xFyPXwaqWzK8EIkman2yxwuAsVAnkijSHWogvnhWNIt5Q3Z9P7seNdKY2XTeZFFP3ysLAxkmb7UuGORIU1ZOak-uVc-StBQZJql8NkZUwO0eyFaqJKCn_7lJ2xzyaleN26pzmKpX2cfbjGPRtt6UDloTt7zhR5Qg2gw3IvBQPij2VPncaRKKhbJ3DxvVXQ8AvF7NRErjob9bgLFB9AOq5i0lywN063A0Z8Y_VoimJCBn6Fb4YOQyCBkP1BNKZ0vex5G8y6Q99ulijcZuhGptounmCSGunTAK6FM4pykKMaq8egsWKf0cTf9Nm44mVbnPqy3nx1XdSPJlgwejvhCWJsvpNjBIdwLwbA5L8shoDWqwFRRj7NaKwnxUOCrc4wNY-MQsVlNvpZtL-Qw-Fqo5EE8aI5R2-CnGTnnzrxkbi-vdyufdvMChBDMYgrZ8QE5L2n_v5Cx_BKfcjF_Lgv9_RUfR0vgMIbmbaAGQ-XBeg/3vjQSuQGKYatheTX5EauUGfX4U9PVQKw/9)
---
Let's bring common sense _back_ to the Commonwealth, Attorney General Jason Miyares

clean_body: I recently warned you about the far-Left Arlington County Board choosing to REFUSE to cooperate with ICE — even for violent criminals and terrorists. | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Peter, I recently warned you about the far-Left Arlington County Board choosing to REFUSE to cooperate with ICE -- even for violent criminals and terrorists. Now, their criminal-first, victim-last policy is already backfiring. As a result of this reckless policy change, Even worse, the brave men and women of the Arlington PD Gang Unit have been reassigned to focus on property crime -- not getting violent offenders off of our streets. Since most criminal activity referred to ICE involves gangs, Arlington is choosing to cut ties with immigration authorities, effectively turning its back on fighting gang violence. As Virginia's top law enforcement officer, I won't stand for this -- my office is working nonstop to keep Virginia safe, even if politicians refuse to do so. But I can't do it alone, Peter. If you believe sanctuary cities have no place in Virginia, Let's bring common sense back to the Commonwealth, Attorney General Jason Miyares | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: It’s not a secret (but it is the key)
body:
The Left thinks they own America’s girls...
Send one girl to YWLS — PLUS another! (match ends soon)

| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c069c8e000ce448b8100cec862e78679&_e=1-SSpNNEYQdtzjWwCGdvvir8EfTgMt4R054yE7bUdWoeAQ6uomUA672FceuzUOI9gjvbQBBXe_piRlsM3QVQI0GHd6cUfrjHnZtaexQdoOG7SDyWbLg1Sc3WzstJIcLws8js1XMWa-u_BD6b_1CczJ_QsZ-_CGoEsiIx04BkfVjk3Dn5igWhJKQlrSRenePs_hxGokfr2dAXMdpIaJ3FKpIdik09DaSsQBBv3jJzY74Pbu1xHQkgTRh-woGVb3d6effqC0KRf618bw4SNR7QPx3XiZMerbJZvqt_jcRHLXpkEPl4nnGrhva4ChjVnGS9)
---
Peter,
---
It’s no secret. One of the last cultural strongholds the Left is still clinging to is... _young women._ High school boys are the most conservative they’ve been in 50 years. Gen Z men are shifting to our movement in droves.But the Left still thinks they _OWN_ America’s girls. They’ve spent years filling their heads with Woke lies: _That truth is offensive... That femininity is outdated... That loving your country is shameful._ They still think they can shape the next generation of women to hate this country... unless WE stop them.That’s why Turning Point USA launched the Young Women’s Leadership Summit (YWLS). **And this summer, YWLS (our 10****th****one!) is back... BIGGER. BOLDER. And more unapologetically Conservative than ever!**
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c069c8e000ce448b8100cec862e78679&_e=1-SSpNNEYQdtzjWwCGdvvir8EfTgMt4R054yE7bUdWoeAQ6uomUA672FceuzUOI9gjvbQBBXe_piRlsM3QVQI0GHd6cUfrjHnZtaexQdoOG7SDyWbLg1Sc3WzstJIcLws8js1XMWa-u_BD6b_1CczA7pRqRmhVv_uQ2M194_jodSmJ5JKlhoeYaJL5Qf1ktqmTV505tzY45ed3dCwyTU_R7FGVhFbEU3KSsWqK9tWH-2qqOLN6BRf9GlByJy6FAiSmlHhLnKDP3t9Wc6wBsi2JesCfqcq1tsNHPAgsYqGgayKq9NlgN733Fi_MD_O0Rr)
---
June 13–15 in Dallas, Texas, thousands of freedom-loving young women will gather together to:✅ Find their voice✅ Embrace their femininity✅ Grow in boldness✅ Get trained to LEAD on their campuses and in their communitiesAnd just look at this lineup of speakers, Peter... **Alex Clark. Tulsi Gabbard. Alina Habba. Brett Cooper. Dana Loesch. Riley Gaines. Lila Rose. And so many more female leaders.** These are the boldest women in America. And they’re rallying the next generation to women to rise.
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c069c8e000ce448b8100cec862e78679&_e=1-SSpNNEYQdtzjWwCGdvvir8EfTgMt4R054yE7bUdWoeAQ6uomUA672FceuzUOI9gjvbQBBXe_piRlsM3QVQI0GHd6cUfrjHnZtaexQdoOG7SDyWbLg1Sc3WzstJIcLws8js1XMWa-u_BD6b_1CczBWYOOlW4xH-w6sQ62z81zPf2cxVDzhVp0NT-VY4DSvgQBTwPyzLBtveGLGUnm7poorOM6W3vp4PFBMc_3uA-2zt85j2ImVvc7TCOHTXA38M6bg0_ukDhKo2gGEmcZux7u9W7QZa5ARHXadqZ1VLoEbHCpS7p1rUp7nd7JTfXBLp)
---
_But here’s the catch, Peter..._ **We’re hearing from HUNDREDS of student activists right now who are desperate to come.** These are some of the most impressive, high-potential young patriots you could ever meet.And without YOUR help... they may not make it to YWLS. **[That’s why I’m asking you today... Will you sponsor one of these students (and future leaders) with a $50 gift to Turning Point USA?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c069c8e000ce448b8100cec862e78679&_e=1-SSpNNEYQdtzjWwCGdvvir8EfTgMt4R054yE7bUdWoeAQ6uomUA672FceuzUOI9gjvbQBBXe_piRlsM3QVQI0GHd6cUfrjHnZtaexQdoOG7SDyWbLg1Sc3WzstJIcLws8js1XMWa-u_BD6b_1CczFxD26b1vdjarGDjN97CHuThSuD7fXAeyItbWuQQ7VsJ_Or6MJMk4xUk-JdiL-xWdfvBKIvYdQDIbiwbktLi9svNDqv7byzM0zBD-HaNeVOjgt9K-kwIe41kYJXPYAdkRzsdubz1IYq9fRP3IU3xZii0ukgCagC6dhfJdkYxvUVQ)**
---
[ **Sponsor A Student For YWLS &**
**Have Your Impact DOUBLED**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c069c8e000ce448b8100cec862e78679&_e=1-SSpNNEYQdtzjWwCGdvvir8EfTgMt4R054yE7bUdWoeAQ6uomUA672FceuzUOI9gjvbQBBXe_piRlsM3QVQI0GHd6cUfrjHnZtaexQdoOG7SDyWbLg1Sc3WzstJIcLws8js1XMWa-u_BD6b_1CczDxnb6NOt8OU23VoCSUd6-Sv0ynsOckSj2_dO9DRODyCuM6OCeqHnnzQJk5z-j9EJ7St1MruagquSWXcHwUKfbgfEZqyiAB-jiCfNY1apcWnS2KderfRkePsOfcngoCvACnLO5baHwNOfIS_-K71YoZissA7Ang39kYljtHdEEmR)
---
**And here’s the amazing part: Every dollar you give this month will be MATCHED.** Why? Because an extremely generous Turning Point USA supporter wanted to rally as many grassroots patriots as possible to DEFEAT the Left in our culture... for good._So, Peter, your gift of $50?_ **It doesn’t just help send one student to YWLS...** **_It sends TWO._** That’s two future leaders. Two future moms. Two young women who will stand up, speak out, and LEAD America’s comeback.**Peter, I believe this is the KEY to ending the Left’s cultural grip — once and for all.** We inspire a new generation of proud, confident, fearless women... and they go back to their schools, campuses, and communities ready to FIGHT. But we can’t do it without you...**_Will you help us make sure NO student is left behind this year?_**
---
[ **Sponsor A Student For YWLS &**
**Have Your Impact DOUBLED**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c069c8e000ce448b8100cec862e78679&_e=1-SSpNNEYQdtzjWwCGdvvir8EfTgMt4R054yE7bUdWoeAQ6uomUA672FceuzUOI9gjvbQBBXe_piRlsM3QVQI0GHd6cUfrjHnZtaexQdoOG7SDyWbLg1Sc3WzstJIcLws8js1XMWa-u_BD6b_1CczACG5y8EsLibQmjc3RSM3sW_hCvkPToFkL1HJd0IysvKlQrHOErFtzmKdpGsnIeEGaPrMQaDS1DewGgHyEssV5BvV1jWWpgkdWe_23jGIjOzZ83pHfmN7r1SyQNuPY3YTZnjJ2mYKdwmhYZ4KUDmoNd6msDC20ez7v2Jrjc2Jy3e)
---
Let’s make sure the young women who WANT to lead, GET to lead.Let’s send them to Dallas this June for YWLS. And let’s END the Left’s grip on America’s young women.
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c069c8e000ce448b8100cec862e78679&_e=1-SSpNNEYQdtzjWwCGdvvir8EfTgMt4R054yE7bUdWoeAQ6uomUA672FceuzUOI9gjvbQBBXe_piRlsM3QVQI0GHd6cUfrjHnZtaexQdoOG7SDyWbLg1Sc3WzstJIcLws8js1XMWa-u_BD6b_1CczNebp7nk2A0chlEA3B9bbDwBOw03DwLRJvMBhK5BBNngkh5h6TqSAOQjMq__BFgmeMRRkxVgnQfOe07NYkoPoth12f9uWW9gAqK0g8z_ehPcMMEdxabenuc8D9pdrhO1oFHj6TXNQRckEEx7L-zoKidS6fo4L7JK-gPHbfDhOSVQ)
---
**P.S.** Don’t forget — every gift made to Turning Point USA this month will be matched, dollar for dollar. So, if you join us today with your generous gift... it means $50 = 2 students sent to YWLS... $100 = 4 students... And so on...**[Let’s make sure NO future leader is left behind. Help shape the next generation of female conservative leaders by making your gift to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c069c8e000ce448b8100cec862e78679&_e=1-SSpNNEYQdtzjWwCGdvvir8EfTgMt4R054yE7bUdWoeAQ6uomUA672FceuzUOI9gjvbQBBXe_piRlsM3QVQI0GHd6cUfrjHnZtaexQdoOG7SDyWbLg1Sc3WzstJIcLws8js1XMWa-u_BD6b_1CczOaVrY0DdK7jAabvGsaGB171K0A2_MuWLksNwtRo2t7pmjiPmD6sbVsGF3ZOao0AWuuH0GW-fZCesImRV0f-pEtslnku1Lxhj_XYcn0IV7TI8Vyb-9s2GeNWlunyCVcHJETLWgb5gRrLBzGesW1K11_K2394Mrzp_axAwz_OUBl1)**
---
[ **Sponsor A Student For YWLS &**
**Have Your Impact DOUBLED**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c069c8e000ce448b8100cec862e78679&_e=1-SSpNNEYQdtzjWwCGdvvir8EfTgMt4R054yE7bUdWoeAQ6uomUA672FceuzUOI9gjvbQBBXe_piRlsM3QVQI0GHd6cUfrjHnZtaexQdoOG7SDyWbLg1Sc3WzstJIcLws8js1XMWa-u_BD6b_1CczFrxo0HFDGAuupmb8jZjRpZyJXcSH3vKGwnt8ms07mqXbdg6D9nU5wDwzDLK-k26QFPcYKXcclNeTGKoD5_-ATf267_wGgtSm-RT_vgJPpVgQYElmJeMbTuVGDKJzE9ED-eUSnNESTjF1Z-jLsY2bOvIDcSWyudODr8zI2fNMe3h)

name: Governing Group
subject: Municipal Elections Matter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOVERNING GROUP PAC
body:
This is where the rubber meets the road; make your voice heard in this year's elections!

| | | | | [|
---](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=e78266f23b&e=6484bb6dd5)
| | | | | Dear Friend,
Last Friday marked the close of Utah’s municipal filing period for most Utah cities and towns. That means we now know who’s stepping up to lead our cities, towns, and school boards.
At Governing Group, we’ve been watching closely. Because real change doesn’t come from a single member of Congress or legislator. **It comes from electing thoughtful, principled leaders at every level of government** —people who will work hard, engage respectfully, govern transparently, and stay focused on what really matters.
That’s why Governing Group exists.
We’re not here to play favorites. We’re here to find and support leaders who are ready to reject political theater in favor of real, community-driven problem-solving. **We help them run smart campaigns, build meaningful connections with voters, and stay true to their values once they’re in office.**
But we can’t do it without _your_ help.
This next chapter begins now. And with dozens of local races taking shape across Utah, your support today will help us identify and vet strong candidates, train and equip them with tools that win, and knock on doors, place ads, and reach the voters who will decide these races.
If you want to see real change in the way Utah does politics—not someday, but starting right now—help us get the right people across the finish line. [**Chip in $25, $50, or $100 today!**](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=fd437fd7e5&e=6484bb6dd5)
**We’re ready to do the work. We just need you with us.**
With gratitude,Governing Group
PS: Did you file to run for office? Apply to be a candidate and our staff will reach out with next steps!

---
| [DONATE](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=6cea00bd7d&e=6484bb6dd5)
---

We just need you with us. With gratitude,Governing Group PS: Did you file to run for office? I'm writing to you today with **an urgent matter that requires your immediate attention**. As I revealed in my latest article, the Summits of the Americas are being hijacked by Biden holdovers--entrenched State Department hacks like Jennifer Showell and Thomas Hastings--who **are undermining President Trump 's America First policies**.

These clowns are pushing a woke, pro-China agenda that threatens our nation's leadership and security.

The host country, the Dominican Republic, is rolling out the red carpet for Communist China while drowning in drug trafficking, sex trafficking, and human rights abuses. **This is a critical moment, and the truth must be exposed --NOW.**

**[**I need your help to keep fighting**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/763rGMRBv4abxd4c1gWuxlQg/DcK7Z1Br5k310EWtVBAx2w)****.** Your donations will fuel my travel and reporting as I chase this story across the country and beyond, digging deeper into this betrayal of President Trump as I work to uncover and expose Biden holdovers. **Every dollar counts** , and [**your contribution will strike a blow against the deep-state operatives trying to sell out our country**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/763rGMRBv4abxd4c1gWuxlQg/DcK7Z1Br5k310EWtVBAx2w).

name: Republican Governors Association
subject: Sign the letter for our ICE Agents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Governors Association
body:
We’re preparing something special for our ICE Agents working day and night to end the illegal invasion of our country

| | | We're preparing something special for our ICE Agents working day and night to end the illegal invasion of our country, Friend. [**Take 1 minute to add your name to our appreciation letter below:**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zph7r0vab85ksf0pq7ou0cn36kkdc0o1vruh190o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ie2pr2c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear US Immigration and Customs Enforcement Agents (ICE),

We the people would like to take a moment to express our appreciation for your tireless efforts to keep our communities safe. We understand that under Biden-Harris, you were forced to stand down as millions of illegal immigrants flooded our country, and we want you to know we always stand with you.

Thank you for being the frontline defenders of our nation's immigration laws as you face challenges every day. From confronting violent gangs to rescuing victims of human trafficking, our communities are much safer, thanks to you.

We will continue to support your fight to make sure every illegal immigrant is removed from this country, the cartels are eliminated, and the innocent are protected.

Please know you are in our prayers and that you are true heroes.

Sincerely yours,

[X:_________________________](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zac85ce35j93i1i3iiojddokl5690fpgml6vh080_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ie2pr2c1h2bs)

Now, Trump has escalated even further and is calling for the arrest of CA Governor Gavin Newsom.

Trump has used ICE to indict and arrest the Mayor of Newark as well as Congresswoman Monica McIver (D-NJ) and is also using the agency to arrest and deport political dissidents opposed to his Israel policy. The only reason why Trump isn't conducting arrests en masse of his political opponents is because courts would shut it down. Which is why he is doing everything in his power to shut them down. That's where Defend our Courts comes in... We are working non-stop to protect our courts in key flash points where Trump is attacking them such as in Pennsylvania where MAGA is working nonstop to dismantle the PA Supreme Court and ensure that PA will never be a swing state again. **Thank you for opening my email.**

99% of people scroll right past — but not you. That means **_everything_** to me. I’m Derrick Evans: a husband, father, and rancher from West Virginia. I’m just a working man with a family to raise and bills to pay—not a D.C. insider with a team of _lobbyists and lawyers on speed dial_. | | Dear US Immigration and Customs Enforcement Agents (ICE),

We the people would like to take a moment to express our appreciation for your tireless efforts to keep our communities safe. We understand that under Biden-Harris, you were forced to stand down as millions of illegal immigrants flooded our country, and we want you to know we always stand with you.

Thank you for being the frontline defenders of our nation's immigration laws as you face challenges every day. From confronting violent gangs to rescuing victims of human trafficking, our communities are much safer, thanks to you.

We will continue to support your fight to make sure every illegal immigrant is removed from this country, the cartels are eliminated, and the innocent are protected.

Please know you are in our prayers and that you are true heroes.

Sincerely yours,

clean_body: We’re preparing something special for our ICE Agents working day and night to end the illegal invasion of our country | | | We're preparing something special for our ICE Agents working day and night to end the illegal invasion of our country, Friend. | | Dear US Immigration and Customs Enforcement Agents (ICE), We the people would like to take a moment to express our appreciation for your tireless efforts to keep our communities safe. We understand that under Biden-Harris, you were forced to stand down as millions of illegal immigrants flooded our country, and we want you to know we always stand with you. Thank you for being the frontline defenders of our nation's immigration laws as you face challenges every day. From confronting violent gangs to rescuing victims of human trafficking, our communities are much safer, thanks to you. We will continue to support your fight to make sure every illegal immigrant is removed from this country, the cartels are eliminated, and the innocent are protected. Please know you are in our prayers and that you are true heroes. Sincerely yours, Please sign above | | | | | | | | | Paid for by the Republican Governors Association 1747 Pennsylvania Ave. NW Suite 250 Washington, DC 20006 | To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add "info@email.gop-govs.com" to your address book. It’s simple, folks. Defenders of voting rights like Cory Booker, AOC, Robert Reich, and Stacey Abrams recognize that the Electoral College is harming our democracy and needs to go.
It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to take away this dangerous mechanism that enabled the January 6th insurrection before it happens again.
Vote suppressors have proven there’s no length they won’t go to in order to win. Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=rAfCa6UysGgkIQWYS5fe4nUY+wI8kRo+Aqe7h2KoCFizd5H6woIfpMl8dC5dWYDwrecV4hOnJkoKE6YPpYgCB2NPjBJhiV8lb8+RrPAHme0=]

name: Andrea
subject: The Wins and the Work Ahead
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=d9ebccf591&u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=24cc93a3d6)
---
| |
---
| |
# THE WINS AND THE WORK AHEAD
Friends,

**Indianapolis is a special place. And, our community deserves leadership that reflects its strength, integrity, and heart. That's why I'm committed to continuing this work.**

During the 2025 legislative session, I collaborated with my colleagues to author and co-author several pieces of legislation, including bills to strengthen water utility regulations, protect DNA data privacy, and expand film and media tax credits. I also sponsored legislation to lower healthcare costs by eliminating barriers like prior authorization and unfair copay rules.

**These wins weren't just mine- they were ours. Every bill I championed this session was shaped by conversations with you. **You have been engaged, showing up to town halls, calling and writing in. I am grateful for your partnership.

_See the legislation I worked on[here.](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=a3cdd6de91&e=d9ebccf591)_

As Assistant Leader of the Senate Democratic Caucus, I helped drive our strategy to support working Hoosiers. We fought for affordable housing, lowered healthcare costs, and strong public education. While we have made progress, there is still more work to do.

I will continue fighting for the values we share. And I am committed to community-centered leadership.

In partnership,
Andrea

name: Austin Davis
subject: Honoring those who came before me
disclaimer_text: paid for by the blood, sweat and tears of those who came before me
body:
Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XrGKMtCcbE2djJaqLq6C9g2?unsubscribedata=D1eqah5hJPqyMcjO3dNUYkGuMJ4RDazEgIDyaAS9NKz95yubEkdETSROVfKLsMot5X%2Bq6d%2FscbmsSNVC1Z7f4PqK%2BajJgzE4nuuDyYk4B86FT8SuoVQfb0DXYLKdOSykcYcgjZ0lSUI8%2FIad8%2F0oIHIso%2FZwCsMtTELKuNGm079rKZiYKTzYpUHx0lIBDJ2W%2FWFystza2ffEuCexdW8uUEdmWSoHLZtsi8pul1ltaPDskn5H8Dzh0e4MJHCzAByUwKLBWum7kU8XBdaoT2WDD7hzpM5V9Tz288S73%2BvuseGzEmSkXClTr%2BO2KoSaINTubWSZNjt8GODXC91QAdvPEt3Qh40iCw0D%2Fx%2FV8dtzhjOo1L%2Bpdo6ONWKPc4mm%2FXoLTydQhFDueYHHnNnG9EpnsFBCg6fG0mvB4vP7XfQwvIsm2jKo6hjjR6q3tXjFVsnf)

| | Peter, it’s Austin Davis. Recently, I had the honor of delivering several commencement speeches at some of the incredible universities and colleges across the Commonwealth. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109262686/550519366/-717610454?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_060925_COMMENCEMENT_ATO_D1_S1_RES1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWE3MDY2OS00NjQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pSjiNVgNcTdocgrNTdWawRjqxlcSzU1sbMvUxckpaLA=) **This is an especially impactful moment for me personally, because I’m actually a first-generation college graduate. ** I’ll never forget walking across the stage to receive my diploma at my college graduation and thinking how far I’d come. I felt such gratitude for my parents and my community. I got to feel those same feelings again while delivering these commencement addresses. While I am blessed with this awesome responsibility to represent Pennsylvania as Lieutenant Governor, I know it is not one that I alone have paid for. It was paid for by the blood, sweat and tears of those who came before me. I work to honor that every day. **I don’t think in my grandparents’ wildest dreams they would have ever imagined that their grandson would one day occupy the second highest office in Pennsylvania.** It’s this understanding that motivates me to make life better for everyone who will come after me. For my daughter, Harper, and for your kids and grandkids. When I reflect on my gratitude to my grandparents and parents, it spurs me to do better for our future. That’s why I care so much about investing in our shared future. [**I want to continue fighting for Pennsylvania. I know we can do better for each other and the generations that will come after us by fighting injustice, wherever and whenever we see it. clean_body: Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, it’s Austin Davis. Recently, I had the honor of delivering several commencement speeches at some of the incredible universities and colleges across the Commonwealth. = This is an especially impactful moment for me personally, because I’m actually a first-generation college graduate. I’ll never forget walking across the stage to receive my diploma at my college graduation and thinking how far I’d come. I felt such gratitude for my parents and my community. I got to feel those same feelings again while delivering these commencement addresses. While I am blessed with this awesome responsibility to represent Pennsylvania as Lieutenant Governor, I know it is not one that I alone have paid for. It was paid for by the blood, sweat and tears of those who came before me. I work to honor that every day. I don’t think in my grandparents’ wildest dreams they would have ever imagined that their grandson would one day occupy the second highest office in Pennsylvania. It’s this understanding that motivates me to make life better for everyone who will come after me. For my daughter, Harper, and for your kids and grandkids. When I reflect on my gratitude to my grandparents and parents, it spurs me to do better for our future. That’s why I care so much about investing in our shared future. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Peter. = Lt. [**MESSAGE FROM NAVY SEALS TIM SHEEHY, ELI CRANE, & RYAN ZINKE**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=eb26923284db4e42ab74033f96ca17c1&_e=tK8Cy3rbowjyKiMoV1E60n27sKzXhTeedZTmriRdgSWV_q_nuApWMpZ-IDqBp4rUjELpd06xoFS9I5z0B_-ika3zrcEr7oAKS9SNhM2FFV2XCcQMYA3HVhYnIolRYON1Hi3wkUUsXUFdwZvze49eMMvYFVtZKfefQndIccg4fxrqw9XW5k9wiylOWkbPJWHehvCnzeCjkSUJ8sk7nDlRtNoPnvkL-vVRop7M8dUP_b-c4aGFx4hepfcdj6hdNtl3M-GCk7uSjaAGt34msqCeg_do7rTDJ0PU2PedDjOuN0FoiGOUJR5EW1Cl3wUN2w14cf5rcq1lDjUPuUkdYlLy_sV1Xz9MqbaEDVqxsIXB956tLKur3r1JwcRIP4KN5xzoXdKdHf1q8nt-sHV_5oAY7g%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we’re up against more than just the DC establishment. We’re up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

**We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! **[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=eb26923284db4e42ab74033f96ca17c1&_e=tK8Cy3rbowjyKiMoV1E60n27sKzXhTeedZTmriRdgSWV_q_nuApWMpZ-IDqBp4rUSnzMOOIenKblBGQAs36l2jr6P9H0W_vf_y1bbN02o1VDssIQBKyDaKAY1ge1-NCkZfEBCIhloPscVo5Eb0bnIyUk2ytn6IYKJypLZjSBXTXprUpDKtKNGo2mVVCHQTtlp_3NuU_n4tNaW4VVCEKfiB9m4jc-zobufgs_5FPClPPuv3rF6jajc8_rlRNQQEflcCHu1Yf83prYgisOhuiDACAGUvV2RtO8syi16y7giqkn8U0UdvQr4ctKgvaeg1DlpD1RK5MjdnZsSrRzbqt9XdM4gidf8YvEsHFHWnZ-gnAa9waIo7IcVSnhbEpMbRfmoecqLcpGjx53HWBB8mHiwg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Washington’s a different kind of warzone—high stakes, relentless battles, and no shortage of enemies. But I’m no stranger to tough fights. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we’re up against more than just the DC establishment. We’re up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! → If the media wants to attack us for having a “warrior mentality” – the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... → If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump’s MAGA movement – the movement that says we can make America great... → If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste – which has been exposed by Trump’s DOGE department... ...Then they don’t understand WHY Donald J. | | Trump and Republicans in Washington have made their priorities crystal clear – and their budget proves it. It slashes Medicaid and the ACA, ripping health care from millions. It guts food assistance programs that help families put meals on the table. It hands billions in tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy while working families struggle with rising costs. This plan isn't about responsibility – it's about rewarding the rich and punishing the rest of us. I'm working in the Senate to stop their irresponsible budget plan because I believe government should work for the people, not the ultra-wealthy and well-connected. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Catching up and checking in (survey)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
It’s been a while since you last heard from me, Peter.
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
**It’s been a while since you last heard from me, so I wanted to take some time today to catch up and check in about what’s on your mind right now.**
Back in early January, I told you that I was called to return to active duty for a few months. That meant I had to step away from Heartland Patriots for a while. But now, I’m off duty for the summer and I’m ready to make the most of it.
Before I get to all the serious stuff, here’s my biggest personal update:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/hp-survey-june25?t=1&akid=8994%2E614464%2EkfKpvd)
**Marilyn and I welcomed our newest little addition to the Kunce family back in April.** Everyone is healthy and doing well. Marilyn even graduated with her master’s degree a few weeks later! I’m always in awe of her strength, determination, and resilience.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/hp-survey-june25?t=2&akid=8994%2E614464%2EkfKpvd)
**It’s probably no surprise to you that most things that have happened in our country since January aren’t nearly as good or exciting.**
Elon Musk, the richest man in the world, disrupted the lives of millions of Americans by slashing funds for critical services and unjustly firing tens of thousands of federal workers.
Control-obsessed politicians at both the state and federal levels have continued their attacks on reproductive freedom — all while actively stripping away resources from mothers, children, and their families.
And most recently, House Republicans proudly passed a tax bill that would line the pockets of billionaire elites at the expense of actual working people. They’re even threatening health coverage and food security for millions of Americans with deep cuts to Medicaid and SNAP.
**And it’s all happening while acts of blatant corruption unfold in front of our very eyes.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/hp-survey-june25?t=3&akid=8994%2E614464%2EkfKpvd)
**Today, I’m not asking you for a donation _but I am asking for your input._**
What has been on your mind over the last few months? How have you and your loved ones been impacted by the actions of the elites in charge of our country right now? If it were up to you, how would we best fight back in this moment? And what are some of the most important qualities you’re looking for in candidates you’re choosing to support right now?
**I want to hear whatever you’ll tell me, Peter.[So please, will you take just a few moments today to share your thoughts with me in this short survey?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/hp-survey-june25?t=4&akid=8994%2E614464%2EkfKpvd)**
**[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/hp-survey-june25?t=5&akid=8994%2E614464%2EkfKpvd)**
I’m so grateful that you’re part of this movement, Peter, and I can’t wait to see what we’ll accomplish together over the next cycle and beyond.
Now let’s get to work,
— Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hp-email-footer?refcode=em20250609-8994-footer&t=6&refcode2=8994_614464_kfKpvd&akid=8994%2E614464%2EkfKpvd)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_heartland-patriots/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_heartland_patriots/?t=7&akid=8994%2E614464%2EkfKpvd). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

**[Which is why I’m giving away 500 of my new Dash Eagle cameras at below wholesale cost](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21565/6374453/999fb4d0451f6ab4299824abca6832a74af4f6a9/51e342dc40563fdebbc9219ec460cfce1cdc92cc)** Every time you hit the road, you’ll have an HD dashboard camera to record everything that happens on the road, and inside your vehicle... And you’ll never have to worry about not having any proof to back your case in court. It installs in just seconds and you can charge it in your car while simultaneously recording... But like I said... name: Marc Elias
subject: We're suing Donald Trump. -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Marc Elias. **I beat Donald Trump 64 times in court. And now, working with the DSCC,_I'll beat him again._**

[**Before I tell you more, will you chip in $5 to the DSCC to help power the work to stop Trump's allies and take back the Senate majority? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250609-MarcElias-EliasSuingTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250609-MarcElias-EliasSuingTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=20448%2E9716520%2EQjmkGj)

Right now, Donald Trump is attacking our longstanding values and principles. He's ignoring due process, flaunting anti-corruption laws, and, worst of all, **attacking our democracy and voting rights -- the very bedrock of American society.**

It's disgusting, but not surprising from the guy who claimed he wanted to be a dictator on his first day in office.

That's where my team and the DSCC come in -- the very moment Trump signed an executive order to interfere in our elections and threaten the rights of voters, we _immediately_ filed suit against him on behalf of Democrats across the nation. And we've already notched some key victories in the case!

**But the fight isn't over.** We all know that Trump and his allies will keep trying to break American democracy. We can't let them, so we need ALL Democrats -- from leaders like Barack and Michelle Obama to supporters like you -- working together.

Right now, Donald Trump is attacking our longstanding values and principles. He's ignoring due process, flaunting anti-corruption laws, and, worst of all, attacking our democracy and voting rights -- the very bedrock of American society. It's disgusting, but not surprising from the guy who claimed he wanted to be a dictator on his first day in office. That's where my team and the DSCC come in -- the very moment Trump signed an executive order to interfere in our elections and threaten the rights of voters, we immediately filed suit against him on behalf of Democrats across the nation. And we've already notched some key victories in the case! But the fight isn't over. We all know that Trump and his allies will keep trying to break American democracy. We can't let them, so we need ALL Democrats -- from leaders like Barack and Michelle Obama to supporters like you -- working together. So I'm asking for your help as we work to stop Trump, take back the Senate, and defend democracy: We need your help to fight for the Senate. name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: 🚨 Future Forward’s warning just dropped
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

I hate to bother you right at the beginning of summer, but I have nowhere else to turn.
My race looks more and more competitive by the day.

House Majority PAC and the DCCC are setting fundraising records month over month and Democrats are targeting traditionally red districts like ours.

And now we’ve got something even bigger to worry about:

Future Forward PAC, the same Soros-linked super PAC that spent over $900 million trying to elect Kamala Harris just showed their cards.

They said, and I quote:

“The best way to stop Donald Trump at the federal level is to win control of the House of Representatives in 2026.”

Make no mistake, that means flipping districts like this one.

I know what you might be thinking: Dan’s district is safe. Trump won it by more than 15 points.

But here’s the truth:

✅The DCCC has already announced they’re targeting districts just like this one.
✅A poll just showed a Democrat could win Texas’ Senate seat for the 1st time in 33 years.
✅And now Future Forward is bringing its massive war chest to the battlefield.

We can’t afford to play it safe. We can’t afford to come up short. Not now. Not with this much on the line.

[Please make a contribution to help me DEFEND this Texas district and protect our Republican House majority.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

[CONTRIBUTE $25 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=25)

[CONTRIBUTE $50 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=50)

[CONTRIBUTE $75 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=75)

[CONTRIBUTE $100 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=100)

[CONTRIBUTE $250 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=250)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=other)

I’ve said it before – if Democrats take the House, they won’t waste a second.

There will be no border security. No tax relief. No push to restore American strength.

Just impeachment hearings, partisan witch hunts, and an all-out war on President Trump’s agenda.

This is about more than defending our district, it’s about defending our Republican majority, our America First movement, and our mission.

And Peter, I need your help if we’re going to be successful mounting this defense.

[So please make a contribution to help me DEFEND this Texas district and protect our Republican House majority.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

In Service

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Dan Crenshaw

[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/CrenshawforCongress/)
[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/dancrenshawtx/)

No longer want to receive these emails? [Unsubscribe](https://manage.kmail-lists.com/subscriptions/unsubscribe?a=S4BaSF&c=01J1QTVQWPYECZHVSD48W6BZXF&k=d7a252b5a9aa2f11f013663142d1414b&m=01JXAND3CW14RQ03YR8BQ4PKXG&r=01JXANR5QFZC3JRXQNR47J0WJ7).
Team Crenshaw, 12645 Memorial Drive, STE F1, Box 211, Houston, TX 77024

body:
| | | | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsGRA_J6jtCqYTGf9TBARmggSPVbT9acGv-q3fuGkH5fpWKqqPlmD81G2Ja6cSXR_GQGr7irGGwY2TUsaA4tbOwnS_oVl-SCOjaRBBb7gBAOG9Z_D2-VrUhbjSbtGz2uvmTKXFvDLwhRYcRs4h08kxXwl01Nz0CAIMKY7P5YDhVK-ByCuBo-3rTH7cneIHa6EkZZTCakkUIlOT4r34aeV5AfwUvHqXTGTQ2ayYcwvNxlFPq8I87cuKI6GSOlPFK3yzbKbF8a1pKjLwvT22nBIHyFr4hJTTN-LpLYh3KugDOOmCfvxYp6FGE6vuSt2Y-J__v2dMI2bJhBgTAgizKra3HgTnAYNctLyNaja-x05-L7e2Wgl7V5TlXolgLRTLYxhiafPb4xQ6-2p4iCXycmP6mX16VV6gSUp5_Y2ZsDHpDnQ/4h7/MVAyE_oCT8qb6F8tGSqvjA/h0/h001.7LkETCUPNL63aP7ZilgQskFQvXYOJ9ZLFEjN1xxSCtw)

Members of the Young Democrats of America,

**[We’re writing to invite you to a DNC Youth Council Town Hall on Zoom on Tuesday, June 10th, at 8 pm ET/5 pm PT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8mtmcNzKQC09X_h8wcUXhK-ID21_EHLkUCdjwD8KRpKEZTvx14F1ovwzUyAaWS84eoHostMvVXuE3Y5PxW3VEA9f9K-a0TClqbBVsfMxkTjXMUt_qM5SkDlV9e4_kceQasEhgsxQG8qqLWLbV0Tec583i0O5WGaKv_P05Q87mY49yxyg9IrBvBGdJhk-LHUaZkJDQBztmTcp5DiOLxIFr0vZCCG49SjNYVx6x83HMWG7dU19xprq36ZVe4prMgu70Jy9LDnOzXyNvA86qSYPKkN-pv_5GZg_rw6wMDhXj35IzhY3O1jinzuvr6tqRn7-GS1zupozY9MI8QQPxIZlCFL56ww109ijkNoZyQK_PzPlA2lR0bVzKftDdcxGt_uNO2JEl_zlcNulnDBeNsSqECNxRUO5TxrX5afEADY87xtdE/4h7/MVAyE_oCT8qb6F8tGSqvjA/h1/h001.0MKAlqDytaqU2D19AQGTnR75KCJYooQIQhfqFKOkW9c).**

This conversation will focus on the DNC Credentials challenge, which could unseat two of our sitting DNC Vice Chairs and the only two young people among our DNC officers: Malcolm Kenyatta and David Hogg.

Many of you know the ongoing challenge, and we know you have questions. This town hall will offer a space for you to hear more about the process, ask questions directly, and share your perspectives with members of the Youth Council who will be voting on this challenge this week.

This is a pivotal moment for young leadership in the Democratic Party, and your voice matters. We hope you’ll join us,

_DNC Youth Council

_
| **_**The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. This town hall will offer a space for you to hear more about the process, ask questions directly, and share your perspectives with members of the Youth Council who will be voting on this challenge this week. subject: Korean Breakthrough Reduced Wrinkles By 48%
body:
That’s right - by almost HALF!

| Hey Friend, A new breakthrough from Korea can reduce crow’s feet, sagging, and crepey skin by 48%. That’s right - by almost HALF! In a groundbreaking study using high-definition 3D skin scans... Women saw their wrinkles literally disappear before their eyes. No expensive creams or painful injections. The reason it works so well is because it activates the key cells in your skin that produce ALL your collagen, elastin and hyaluronic acid. It turns out, while creams can give short-term, surface level results... They never truly fix the root cause of wrinkles, sagging, or crepey skin. No wonder 8 out of 10 women say they are left wanting more from their creams. Ivy League dermatologist, Dr. Mara Weinstein explains how this new Korean breakthrough works: **[Try this Korean “younger skin” method at home in just 30 seconds](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgv72v5qg5l224472v3k8kl3liv0efakei9fqvn8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ie9oj0c5h2bs)** If you want skin that looks 10 to 15 years younger, try this today. Tracey Colone from Rainbow City, Alabama said: “Wow, I cannot believe what a difference this has made in reducing the visibility of my wrinkles and firming up the skin on my neck, too... the woman at the grocery store told me I look amazing. That really made my day!”

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood is trying to turn our children against us
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgfc20g6kd837bj0jfolvj7csunueeg8scp9ts7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ie9oj4clh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zijqkrf65gf5vhj47vvcd6b1d8k6tjg78re1nkig_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ie9oj4clh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0smuc7lfvvg2d0m8ld42q7r12canfien00hj1t0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ie9oj4clh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zs9vnbel36j1ashh9k4g6h7eksupdtkgfevjilbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ie9oj4clh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvlt3oi0on1liasbkoqf35t57u2u2qke9drcjin8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ie9oj4clh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvefre638lmum5ca7tb9lnl0eeb6umj1b2is6va8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ie9oj4clh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zs83mupg80ha9ogf4f8aegjctvo85vlfdihffll0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ie9oj4clh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zor8kekbq92fvp1b4rjb5fg6hnmiheb1ch9eck1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s5ie9oj4clh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

---

## **ATTACK ON THE HOMELAND!**
