name: Citizens Alliance New Hampshire
subject: 🚨 Urgent: Call Governor Ayotte to Support the Parental Rights Package!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS ALLIANCE OF NEW HAMPSHIRE]()
body:
We need your help to make history in New Hampshire!

| | | | |
---
| | | | [|
---](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=8f3942413a&e=8c8e704ee6)
| Peter,

_**We need your help to make history in New Hampshire!**_

The Parental Rights Package —**a groundbreaking set of seven bills** — has passed the General Court and now awaits Governor Kelly Ayotte’s signature to become law.

This landmark package of legislation **strengthens the fundamental rights of parents to guide their children’s upbringing, education, healthcare, and more** , cementing New Hampshire’s place as a leader in liberty and family sovereignty.
---
[|
---](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=817120ebf0&e=8c8e704ee6)
| [CALL GOV. KELLY AYOTTE NOW >>>](tel:6032712121)
---
| **Here’s how these bills empower parents:

** ✅ **HB10 & SB72**: Establish a Parental Bill of Rights, securing your authority over your child’s care, custody, education, and medical treatment.

✅ **HB446** : Requires parental notice and opt-in consent for non-academic surveys in schools.

✅ **HB273** : Grants access to your child’s library records for full transparency.

✅ **SB96** : Ensures school staff disclose critical information about your child’s mental, emotional, or physical health.

✅ **HB361** : Prohibits mandatory mask policies in schools, protecting your medical decision-making rights.

✅ **HB324** : Shields kids from obscene or harmful sexual materials in schools.

**Governor Ayotte has the chance to stand with New Hampshire families and sign this package into law — but she needs to hear from YOU!**
**TAKE ACTION NOW!

📞 **[**Call Governor Kelly Ayotte**](tel:6032712121) and encourage her to sign the Parental Rights Package into law! Let her know that you support all seven bills (HB10, SB72, HB446, HB273, SB96, HB361, and HB324).
Your voice can make the difference in ensuring parents—not government—remain in charge of raising our children.

Act today to help New Hampshire lead the nation in defending liberty and family rights!

For New Hampshire,
---
[|
---](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=24983d194f&e=8c8e704ee6)
| Daniel Gray
Executive Director
Citizens Alliance of New Hampshire

---
| [JOIN CITIZENS ALLIANCE OF NEW HAMPSHIRE TODAY!](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=363b4a98e7&e=8c8e704ee6)

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: History made.
body:
Fellow American, great news: 50% of Americans say our country is on the ‘right track’! But here’s the bad news............If Chuck Schumer, Elizabeth Warren, and Bernie Sanders take control of the Senate, Trump will have no way to pass his America First agenda. |
---
💥 TEAM GRAHAM FLASH POLL 💥
Fellow American, great news:

**A majority of Americans say our country is on the ‘right track'!** With President Trump in the White House and Republican majorities in Congress, Americans are more optimistic than ever.

name: Pineapple on Behalf of Updates For Great Americans
subject: Korean Breakthrough Reduced Wrinkles By 48%
body:
That’s right - by almost HALF!

| Hey Friend, A new breakthrough from Korea can reduce crow’s feet, sagging, and crepey skin by 48%. That’s right - by almost HALF! In a groundbreaking study using high-definition 3D skin scans... Women saw their wrinkles literally disappear before their eyes. No expensive creams or painful injections. The reason it works so well is because it activates the key cells in your skin that produce ALL your collagen, elastin and hyaluronic acid. It turns out, while creams can give short-term, surface level results... They never truly fix the root cause of wrinkles, sagging, or crepey skin. No wonder 8 out of 10 women say they are left wanting more from their creams. Ivy League dermatologist, Dr. Mara Weinstein explains how this new Korean breakthrough works: **[Try this Korean “younger skin” method at home in just 30 seconds](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6mabdpqb1h496s95ar1g8okpsb00g4c3h1kmhog_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slg60p36c9h2bs)** If you want skin that looks 10 to 15 years younger, try this today. Tracey Colone from Rainbow City, Alabama said: “Wow, I cannot believe what a difference this has made in reducing the visibility of my wrinkles and firming up the skin on my neck, too... the woman at the grocery store told me I look amazing. That really made my day!”
---

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z86qnfc4lf11k6smvndn392r3n9c29dpegoc96lg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slg60p36cdh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfa4fnohphl517g3jkjd1c598ob3gogeplan0emg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slg60p36cdh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi5rk6d3v2lqkcsmjm7ojbnspevfrgumrjrv04do_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slg60p36cdh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjpu38jsc5hhdg36nc1f7v833lof4jqec5pukvjg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slg60p36cdh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0c50qncm3uhgop4hqa1b9jfhltgjtguqdre4348_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slg60p36cdh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---

**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**

The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvtcmoclbsg0opqfes1j096fojsj475mrv7ceq70_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slg60p36cdh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

Every day in the Senate, I get asked the same question: **what can we do to rein in the chaos of the Trump administration?**

Folks in Virginia and all over the country are dog-tired of his constant corruption:
* Trump planned a $45 million military parade – _on the taxpayer’s dime_ – on his birthday
* He continues to push his “big, beautiful bill” through Congress, which would make the largest cuts to Medicaid in history to fund tax breaks for the richest Americans
* He pardoned a former corrupt Virginia sheriff who was _convicted_ of taking _75 thousand dollars_ worth of bribes
* He and his family have monetized the presidency in a way we’ve never seen, even going so far as to open a club in Washington and charging $500,000 apiece to join
* Oh, and he _still_ hasn’t fired Pete Hegseth

The blatant graft and open corruption of this administration is beyond belief. Yet somehow, my Republican colleagues in Congress can’t seem to find their voices. They continue to put their loyalty to Trump above their constituents.

**My point is, as challenging and chaotic as this administration has been, my silent Republican colleagues prove a point: if we want to hold Trump accountable for these egregious acts and move our country forward, Democrats have to take back the Senate.**

[_**That’s why I’m asking if you’ll pitch in to my reelection campaign to protect my seat and take back the Senate. Donald Trump and his billionaire allies will spend whatever it takes to defeat me so they can expand their majority, so I’m counting on committed supporters like you stepping up Dear Peter,
---
Heartbreaking images are coming out of Los Angeles right now. The city has been hijacked by lawless agitators who flout the law, destroy property, and assault law enforcement. All of this stems from a disregard for the laws of our country and a backlash against the overwhelming majority of the electorate who voted for secure borders and a return to prioritizing American citizens. This past weekend, we celebrated the 5-year anniversary of Let Us Worship in Los Angeles — His timing is _PERFECT_! Let Us Worship held revival in Los Angeles (which we planned MONTHS in advance) just as rioting exploded and vandalism erupted. From the beginning, God has been faithful to send us _exactly where_ we are needed, _exactly when_ we are needed, and this past weekend was NO DIFFERENT! _Watch some highlights of the revival at the link below!_
---

Sean

# [When Did I Know I Was Going to Lose?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=165277250&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1Mjc3MjUwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDk0ODY4MzQsImV4cCI6MTc1MjA3ODgzNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.mUyP6pyLePVPev0249SeQXNc0skdaOAR90BtsFbYvhg)
### The moment I knew Democrats were really in trouble and how to avoid it in 2026
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---
| Jun 9
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=165277250&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1Mjc3MjUwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0OTQ4NjgzNCwiZXhwIjoxNzUyMDc4ODM0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTg2Nzc0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vnlZVEMLQNpM-AHr0taXN_MPJzf-ypbZ4rZjNIgJY_o&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=165277250&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1Mjc3MjUwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDk0ODY4MzQsImV4cCI6MTc1MjA3ODgzNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.mUyP6pyLePVPev0249SeQXNc0skdaOAR90BtsFbYvhg&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=165277250&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1Mjc3MjUwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDk0ODY4MzQsImV4cCI6MTc1MjA3ODgzNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.mUyP6pyLePVPev0249SeQXNc0skdaOAR90BtsFbYvhg)

| | [](https://substack..VI-7erVAKKMORpcpw_7_Jw5GEAXEw-Y0ERGbV0i_82c?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/lucaskunce/p/when-did-i-know-i-was-going-to-lose?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

In the midst of the current chaos, and staring down some of the worst legislation in history, it's more important than ever to look back at the last election for some clues as to what happened. After all, this messy Trump-Musk coalition that we are watching break up was always messy, and the pro-corporate pro-billionaire legislation is basically just what they always promised to do. And we still lost to them.
We can't let that happen again.
Sometimes, people ask me at what point I knew I was going to lose my senate election against Josh Hawley. I remember the exact moment, so today I'll tell you about it along with some insight into why that was the moment of realization for me (this will include information on why polling is so all over the place).
Even more importantly, I'll talk about an earlier moment in the campaign when I knew Democrats as a whole were in trouble, and how we can avoid the mistakes of the past going forward.
Before I dive in, I just want to say thank you for everyone who follows this substack and especially everyone who shares it and supports financially. It's very difficult financially for a normal person to run in these elections like I did (back to back) and your willingness to support those of us who put it all on the line is the only way we can continue to do it.
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.eC2oR8L06oFi2t4AzhzuxmEihZyX6qFTmNR4vsGopDY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=165277250)
Obviously, my election was an uphill battle. My home state is red and Donald Trump was on the ticket. But I always believed I had a chance to win. The incumbent was uniquely unpopular and unlikeable in a way that we knew we would outperform the top of the ticket. We just didn't know by how much for two reasons: (1) we didn't know what the money would look like and (2) Trump voters overwhelmingly wanted a Trump ally in the Senate, so we needed a good national year for Democrats if we didn't have the money advantage.
The money was important because, as you can see below, Democrats overperforming the presidential ticket in red states directly correlates to the D:R spending ratio. Yes, your donations really do make a difference.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/da72090e-3715-4628-84d5-187f0e464841?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As you can see here, Democrats overperforming the presidential ticket in red states directly correlates to the D:R spending ratio. Your donations and support to candidates in red states really do make a difference.
Unfortunately, by the end of October it became clear that Josh and his Super PAC would be able to spend significantly more money than us. We were outspent on the airwaves, and we were only able to compete in four of Missouri's ten media markets.
We knew early on that with a spending advantage we could outperform the top of the ticket by between 10 and 15%, depending on the size of that spending advantage. Even without that, we knew that, since the incumbent was weak, we could outperform the top of the ticket by 4-10% on just the strength, rather than the volume, of my message. So we could still win depending on the performance of the national ticket.
I held out hope through election night that Harris could keep it closer than she did.
One of the reasons we were still hopeful until election night has to do with polling. Polling isn't as random as people think it is. What happens in Missouri, where people don't register by party, is that pollsters call a bunch of people, who then self-report as independent, Republican, Democrat, Trump-Voter, Kamala-Voter, whatever the pollster asks. Then they ask them the poll questions.
Once they have all the raw data, the pollster "balances" the poll. This means that they estimate what percentage of the electorate will be D/R/Ind, or what percentage will be Trump/Kamala, and use that as an anchor point for all of the down-ballot races. So, for example, if they used the Cook report rating benchmark of Missouri being a +11 Republican state, out of all the people who picked up the phone or answered texts or emails, they would build a final poll population that was +11 Republican (often using Trump/Kamala as a proxy for D/R), and then the down-ballot races like the US Senate race would shake out using that adjusting polling population (not the raw numbers from everyone who answered).
Because of this, polls that used the standard Cook benchmark for Missouri showed us within mid-single digits (since we were outperforming Kamala by 5-10% depending on the poll), some of which put us within the margin of error. This meant we could still be in the race despite being outspent as long as the Cook projections or others weren't too far off.
Of course, they weren't.
The moment I saw the first couple batches of election returns come in on election night (which ironically showed us ahead or close and created hope for a lot of people), I knew that I had lost. Kamala was performing significantly worse in those areas than needed her to. And despite doing better than her in those initial returns, it wasn't by a large enough margin to overcome what clearly was going to be a terrible night for her in Missouri, and what ended up being a terrible night for Democrats across the country.
There was just no way to overcome that kind of negative national performance, which we saw in senate races across the country. Democratic senate candidates in red states outperformed the presidential ticket by quite a lot, and we all still lost.
So how did we get here?
When you're running a senate race, your focus is very heavily on your own state and your opponent, so I didn't have a lot of time to think about the national picture or what national polling or issues were like outside of Missouri. But there was a moment, a couple of months before the election, where I really worried that it was going to be a bad year.
It wasn't the Trump assassination attempt, one of the conventions, a debate, a gaffe, or anything like that.
It was the moment that Dick Cheney endorsed Kamala Harris and, rather than wholeheartedly reject that endorsement, her team embraced it and then started _bragging_ about it.
Our country is in the midst of a decade long political revolution centered on everyday people lashing out against the institutions and systems that they believe are broken and corrupt. Over and over again on the campaign trail I heard from all types of people how mad they are at the system, how it's failed them, and how the people in control are all the same regardless of party. I heard about it in heavily right leaning veterans groups. I heard about it in heavily left leaning black community meetings. Everywhere. The parties are the same. Politicians are the same. They are all colluding to sell us all out for their own power. They stand for nothing but themselves.
And, in the midst of this, the Democratic Presidential candidate proved exactly that: by warmly embracing an endorsement from the embodiment of evil, Dick Cheney. Like, come on guys. There are plenty of Republicans you can brag about without going full on evil. But it almost seemed like they thought "the more evil the better."
Tim Walz awkwardly tried to explain the endorsement to Jon Stewart on the Daily Show by claiming that it gave Republicans and libertarians a "permission structure" to cross over.
Folks, Dick Cheney had a 13% approval rating when he left office.
I'm all about permission structures. I [have written about them, and we built our campaign on them](https://substack.com/redirect/b29e5587-c0bb-458d-8554-e701b02c4252?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). But the only permission this endorsement gave people was permission to confirm that the Democratic Party's presidential ticket is exactly what Fox News had been telling them it was for months: the ticket of the uni-party that had been screwing them for the last few decades.
A lot of guys I know and work with are long-time George Bush neo-cons. Do you know what they have to say about the Iraq War and all the things they used to love if you ask them now? "God-damn neo-cons. Ruined America."
Not even the neo-cons like neo-cons anymore!
And people who are persuadable are looking for something different.
Yet all they saw with the Democratic Party was more of the same. A nominee anointed by the insider donor class embracing uni-party politics. It was 2016 all over again.
I get the irony here. And it hurts even more when you look at the greatest-transfer-of-wealth-in-American-history bill making its way through Congress right now.
But our job isn't to point out hypocrisy (that's actually the opposite of building permission structure, [which I go deeper into here](https://substack.com/redirect/b29e5587-c0bb-458d-8554-e701b02c4252?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), our job is to do better in future elections.
With every potential future Dick Cheney endorsement, that should be an "F no, that guy can go to hell for destroying America" type response.
Which brings me to something that worries me even more deeply: the so-called "abundance agenda" that I keep hearing about.
First of all, the concept is confusing. It's hard to understand what the "abundance agenda" means even after you read a little bit about it, which raises red flags for the average person. Red flags that are _already_ triggered by the fairy-tale like name of "abundance agenda." It feels fake.
Also, to the average viewer, the "deregulation" and "rising tide will raise all boats" aspects feel a lot like a re-run of bad policy that they don't want to watch again. Reagan-omics. Trickle down theory. Supply side economics. Etc.
The thing is, I get the idea that regulation can be bad. I worked in procurement at the Pentagon, where regulations were used by industry to block out small and innovative companies and steal from the taxpayer. So the concept that regulation can serve the opposite of its intended purpose is not foreign to me.
But the "abundance agenda" sounds as uni-party as anything has ever sounded.
And in a time when the guys in power are claiming to raise all boats by transferring vast amounts of wealth upward through tax breaks for the corporations and the mega-rich, I really think that Democrats are giving away the massive advantage we have been handed if we embrace the "abundance agenda," as it is currently packaged, as the central theme of the Democratic platform. That doesn't mean it's right or wrong policy-wise, just that I believe, based on my experience running in a red state that was a bell-weather ten years ago, that it's not going to be an electoral winner.
Democrats have a real opportunity to shift the narrative. Frankly, the Republicans are doing it for us by doing exactly what they said they were going to do and exposing themselves as the same as they ever were. And now is not the time to give up the advantage by adopting a liberal-think-tank branded variation of the same thing.
One of the things we found in our campaign testing was that, when in doubt, the best thing to do was to lean on corruption and anti-corporate messaging. Identify the villain, and hammer away. That's how you capitalize on an advantage. It's how we swung key rural and exurban areas [10+ points in our favor ](https://substack.com/redirect/262ff996-3ecc-4cc7-82d7-1f9ee68a24a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)despite being outspent in them. And it's likely the key to Democratic electoral success over the next few years.
As always, please share this with anyone you think might be interested in it! Thank you all for everything!
Lucas

The moment I knew Democrats were really in trouble and how to avoid it in 2026 | | | Jun 9 | | | | | | | | | | | | In the midst of the current chaos, and staring down some of the worst legislation in history, it's more important than ever to look back at the last election for some clues as to what happened. After all, this messy Trump-Musk coalition that we are watching break up was always messy, and the pro-corporate pro-billionaire legislation is basically just what they always promised to do. And we still lost to them. We can't let that happen again. Sometimes, people ask me at what point I knew I was going to lose my senate election against Josh Hawley. I remember the exact moment, so today I'll tell you about it along with some insight into why that was the moment of realization for me (this will include information on why polling is so all over the place). Even more importantly, I'll talk about an earlier moment in the campaign when I knew Democrats as a whole were in trouble, and how we can avoid the mistakes of the past going forward. Before I dive in, I just want to say thank you for everyone who follows this substack and especially everyone who shares it and supports financially. It's very difficult financially for a normal person to run in these elections like I did (back to back) and your willingness to support those of us who put it all on the line is the only way we can continue to do it. Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. Obviously, my election was an uphill battle. My home state is red and Donald Trump was on the ticket. But I always believed I had a chance to win. The incumbent was uniquely unpopular and unlikeable in a way that we knew we would outperform the top of the ticket. We just didn't know by how much for two reasons: (1) we didn't know what the money would look like and (2) Trump voters overwhelmingly wanted a Trump ally in the Senate, so we needed a good national year for Democrats if we didn't have the money advantage. The money was important because, as you can see below, Democrats overperforming the presidential ticket in red states directly correlates to the D:R spending ratio. Yes, your donations really do make a difference. | | ---|---|--- As you can see here, Democrats overperforming the presidential ticket in red states directly correlates to the D:R spending ratio. Your donations and support to candidates in red states really do make a difference. Unfortunately, by the end of October it became clear that Josh and his Super PAC would be able to spend significantly more money than us. We were outspent on the airwaves, and we were only able to compete in four of Missouri's ten media markets. We knew early on that with a spending advantage we could outperform the top of the ticket by between 10 and 15%, depending on the size of that spending advantage. Even without that, we knew that, since the incumbent was weak, we could outperform the top of the ticket by 4-10% on just the strength, rather than the volume, of my message. So we could still win depending on the performance of the national ticket. I held out hope through election night that Harris could keep it closer than she did. One of the reasons we were still hopeful until election night has to do with polling. Polling isn't as random as people think it is. What happens in Missouri, where people don't register by party, is that pollsters call a bunch of people, who then self-report as independent, Republican, Democrat, Trump-Voter, Kamala-Voter, whatever the pollster asks. Then they ask them the poll questions. Once they have all the raw data, the pollster "balances" the poll. This means that they estimate what percentage of the electorate will be D/R/Ind, or what percentage will be Trump/Kamala, and use that as an anchor point for all of the down-ballot races. So, for example, if they used the Cook report rating benchmark of Missouri being a +11 Republican state, out of all the people who picked up the phone or answered texts or emails, they would build a final poll population that was +11 Republican (often using Trump/Kamala as a proxy for D/R), and then the down-ballot races like the US Senate race would shake out using that adjusting polling population (not the raw numbers from everyone who answered). Because of this, polls that used the standard Cook benchmark for Missouri showed us within mid-single digits (since we were outperforming Kamala by 5-10% depending on the poll), some of which put us within the margin of error. This meant we could still be in the race despite being outspent as long as the Cook projections or others weren't too far off. Of course, they weren't. The moment I saw the first couple batches of election returns come in on election night (which ironically showed us ahead or close and created hope for a lot of people), I knew that I had lost. Kamala was performing significantly worse in those areas than needed her to. And despite doing better than her in those initial returns, it wasn't by a large enough margin to overcome what clearly was going to be a terrible night for her in Missouri, and what ended up being a terrible night for Democrats across the country. There was just no way to overcome that kind of negative national performance, which we saw in senate races across the country. Democratic senate candidates in red states outperformed the presidential ticket by quite a lot, and we all still lost. So how did we get here? When you're running a senate race, your focus is very heavily on your own state and your opponent, so I didn't have a lot of time to think about the national picture or what national polling or issues were like outside of Missouri. But there was a moment, a couple of months before the election, where I really worried that it was going to be a bad year. It wasn't the Trump assassination attempt, one of the conventions, a debate, a gaffe, or anything like that. It was the moment that Dick Cheney endorsed Kamala Harris and, rather than wholeheartedly reject that endorsement, her team embraced it and then started bragging about it. Our country is in the midst of a decade long political revolution centered on everyday people lashing out against the institutions and systems that they believe are broken and corrupt. Over and over again on the campaign trail I heard from all types of people how mad they are at the system, how it's failed them, and how the people in control are all the same regardless of party. I heard about it in heavily right leaning veterans groups. I heard about it in heavily left leaning black community meetings. Everywhere. The parties are the same. Politicians are the same. They are all colluding to sell us all out for their own power. They stand for nothing but themselves. And, in the midst of this, the Democratic Presidential candidate proved exactly that: by warmly embracing an endorsement from the embodiment of evil, Dick Cheney. Like, come on guys. There are plenty of Republicans you can brag about without going full on evil. But it almost seemed like they thought "the more evil the better." Tim Walz awkwardly tried to explain the endorsement to Jon Stewart on the Daily Show by claiming that it gave Republicans and libertarians a "permission structure" to cross over. Folks, Dick Cheney had a 13% approval rating when he left office. I'm all about permission structures. I . But the only permission this endorsement gave people was permission to confirm that the Democratic Party's presidential ticket is exactly what Fox News had been telling them it was for months: the ticket of the uni-party that had been screwing them for the last few decades. A lot of guys I know and work with are long-time George Bush neo-cons. Do you know what they have to say about the Iraq War and all the things they used to love if you ask them now? "God-damn neo-cons. Ruined America." Not even the neo-cons like neo-cons anymore! And people who are persuadable are looking for something different. Yet all they saw with the Democratic Party was more of the same. A nominee anointed by the insider donor class embracing uni-party politics. It was 2016 all over again. I get the irony here. And it hurts even more when you look at the greatest-transfer-of-wealth-in-American-history bill making its way through Congress right now. But our job isn't to point out hypocrisy (that's actually the opposite of building permission structure, ), our job is to do better in future elections. With every potential future Dick Cheney endorsement, that should be an "F no, that guy can go to hell for destroying America" type response. Which brings me to something that worries me even more deeply: the so-called "abundance agenda" that I keep hearing about. First of all, the concept is confusing. It's hard to understand what the "abundance agenda" means even after you read a little bit about it, which raises red flags for the average person. Red flags that are already triggered by the fairy-tale like name of "abundance agenda." It feels fake. Also, to the average viewer, the "deregulation" and "rising tide will raise all boats" aspects feel a lot like a re-run of bad policy that they don't want to watch again. Reagan-omics. Trickle down theory. Supply side economics. Etc. The thing is, I get the idea that regulation can be bad. I worked in procurement at the Pentagon, where regulations were used by industry to block out small and innovative companies and steal from the taxpayer. So the concept that regulation can serve the opposite of its intended purpose is not foreign to me. But the "abundance agenda" sounds as uni-party as anything has ever sounded. And in a time when the guys in power are claiming to raise all boats by transferring vast amounts of wealth upward through tax breaks for the corporations and the mega-rich, I really think that Democrats are giving away the massive advantage we have been handed if we embrace the "abundance agenda," as it is currently packaged, as the central theme of the Democratic platform. That doesn't mean it's right or wrong policy-wise, just that I believe, based on my experience running in a red state that was a bell-weather ten years ago, that it's not going to be an electoral winner. Democrats have a real opportunity to shift the narrative. Frankly, the Republicans are doing it for us by doing exactly what they said they were going to do and exposing themselves as the same as they ever were. And now is not the time to give up the advantage by adopting a liberal-think-tank branded variation of the same thing. One of the things we found in our campaign testing was that, when in doubt, the best thing to do was to lean on corruption and anti-corporate messaging. Identify the villain, and hammer away. That's how you capitalize on an advantage. It's how we swung key rural and exurban areas being outspent in them. And it's likely the key to Democratic electoral success over the next few years. As always, please share this with anyone you think might be interested in it! Thank you all for everything! Lucas Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Lucas Kunce P.O. Box 1240, Independence, MO 64050 ? ?

body:
I thought we had something special.

|
---
| | | Dearest Friend...

I'm sitting here in the darkness, surrounded by the shadows of what could have been.

The weight of disappointment is crushing me, and I'm struggling to find the words to express the pain I'm feeling.

Your House GOP membership... _it's expiring_.

And I'm left wondering... _what went wrong?_

You were a dedicated House GOP Member for 4 years. Please tell me that this isn't the end.

We thought we had something special. We thought we were fighting for the same values, the same ideals. But now, it seems like you're just... gone.

Time is running out. Please, I beg of you... don't let our House Majority fade away. Renew your membership now, and let's rekindle the flame that once burned so brightly.

**[Please, renew your House GOP Membership today!](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zr2535eshob05o3boem9d9jt6hi7en0knraskm40_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slg68o34cth2bs "Please, renew your House GOP Membership today!")** **It 's the last time I'll ask. **

body:

clean_body: Did you miss this, Peter? Our team pored over the NRSC patriot files for Republicans in your area to select a representative to formally participate in the and YOU were a clear choice. However, we can't seem to locate your response. Peter, if we don't know where a TOP supporter like you stands, it will be impossible to ensure the GOP platform reflects the values of real conservatives across the country. We can't overstate just how meaningful your participation in this Assessment is. We weren't able to send the Policy Assessment to every Republican, so your selection to represent your area means your response carries 10x more impact. Thank you, NRSC HQ | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

We’re so excited to share that Senator Cory Booker has joined Team Bennet!
Cory knows that Michael stands for what’s right—and that he’ll help make Colorado stronger, more equal, and more just.
Hear what Cory has to say about Michael, then consider chipping in a few bucks. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2_cabreel?refcode=X_250609_corybookerreel_act]

body:
I wanted to reach out with an update on our progress pushing back against Trump’s attacks on working families and defending the people of Oregon.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109268719/550540388/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTVkZDgzMC01MjQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwiPcMNK43MA2RaYD8jv6ccz_3hK79K5PGSvHUD5LZM=) Team, I wanted to reach out with an update on our progress pushing back against Trump’s agenda and fighting for the people of Oregon. **[In a moment I’ll explain how I've been fighting back and delivering for Oregon’s working families, but if you don’t have time, I would appreciate if you could chip in $10 and help keep me in Congress fighting for you and your family. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109268720/550540389/1012014768?refcode=email_060925_recap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTVkZDgzMC01MjQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwiPcMNK43MA2RaYD8jv6ccz_3hK79K5PGSvHUD5LZM=)** | | **[CHIP IN →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109268721/550540390/1012014768?refcode=email_060925_recap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTVkZDgzMC01MjQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwiPcMNK43MA2RaYD8jv6ccz_3hK79K5PGSvHUD5LZM=)**
---
I’ve spent the past month doing everything in my power to oppose House Republicans’ cruel plan to steal millions of hardworking Americans’ Medicaid and SNAP benefits to pay for Donald Trump’s billionaire tax break.
I fought their budget bill in committee, voted NO on the House floor, and even turned to this grassroots team to dial up the pressure on Congress to reject any cuts to these critical programs.
But to me, no matter how bad things are, leadership has to go beyond simply saying “No” to things. So I also kept up the work to tackle real problems facing my community. I’ve introduced bills to provide disaster relief for farmworkers, accelerate America's wildfire readiness, create a new scholarship program for students entering behavioral health programs, _and there’s even more to come._
I promise to always keep up this fight for Oregon, because team, _I refuse to give up when the stakes are this high._
**But with National Republicans eyeing OR-06 to replace me with a rubber stamp for Trump’s agenda, I’m turning to this grassroots team to back me up:[Please, can I count on you to chip in $10 to help me hold the line for Oregon’s working families in Congress? They’ve come close to flipping this seat twice, and they won’t hesitate to come at me again to expand their House majority. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109268722/550540391/1012014768?refcode=email_060925_recap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTVkZDgzMC01MjQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwiPcMNK43MA2RaYD8jv6ccz_3hK79K5PGSvHUD5LZM=)**

clean_body: I wanted to reach out with an update on our progress pushing back against Trump’s attacks on working families and defending the people of Oregon. = Team, I wanted to reach out with an update on our progress pushing back against Trump’s agenda and fighting for the people of Oregon. = | | = I’ve spent the past month doing everything in my power to oppose House Republicans’ cruel plan to steal millions of hardworking Americans’ Medicaid and SNAP benefits to pay for Donald Trump’s billionaire tax break. I fought their budget bill in committee, voted NO on the House floor, and even turned to this grassroots team to dial up the pressure on Congress to reject any cuts to these critical programs. But to me, no matter how bad things are, leadership has to go beyond simply saying “No” to things. So I also kept up the work to tackle real problems facing my community. I’ve introduced bills to provide disaster relief for farmworkers, accelerate America's wildfire readiness, create a new scholarship program for students entering behavioral health programs, and there’s even more to come. I promise to always keep up this fight for Oregon, because team, I refuse to give up when the stakes are this high. But with National Republicans eyeing OR-06 to replace me with a rubber stamp for Trump’s agenda, I’m turning to this grassroots team to back me up:= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for standing with me, -Andrea | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. ## 2025 Legislative Awards
---
| Congratulations to the Greater Georgia Legislative Leadership Award Recipients. Thank you to everyone who supported our event and a special thank you to the award winners for their incredible service to the state of Georgia.
The State Senate award recipients were Senators Matt Brass who was awarded for his role on the Rules Committee advancing the Senate's agenda, Ben Watson for ending woke gender surgeries and protecting our children, Drew Echols for his essential work for hurricane relief and aid to agribusiness, and Randy Robertson for his efforts protecting the sanctity of life.
State House award recipients included Speaker Pro Tem Jan Jones for her incredible improvements to our education system and championing at-risk students, Representatives Will Wade who was awarded for his historic investments in police, EMS, and all first responders, Martin Momtahan for safeguarding and securing Georgia's elections, and Lehman Franklin for his work protecting IVF and ensuring every Georgian can start a family.

| Statewide Education Tour on Tort Reform
---
| |
---
| In partnership with the Savannah Area Chamber of Commerce, we continued our Statewide Education Tour in Savannah with a panel discussion on tort reform. Thank you Senator Ben Watson, Whip James Burchett, and Rep. Carl Gilliard for breaking down how these bills will lower costs for job creators and insurance ratepayers.
If you missed us in Dekalb or Savannah, there are still plenty of opportunities to catch our Statewide Tour! Greater Georgia is on the frontlines of voter education - engaging directly with communities to hear their concerns and share conservative solutions that create opportunity.
[Join us](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JhYKuhIDLdfN1gUGgHK-sRjgOsb-DZHkw0n-zffELqpdNW6IbQ-hiudgZja5_UgA6D9CX-JJCo_734yD3CCx3XK6oHpVqxvDGqqsGKPg0QFHAiR4lXuUrS62Qtcqsr37XRVOFZHAkpvpASXg33BHWJrf-xZj95pRNIy_3DLB2FndPZFcNBE6su6ENmkM4tLFH9WemFOzy47y3yye77vrNGNbXM7SD5vIr3C5X17WacGzCosSgiYS-uX0bOkowLoLrK9tOpX6ioeSDX4qfKlJdEg9Vqz8odTfuaUIysiQweMDzZicVjzPhA==&c=-eVEX_tM27gP-5w4IOV3L8j8ySSqUEMUMq7g7OWv2Gfb2z6Pf4iBBQ==&ch=KVmSm3DBAmY815rhANVYvWurEbjmxLpV2L9vJxZPcJLoI0l4tq8P4g==) on June 11th at the Greater Macon Chamber of Commerce at 8:00AM for our next stop with President Pro Tem John Kennedy.

clean_body: Your Voice Matters! Vote by June 17 and Make a Difference. | | | | | == | | | Greater Georgia Newsletter June 9, 2025 | STOP! We can't continue this newsletter without reminding you to VOTE in the June 17 Special Statewide Primary for Public Service Commission. Less than 0.5% of voters have cast a ballot to date. Don't let another day go by without voting! Find your voting location below. | | == | == | Now, back to our regular programming! | | | 2025 Legislative Awards | Congratulations to the Greater Georgia Legislative Leadership Award Recipients. Thank you to everyone who supported our event and a special thank you to the award winners for their incredible service to the state of Georgia. The State Senate award recipients were Senators Matt Brass who was awarded for his role on the Rules Committee advancing the Senate's agenda, Ben Watson for ending woke gender surgeries and protecting our children, Drew Echols for his essential work for hurricane relief and aid to agribusiness, and Randy Robertson for his efforts protecting the sanctity of life. State House award recipients included Speaker Pro Tem Jan Jones for her incredible improvements to our education system and championing at-risk students, Representatives Will Wade who was awarded for his historic investments in police, EMS, and all first responders, Martin Momtahan for safeguarding and securing Georgia's elections, and Lehman Franklin for his work protecting IVF and ensuring every Georgian can start a family. | == | == | | | Statewide Education Tour on Tort Reform | | | In partnership with the Savannah Area Chamber of Commerce, we continued our Statewide Education Tour in Savannah with a panel discussion on tort reform. Thank you Senator Ben Watson, Whip James Burchett, and Rep. Carl Gilliard for breaking down how these bills will lower costs for job creators and insurance ratepayers. If you missed us in Dekalb or Savannah, there are still plenty of opportunities to catch our Statewide Tour! Greater Georgia is on the frontlines of voter education - engaging directly with communities to hear their concerns and share conservative solutions that create opportunity. == on June 11th at the Greater Macon Chamber of Commerce at 8:00AM for our next stop with President Pro Tem John Kennedy. | == | | | | | More from This Month | | | | | | | A special thank you to all who attended our training session at the Georgia Republican Party Convention in Dalton, GA to learn how we can build a Greater Georgia through registration, education, and mobilization! | | | Get Involved! | With Special Elections occurring this summer, there's always something you can do to help conservatives vote and get elected. You can sign up to knock doors, hold registration drives, or help with our many events across the state. Use the link below to sign up and let us know how you can help build a Greater Georgia! | | == | | | In the News | == Greater Georgia's founder and Small Business Administration Administrator Kelly Loeffler discuses D.O.G.E. cuts. ==: Greater Georgia's tort reform education tour continues with Savannah event. == Representative Lehman Franklin recognized for receiving Greater Georgia legislative award == Governor Kemp Issuing Special tax refund checks of up to $500 | | | | == | | | To learn more, visit ==, and follow along on ==, ==, and == to stay up to date with the latest information. | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. Look, I have a reputation as a straight shooter, so I won’t lie to you: Things are bleak. Every day, I see a new story about Trump firing employees, trying to cut taxes for his far-right buddies, or attacking our allies.
But what grinds my gears ***even more*** is how Republicans are in lockstep with everything he does. This guy is RIPPING UP the Constitution as we speak, and they’re just giving him a “Get Out of Jail Free” card. _WTF?!_
That’s not leadership. That’s a whole load of BS, and we can’t stand for that.
Donald Trump and his cronies want you to tune out. He wants you to see all the bad $#!# he’s doing and disconnect.
**I’m not gonna let Donald Trump win, and neither should you. We’ve gotta fight like hell to push back against this buffoon’s extremism — because it’s clear his Republican friends won’t.**
**[That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you please donate $10 to help take back the Senate majority from Donald Trump? Derek,
Ever since the disastrous _Citizens United_ ruling, secret, dark money and super PACs have infiltrated campaigns, letting powerful corporations and special interests have more control over our elections than voters.
Super PACs can accept unlimited amounts in contributions and can spend just as much to influence the outcome of federal elections through independent political activities like TV ads and rallies. And they don’t have to disclose where the money came from until long after votes are counted!
This has resulted in large corporations and the ultra-wealthy pouring millions of dollars into super PACs in order to support certain candidates and sway our elections.
**Corporate power doesn’t just happen—it’s enabled by pliable politicians and a Supreme Court that signs off on unlimited super PAC money.**
Americans deserve to know that their elected officials are working for _them_ —not for billionaires and corporations.
**We can’t keep letting dark money groups upend our democracy. That’s why Chris Deluzio is leading the fight in Congress to BAN super PACs and restore Americans’ trust in government—and he needs your support, Derek.**
[_**Stand with Chris—sign his petition today urging Congress to ban super PACs and return power to the people →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109269076/550542009/-780568121?refcode=email_060925_ban-superpacs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjAyMGQyYS01MzQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IrJwx4VIxiDmoef4rVP-RtNlbfgzqwh_umY0LmdwEf0=&emci=3e14abf6-4345-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2b020d2a-5345-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13185894)
| [Sign The Petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109269078/550542012/-780568121?refcode=email_060925_ban-superpacs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjAyMGQyYS01MzQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IrJwx4VIxiDmoef4rVP-RtNlbfgzqwh_umY0LmdwEf0=&emci=3e14abf6-4345-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2b020d2a-5345-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13185894)

subject: Tell Congress: Say NO to Trump's budget proposal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
We'll keep this brief
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109269106/550542047/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTAyMGQyYS01MzQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SDxY7xKMLj7nNtRAfYxwkK0wyHL9ln9svKZVeTAwujk=&emci=e0edf62a-5342-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=25020d2a-5345-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek, we'll keep this brief. Here are a few things you need to know about Donald Trump's "One Big Beautiful Bill Act” which congressional Republicans pushed through the House:
→ It will **SLASH** Medicaid, leaving millions of Americans without healthcare coverage by 2034.

→ It will **DEFUND** medical research to find cures and treatments for cancer, infectious diseases, and more.

→ It will **DISMANTLE** our national park system, wiping out more than 300 of our beloved national park sites.
These are just a few of the extreme cuts – and it's all to help pay for tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy 1%. That’s why Chrissy joined every single Democrat in the House, including those in districts won by Trump, in voting against this reckless and dangerous bill.

**Chrissy is trying to kill this bill. She joined a 22-hour marathon to stop the bill from advancing. She tried to get her Republican colleagues to vote no (we only need three!). And she’s asking you to call on Sen. Fetterman and Sen. McCormick to encourage them to vote no, too. **
**Derek – right now, she's counting on YOU to stand with her. **So please, will you take a minute to add your name to our petition?
**[Tell Congress: Say NO to Trump's Budget Proposal >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109269107/550542049/196726005?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1129-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTAyMGQyYS01MzQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SDxY7xKMLj7nNtRAfYxwkK0wyHL9ln9svKZVeTAwujk=&emci=e0edf62a-5342-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=25020d2a-5345-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=21278485)**

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Trump’s Latest Threat: Turn the U.S. Military on Us: Stop him NOW
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [ Don't let Trump use the military to wage war on the American people](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b863631-f48a-4a42-9519-fb60ccca792c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c097f76-cde0-4bbf-be81-850a94124446/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump is threatening to use active-duty troops against Americans, right here in the US. It's unprecedented, and with good reason -- troops are for defending the nation from our enemies -- not waging war on our own people. **[We cannot pretend this is normal, and we cannot allow Trump to order our own fellow Americans to be attacked or killed to serve his political purposes, and lift him onto the slippery slope to dictatorship.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc77b88d0-1a4a-4a7b-b81f-24e3644df359/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** We must stop him, and we must demand that Congress and the courts stand strong against him -- and do whatever they can to remove him from office asap. Our armed forces take an oath to defend our nation, and our Constitution, not act as the personal playthings of a horrible president who wants to be an even more horrible dictator. [**_Add your name, and demand that Trump be stopped from using the military to wage war on the American people._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T78d7b42c-1d9f-48ff-908a-633f8c685ebf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: One PA
subject: Elon & Donald’s Big Beautiful Breakup
disclaimer_text: Paid for by One Pennsylvania
body:
Awkward. We’re witnessing a big beautiful breakup of billionaire besties Donald Trump and Elon Musk. You think it’d be good news but this just shows that the ultra-wealthy are playing right in our faces. | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109269681/550544018/1507790650?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20250609_fr_breakup_team_oc_act_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2OWExOWMyLTUzNDUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=apuqXRaLJuiFjmmfunSy5sP3IsOdKbOptuKzhIbX388=)
---
Awkward. | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109269682/550544019/1507790650?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20250609_fr_breakup_team_oc_act_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2OWExOWMyLTUzNDUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=apuqXRaLJuiFjmmfunSy5sP3IsOdKbOptuKzhIbX388=)
---
We’re witnessing a big beautiful breakup of billionaire besties Donald Trump and Elon Musk. You think it’d be good news but this just shows that the ultra-wealthy are playing right in our faces.
Elon is screaming the quiet part out loud: **the unrepentant superrich dump money into elections to buy politicians and control policy. There is a word for this kind of system and it's not Democracy. It’s oligarchy.**
After decimating our federal agencies and firing thousands of public servants, Elon announced his exit from Trump’s Administration to focus on his flailing government-assisted companies like Tesla and SpaceX.
**We know why we hate the big GOP reconciliation bill.** It guts Medicaid, SNAP benefits, and other life-saving programs for hundreds of thousands of Americans to give the rich more tax breaks.
**Why does Elon hate the bill?** After extracting lucrative government incentives for his own personal gain for years, he’s lashing out for more. Parts of the bill would cut electric vehicle tax cuts that Tesla relies on. That’s also why we are seeing Tesla stock crash right now.
Republicans are split in this breakup between Trump and Musk - they don’t agree on which petulant billionaire to ride with. But what definitely is not in question is the Republican devotion to make the rich richer. **The root problem remains, we need to stamp out big money in politics.**
Time and again the unrepentant super rich fight to stay wealthy while the rest of us struggle to get by with stagnant wages and an exponentially rising costs of living. In history, when the many have been pushed into a corner, the only thing left for us to do is organize and fight.
We won’t mince words. The work towards liberation — to fight and protect our rights — is not easy and it’s not quick. We organize all year round because the long-lasting systemic change we seek needs sustained all year round power.
**Our opposition wants to tire us out, to subdue us into accepting the status quo, to be so isolated in our grind for survival that we won’t tap into the innate power we have, when we take action together, to win.**
_**[So, join us in taking a moment to enjoy the big breakup, and then if you’re tired of bickering billionaires taking over, join us in fighting back. Our organizing work is powered and sustained by grassroots donations — ultimately the one thing we can truly rely on — so please, Peter, give any amount to building PA people power.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109269683/550544020/1507790650?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20250609_fr_breakup_team_oc_act_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2OWExOWMyLTUzNDUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=apuqXRaLJuiFjmmfunSy5sP3IsOdKbOptuKzhIbX388=)**_

subject: We will call this what it is - abuse
body:

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=3554955529864ab08403e044977be925&_e=G9615M01m5lV6ZoJr-yH05SGF7-0JIoOhHo5ugPyFfWnd8MR1s4e0a67borsTzNc0yoTx5NspPH7-0aNcvZczno7CIAMzrnF8JLDjx_0vALpbN5k_-xgQ24GXD9rTkivj2L9LUqrhk1pmgyeIvK_LLUOI1vm_lzgWB1i4NCWsLi4N5XTNVH0eYvEb2IZUjCi4D8uctYGKmogk8aYXrVEIi5RfpU0K7p4eQUQasOc0mfRx_4RZQHXd3qnjQUY1nY9RG3-8TrGMC63DKjwOJjN532ESPR92sm2H1i-onF2mcpPvsfcs9oGKEwZ5qB41db2tjhR2Svjb8p-8WDGZG9AQnpjjziQO97MnhaabC8J9Qg%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I need you to take AMAC Action’s PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM right now.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=3554955529864ab08403e044977be925&_e=G9615M01m5lV6ZoJr-yH05SGF7-0JIoOhHo5ugPyFfWnd8MR1s4e0a67borsTzNc0yoTx5NspPH7-0aNcvZczno7CIAMzrnF8JLDjx_0vALpbN5k_-xgQ24GXD9rTkivj2L9LUqrhk1pmgyeIvK_LLUOI1vm_lzgWB1i4NCWsLi4N5XTNVH0eYvEb2IZUjCi82vRJx9YwZs_GRXC6knseGm7ag5t52m-ar0xb8Wy4tYtjvOFP1JwtYtE8IwwzciYM5jL8aS5aqX0p7MCjQyjcOgCN0CwsjHqfuEq-C1ehnmpe_cFTaNPyiRfvgNpeieXfVenz0uQ3UTKwBxGtNvSAi4pfYxXXeXnTk7OCM39Ut4%3D)** Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the **false narrative** that the majority of Americans **_are backing the radical transgender movement and_** **_want to block President Trump’s executive orders._** This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.**But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children.** This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found **_“High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”..._**
---
_“Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)”_
---
Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations:
---
* “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”.
* “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.”
* 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care.

---
As a senior how do you feel about their findings? _Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?__**_Or_**_**...****Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults _WHO ARE_ right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls?** _Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?”_** __Or_ ..._****Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,_and be injured by,_ a biological male?** _Are you worried that_ 38% _of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_**__Or_ ..._****** **Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?****I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children.** **And that’s why I need your immediate response:[Take your AMAC Action PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM _right now_ to stand with conservative seniors who want to protect America’s children _._](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=3554955529864ab08403e044977be925&_e=G9615M01m5lV6ZoJr-yH05SGF7-0JIoOhHo5ugPyFfWnd8MR1s4e0a67borsTzNc0yoTx5NspPH7-0aNcvZczno7CIAMzrnF8JLDjx_0vALpbN5k_-xgQ24GXD9rTkivj2L9LUqrhk1pmgyeIvK_LLUOI1vm_lzgWB1i4NCWsLi4N5XTNVH0eYvEb2IZUjCi3PVCQtVs7nWDETxUSmzMVfnLmOQcqWLBIuzXfKGm6bKB9hLj81SU3M_rq7xQv0yrSM1IK2jMfjX_mU7C8kx5oTLCZXUHYFN5n4aTk8zlqMzDZZfolwm86rWaymkE36EM-HY64pB_fia2-MQZefENUazQ8qk-C9x052BOtBMNLNE%3D)**
---
[ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=3554955529864ab08403e044977be925&_e=G9615M01m5lV6ZoJr-yH05SGF7-0JIoOhHo5ugPyFfWnd8MR1s4e0a67borsTzNc0yoTx5NspPH7-0aNcvZczno7CIAMzrnF8JLDjx_0vALpbN5k_-xgQ24GXD9rTkivj2L9LUqrhk1pmgyeIvK_LLUOI1vm_lzgWB1i4NCWsLi4N5XTNVH0eYvEb2IZUjCiXgmYfKulDoKVgvWnpd0ZSS_dtErpM3Si9UVcp3Jk8jWeNS-HzvkoRaRBeBNi1BrPLNG9gnq7TPxwx08Hv49uhIG-AwSmZzahM7G6J4uRyAr2V7tCojMl2UdpzSyj4pt-vCcj-bLPjb3CDoHtcDK9igNyciDCcwJ-jMytWiTNYjY%3D)
---
**My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. **** ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. **With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. subject: Trump’s $45 Million Parade – Let’s Give Him a Birthday He’ll Never Forget

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1011&refcode=email-20250609_v&akid=8724%2E5885482%2EXCHu6n ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Trump’s latest vanity project — his birthday tank parade on June 14th —
has now ballooned to a jaw-dropping $45 million dollars. While communities
across America struggle with hunger, crushing medical debt, and crumbling
infrastructure, Donald Trump plans to spend tens of millions on a parade
for himself.

The latest touch? A birthday serenade from the crowd:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29367?source=email-20250609&t=1060&akid=8724%2E5885482%2EXCHu6n ]Headline: Trump parade planner expects crowd to serenade president for
his birthday

But here's the good news: our massive grassroots resistance is quickly
growing. Across all 50 states and the District of Columbia, over 1,400 "No
Kings Day" events – including dozens led by Our Revolution – are preparing
to spoil Trump’s costly vanity spectacle.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250609nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8724%2E5885482%2EXCHu6n ]We’re ready to rain on Trump's parade, but we need your support now more
than ever. Can you chip in $5 today to fuel Our Revolution's nationwide
organizing efforts and send a clear message that the American people won't
tolerate Trump's authoritarianism?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250609nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8724%2E5885482%2EXCHu6n ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250609nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8724%2E5885482%2EXCHu6n ]CHIP IN $22

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250609nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8724%2E5885482%2EXCHu6n ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250609nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8724%2E5885482%2EXCHu6n ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

On June 14th, Trump wants the nation to stand in awe of him and his
celebration featuring tanks, fighter jets, and military armaments – all
designed to stroke his ego.

Instead, we’re going to rise up, push back, and flood the streets with
peaceful demonstrations from coast to coast.

It’s EXACTLY the gift Trump doesn’t want. But successful protests don’t
organize themselves. Supplies, materials, and transportation cost money.
And as a grassroots movement, Our Revolution relies on donations from
everyday people, just like you — not corporations or billionaires — to
fund our critical work.

If each one of us contributes what we can, we have the power to turn
Trump’s lavish celebration into the kind of mass mobilization he hates
most: people-powered democracy in action. We’re ready to ruin Trump's $45
million ego parade with something priceless – unity, solidarity, and the
strength of the progressive movement.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250609nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8724%2E5885482%2EXCHu6n ]We have just a few days left to make this massive. Can you rush a donation
to help Our Revolution shut down Trump’s shameful extravaganza with the
only birthday gift he truly deserves: the people’s resistance?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution
