name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: They couldn’t cancel this...
body:
I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this.

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2052xzpi8s0z7hp1anztjhx8cvvsfzaxm8m6nt1jglk6zf25em5e93rdglulzk0qix68p3p5ka1gjtwo4f9&__stmp=sxln2h&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
\- This tour went somewhere no one thought we’d reach - The Left’s strongholds are crumbling - This generation is choosing freedom - The comeback is happening — and YOU made it possible - This wasn’t just noise... - Packed crowds. Roaring students. The Left? Speechless. - We’re beating the Left. On their turf.

| | | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=clt64yr0wtq4qf66g4zsv8nq5s5q7ywi69yhj7i0b2u2uch6hzrvqgtrh4fmrrn3w2u549xxdlzrzxy1gj6fyi8y2e9jqsgwdg3qkb8p3y1mqknlxscn9vm3y12lnrgs9rhoyx57cqcn21iojzs8ar367lanybusi31lpbsr58digxe8q0wys2ev13z5v2wly2lcu3tc1a6niqo8qhq0ndf9w70kti5oqvm72dodxb47p8trcnh5cq0w4yal6ccvg4a90v43g5f&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxln2h&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this. Because I’ve never had this much good news to share. And I’ve never felt this much urgency to say one thing: **THANK YOU.** I don’t know if you’ve ever felt something just... _shift..._ while it was happening... But this spring on the American Comeback Tour? **I did.** And if you were standing where I stood — listening to the crowd roar before I walked up to the “Prove Me Wrong” table at our Spring Finale at UC Riverside... You would’ve felt this generational shift in real time, too.
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=clt64yr0wtq4qf66g4zsv8nq5s5q7ywi6n4xdn86hp7jd0aamvsb15tve975bplt3y9my07ysp1nou2j11wcp14xqtmaqyjefvsowev1tjl8n4myr43axvmnzrdxn7etq9r5vq5z45lh6k6jj1xuoxuxiifmr3o56m5jwrn4xya0f68cgflz85f5azft05cd76gk87zluk3011exegs7vv6gpo6lsc178c0bkar2k8k728bx4ysp7ldw1h1or0byei072izmljs&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxln2h&__onlt=h)
---
You may have seen the photos from the tour... caught some of the videos... read about the chants of _“USA!”_ from students... But let me tell you exactly what happened this spring: **Patriots like you helped launch the most powerful Conservative campus tour in American history.** It was BOLD. It was LOUD. And it was PACKED... From beginning to end. **And the American Comeback Tour’s Spring FINALE was in a place no one thought we’d ever touch: California.** The same state where Leftist professors shut down free speech... where mobs scream in the faces of our students... where conservative ideas aren’t just unpopular — _they’re punishable offenses._ And yet... We filled the campus quad at UC Riverside. Students came early. Packed shoulder-to-shoulder. Ringing around the “Prove Me Wrong” tent to hear the truth. And when I walked on stage and said: “It’s okay to love America...” They ERUPTED.
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=clt64yr0wtq4qf66g4zsv8nq5s5q7ywi6oynxqwp1zjelmu5brtgzstzbpx0lozgz60s3cfz4cr71qve75kz360wc6nrqf10h8fm6hfbi9j67m998dt1jvmvags7mlcuv2kks762tj9rngtuirce0dk1xfk97t5fst9hd55g20w4dcb9nzqa08feo7let8iuemc5kng907la5b8l6fuqdmwr6tp0rvj22id8gxtqmee6d8jcuj1wbxuvl3pbzmabdzo55m6u5bz&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxln2h&__onlt=h)
---
It wasn’t just another great tour stop... **It was a BREAKTHROUGH.** Because this wasn’t the first stop in California this spring — it was the fourth IN MAY and the SIXTH of the tour. And each one was just as powerful... This wasn’t just another campus tour. _It was a line in the sand._ And every single time, the story was the same: The Left tried to dismiss us, hurl their obscenities, or shut us down... The students showed up anyway. And the truth rang out louder than ever before. _But let’s back up for a moment..._ Because while the California finale may have been the last stop of the Spring, this all started months ago. **Back in January, when we were laying out the calendar... These were the goals: Go BIGGER. Go BOLDER. Go DEEPER into Leftist territory.** We wanted to hit not just the battleground states... Not just the safe “Red” states... _But the ones the Left claimed as their own._ And then? We wanted to plant our flag. And because of patriots like you — that’s exactly what we did. **Let me give you the big picture:** ✅ 21 American Comeback Tour stops ✅ Overflow crowds with thousands of students ✅ Deep “Blue” states seeing young people rising up ✅ The Left rattled by a movement of young people who are rejecting them... _wholesale._ Students who had never once heard a Conservative speak in person... _finally heard one._ Students who were afraid to wear a cross or sport an American flag... _were loud, proud, and unashamed to stand for God and their country._ Students who were told they were alone... _realized they were part of something BIGGER than they ever imagined._ There are too many great stories, moments and pictures to pack into this one message... **But just look at what we're accomplishing:**
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=clt64yr0wtq4qf66g4zsv8nq5s5q7ywi6q41rtiv7kza7wnz4nv09dtdytki9no86bdxxtrzf3f2cn0zpmovfmiw1ho6ql48ik67el4qmxh43s7i2qgr9vmdc94fmdavziudp06thaulsce3hfi1akptmd37lgltcapfjh0vuqs8cn5desfaengqle63ko2mpqxpas0uttiomobowewxl1jllyv1qpeij3tdcuvbzoy6s95hj7ye779vinc2hwzecqa37zbbntc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxln2h&__onlt=h)
---
_Friend, this is why we fight..._ Not just for campus speeches. Not just for questions from students. **But for a generation-wide cultural reset — playing out in real time, in real places, in the hearts of real students.** This is why the American Comeback Tour matters. And I hope you know:**It wouldn’t exist without patriots like****YOU****.** Your support — your prayers, your belief in our students, your generous gifts — made all of this possible. Patriots like you put us on the road. You brought us onto these campuses. You sent us to the students who needed to hear our America First message the most. **You weren’t just watching this tour... You were powering it.** Now, let me be totally honest: _We’re not done. Not even close._ The American Comeback Tour may have just ended for the spring... But this summer? We’re preparing for something even BIGGER. We’re already mapping out new stops in the fall. New states. New targets in Leftist territory to break through. We’re building a plan to take this movement to the next level — to complete the cultural shift that started on this tour. To reach more students. To change more hearts and minds. **And raise up the boldest, most unapologetic generation of freedom-loving Americans since the founding of this country.** _I’m going to need you fighting alongside me, Friend._ Because now that we’ve tasted victory... now that we’ve seen what’s possible... We can’t back down. Not now. _Not ever._ Let’s keep building. Let’s keep pushing. Let’s keep GOING. The American Comeback is well underway. Let’s make sure it keeps rolling strong. **I can’t say “thank you” enough to the patriots like you who’ve helped make Turning Point USA the force it is today.** **Together, we’re SAVING America... one student at a time.**
---

clean_body: I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this. \- This tour went somewhere no one thought we’d reach - The Left’s strongholds are crumbling - This generation is choosing freedom - The comeback is happening — and YOU made it possible - This wasn’t just noise... - Packed crowds. Roaring students. The Left? Speechless. - We’re beating the Left. On their turf. | | | Friend, I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this. Because I’ve never had this much good news to share. And I’ve never felt this much urgency to say one thing: THANK YOU. I don’t know if you’ve ever felt something just... shift... while it was happening... But this spring on the American Comeback Tour? I did. And if you were standing where I stood — listening to the crowd roar before I walked up to the “Prove Me Wrong” table at our Spring Finale at UC Riverside... You would’ve felt this generational shift in real time, too. You may have seen the photos from the tour... caught some of the videos... read about the chants of “USA!” from students... But let me tell you exactly what happened this spring: Patriots like you helped launch the most powerful Conservative campus tour in American history. It was BOLD. It was LOUD. And it was PACKED... From beginning to end. And the American Comeback Tour’s Spring FINALE was in a place no one thought we’d ever touch: California. The same state where Leftist professors shut down free speech... where mobs scream in the faces of our students... where conservative ideas aren’t just unpopular — they’re punishable offenses. And yet... We filled the campus quad at UC Riverside. Students came early. Packed shoulder-to-shoulder. Ringing around the “Prove Me Wrong” tent to hear the truth. And when I walked on stage and said: “It’s okay to love America...” They ERUPTED. It wasn’t just another great tour stop... It was a BREAKTHROUGH. Because this wasn’t the first stop in California this spring — it was the fourth IN MAY and the SIXTH of the tour. And each one was just as powerful... This wasn’t just another campus tour. It was a line in the sand. And every single time, the story was the same: The Left tried to dismiss us, hurl their obscenities, or shut us down... The students showed up anyway. And the truth rang out louder than ever before. But let’s back up for a moment... Because while the California finale may have been the last stop of the Spring, this all started months ago. Back in January, when we were laying out the calendar... These were the goals: Go BIGGER. Go BOLDER. Go DEEPER into Leftist territory. We wanted to hit not just the battleground states... Not just the safe “Red” states... But the ones the Left claimed as their own. And then? We wanted to plant our flag. And because of patriots like you — that’s exactly what we did. Let me give you the big picture: ✅ 21 American Comeback Tour stops ✅ Overflow crowds with thousands of students ✅ Deep “Blue” states seeing young people rising up ✅ The Left rattled by a movement of young people who are rejecting them... wholesale. Students who had never once heard a Conservative speak in person... finally heard one. Students who were afraid to wear a cross or sport an American flag... were loud, proud, and unashamed to stand for God and their country. Students who were told they were alone... realized they were part of something BIGGER than they ever imagined. There are too many great stories, moments and pictures to pack into this one message... But just look at what we're accomplishing: Friend, this is why we fight... Not just for campus speeches. Not just for questions from students. But for a generation-wide cultural reset — playing out in real time, in real places, in the hearts of real students. This is why the American Comeback Tour matters. And I hope you know:It wouldn’t exist without patriots likeYOU. Your support — your prayers, your belief in our students, your generous gifts — made all of this possible. Patriots like you put us on the road. You brought us onto these campuses. You sent us to the students who needed to hear our America First message the most. You weren’t just watching this tour... You were powering it. Now, let me be totally honest: We’re not done. Not even close. The American Comeback Tour may have just ended for the spring... But this summer? We’re preparing for something even BIGGER. We’re already mapping out new stops in the fall. New states. New targets in Leftist territory to break through. We’re building a plan to take this movement to the next level — to complete the cultural shift that started on this tour. To reach more students. To change more hearts and minds. And raise up the boldest, most unapologetic generation of freedom-loving Americans since the founding of this country. I’m going to need you fighting alongside me, Friend. Because now that we’ve tasted victory... now that we’ve seen what’s possible... We can’t back down. Not now. Not ever. Let’s keep building. Let’s keep pushing. Let’s keep GOING. The American Comeback is well underway. Let’s make sure it keeps rolling strong. I can’t say “thank you” enough to the patriots like you who’ve helped make Turning Point USA the force it is today. Together, we’re SAVING America... one student at a time. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA P.S. I’ve been doing this for over a decade now, Friend... But I’ve never seen momentum like THIS. These students are ready. They’re hungry for the truth and our ideas. This country is shifting — In a way you can genuinely FEEL. And the Left is terrified. You can see it in their mobs... The way they lash out at us and our students... But it’s not working anymore. Because you and I are reaching the next generation — campus by campus, state by state, student by student. And that’s why I’m asking you to stand with us again today. Because every dollar you give today will be MATCHED. That means your gift of $50 becomes $100... $100 becomes $200... And your impact? DOUBLED. So, if you believe in this mission... If you’re proud of what we’re accomplishing... If you want to go even BIGGER this fall... Then this is your moment to step up and fuel what comes next. Let’s take the American Comeback Tour to every corner of this country when it returns this fall... Let’s train thousands of students this summer at our events to become the LEADERS we need for our America First movement... Peter, I knew this job would keep me on my feet — but I didn’t expect to wear the soles right off my Blundstones! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109271043/550549333/-856240149?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGE1M2U4MC01NzQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fspMXC33ffGWtP-yjQl3MHvoMzVVSZgmeLi1kJXNeK8=) From parades to canvassing to meeting with Vermonters across the state, these boots have carried me through countless conversations about the issues that matter most. And just like I’m sending them out to be re-soled, **I’m also gearing up to keep fighting for working families, labor rights, and real progress in Congress.** Grassroots supporters like you are the reason I can keep moving forward — meeting voters, amplifying our movement, and standing up to Republicans who want to roll back workplace protections. clean_body: | = Peter, I knew this job would keep me on my feet — but I didn’t expect to wear the soles right off my Blundstones! = From parades to canvassing to meeting with Vermonters across the state, these boots have carried me through countless conversations about the issues that matter most. And just like I’m sending them out to be re-soled, I’m also gearing up to keep fighting for working families, labor rights, and real progress in Congress. Grassroots supporters like you are the reason I can keep moving forward — meeting voters, amplifying our movement, and standing up to Republicans who want to roll back workplace protections. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for being part of this journey — miles and all! — Becca mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. name: Scalise, Steve
subject: Don’t worry – your “GOP membership” is NOT revoked
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| | | Some folks write you emails pretending to be President Trump.

**I won 't do that to you. **

Some folks pretend donations will somehow fund DOGE.

**I prefer to be honest with you.**

This is Steve Scalise. As your House Majority Leader, I work hand and glove with President Trump, and I love what DOGE is doing for our country.

And when I ask you for support, I want to treat you with respect and be transparent about where your money is going.

You are not an ATM. You are a valued member of our MAGA movement. You deserve to be treated that way.

**_[So that's why I 'm dropping into your inbox right now:](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=361406d88bd74f12906cd520f5caaa97&_e=LI2jZTvEcAMtIcpxpylBuToXOkNPOWfOtDje_izd-5wn5rN9eDlRTs1GQv4nnyeIOQ9wCCQgj1wwkbYl6iQYlgflknOHkew8XNBw-r80lDMspFlpIH4NPB2UrQbGq3bUO480bfrkAONVUOA-b40VqApbpRr5JKvms3NM5LmezT78SH7dzb5_8NG9bHNzSBQcg3GbkHXh8zxOnWNf04TcckBcwL0T4ipF4Nnh4jh3k_KPPwezshgGcGQaNuEJHC4xqQ0XytroAK5K-4vjX0OOSXkpzGy0VOtHcl9StiloyM64g923TtebrGzcTaYpphhRSEYZY-Bsg_91kjPHhHHAqRQvFNbYHzxYWsLXGQLlLjvXMrxB9NMqS6smRSFLVN6GBgUqOus2dPuh-GrLB3D1Ew%3D%3D)_**

The Democrat Machine is firing on all cylinders to undermine, stonewall, and sabotage everything President Trump and DOGE are doing to make our government more efficient and cut waste.

Of course, the DC Swamp can't have that.

That's why they're mobilizing the courts, Deep State operatives, and Congressional Democrats to unleash a coordinated political hatchet job against the Trump Administration.

_Democrats are suing him. They 're pushing for partisan investigations. They're firing off hit piece after hit piece in the press. They're introducing legislation to block DOGE's access._

Their plan is simple:
**1.** Attack the Trump Administration
**2.** Drag them into court battles
**3.** Slow them down at every turn
**4.** Use the press to attack their work
**5.** Unload millions to win the Midterms
**6.** Block Trump's ENTIRE legislative agenda
**That 's where House Republicans - and most importantly, YOU - can make a major difference. **

Democrats have already pledged 50 million dollars to win the Midterm elections, take control of Congress, and exploit that power to sabotage EVERYTHING President Trump is doing to save the country. That includes the critical work of DOGE.

Cook Political Report just highlighted EIGHT toss-up districts that will determine who wins the House. If Democrats win even a few seats, it's over. They win the House.

That's why I'm tapping our entire grassroots movement for help.

_**[If you can afford to do so, I 'm imploring you to pitch in a few bucks to save our House Majority - and President Trump's entire legislative agenda along with it.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=361406d88bd74f12906cd520f5caaa97&_e=LI2jZTvEcAMtIcpxpylBuToXOkNPOWfOtDje_izd-5wn5rN9eDlRTs1GQv4nnyeIOQ9wCCQgj1wwkbYl6iQYlgflknOHkew8XNBw-r80lDMspFlpIH4NPB2UrQbGq3bUO480bfrkAONVUOA-b40VqApbpRr5JKvms3NM5LmezT78SH7dzb5_8NG9bHNzSBQcg3GbkHXh8zxOnWNf04TcckBcwL0T4ipF4Nnh4jh3k_KPPwezshgGcGQaNuEJHC4xsDgSPTJDvpa3082Z4WhVGEESM1dfOimAZSPEA23qi3Mr6bVjV7Je9sKGmO8s4v6XaMiSJJHrY09Zs0-lUtO6hdHIB_VQR3OQZDGvPENyu_iyBUl0ASiG_rAATn2bfvCH7cEu8egbMRV3rmEp54UsIw%3D%3D)**___

|

[PLEASE CONTRIBUTE NOW
](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=361406d88bd74f12906cd520f5caaa97&_e=LI2jZTvEcAMtIcpxpylBuToXOkNPOWfOtDje_izd-5wn5rN9eDlRTs1GQv4nnyeIOQ9wCCQgj1wwkbYl6iQYlgflknOHkew8XNBw-r80lDMspFlpIH4NPB2UrQbGq3bUO480bfrkAONVUOA-b40VqApbpRr5JKvms3NM5LmezT78SH7dzb5_8NG9bHNzSBQcg3GbkHXh8zxOnWNf04TcckBcwL0T4ipF4Nnh4jh3k_KPPwezshgGcGQaNuEJHC4xQqwdLaDNYVREUUJICVRk0JqUucueWFR7Fvmll25wcQuS9_mSdAivnVgFLHV0XYCvu2h5xv4vWevC1boHEOATL-idKtQNNZQ7uh_ulHRsVEwo4BxbE0YaiVs7fz3rivlYRaJSDjTnrTcnzM7E-ME3ZA%3D%3D)

This money will go directly to the most important battleground districts in the country so we can win the Midterms and keep delivering on President Trump's MAGA agenda.

If you agree this is a noble cause to support, please consider pitching in right now.

God bless you,

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: Why I’m a fighter for justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate

Folks, it’s Lisa Blunt Rochester. My great-great-great-grandfather was enslaved. After the Civil War, he signed a document finally granting him the right to vote. He signed with an "X" because he had never been taught to read or write. I keep his struggles in mind as I serve the people of Delaware. My ancestors fought hard for their rights – and now I’m fighting hard in the Senate to ensure those rights are protected. I’m committed to defending voting rights, Medicaid and healthcare access, and other fundamental freedoms from the threat of far-right extremists. **I won’t let Republicans in the Senate roll back our hard-earned rights.** But my fight takes a _lot_ of resources, folks – and I need your help so I can keep defending our liberties in the Senate. **Folks, Black women only raise on average _one-third_ of what their white counterparts do when fundraising! But with our rights on the line, we can’t afford to be part of that bleak statistic. ** [**Will you help ensure that I have the resources needed to keep taking on the Trump administration to protect our freedoms and our democracy? Every dollar will help me and my team prepare for our major fundraising deadline at the end of the month, so I appreciate your contribution today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109271225/550550064/-499364019?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.09_Bio_B1_F1_S1_C1_210DONx90DO_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGMxZjFjOC01NzQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aLZI1MoNHjjCOP7g_hSft5FxAT6xMRBbl7duCFGAcPQ=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ****[CHIP IN $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109271226/550550066/-499364019?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.09_Bio_B1_F1_S1_C1_210DONx90DO_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGMxZjFjOC01NzQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aLZI1MoNHjjCOP7g_hSft5FxAT6xMRBbl7duCFGAcPQ=)****

name: Nancy Northup
subject: ⚠️URGENT ACTION: Protect patients
body:
Repealing the FACE Act puts our clients in danger | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109271731/550552074/1126318745?sourceid=1150747&utm_campaign=25emeus-0601aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmVjZWRlZi01OTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HpPJoUKpqGTGhy7dS4mKll47rBkcJJGMh7vijw1UlGw=&emci=8662b22c-4f45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cbecedef-5945-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)
---
Dear Peter,

We warned you this was coming—and now it's here. Tomorrow morning, the House Judiciary Committee will debate repealing the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act, the only federal law protecting patients and providers from threats, harassment, and violence. | [**TELL YOUR REPS: NO REPEAL**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109271732/550552075/734415106?sourceid=1150747&utm_campaign=25emeus-0601aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmVjZWRlZi01OTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HpPJoUKpqGTGhy7dS4mKll47rBkcJJGMh7vijw1UlGw=&emci=8662b22c-4f45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cbecedef-5945-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237 "TELL YOUR REPS: NO REPEAL")
---
[**Without the FACE Act, there would be no federal consequences for violent extremists targeting people seeking and providing essential health care. Congress would be sending a dangerous message: that violence against patients and providers is acceptable.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109271733/550552076/734415106?sourceid=1150747&utm_campaign=25emeus-0601aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmVjZWRlZi01OTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HpPJoUKpqGTGhy7dS4mKll47rBkcJJGMh7vijw1UlGw=&emci=8662b22c-4f45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cbecedef-5945-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

Over the past few weeks, we've shared the stories of our clients—independent abortion providers and reproductive health clinics fighting on the frontlines. [**Repealing the FACE Act would leave them without federal protections.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109271734/550552077/734415106?sourceid=1150747&utm_campaign=25emeus-0601aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmVjZWRlZi01OTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HpPJoUKpqGTGhy7dS4mKll47rBkcJJGMh7vijw1UlGw=&emci=8662b22c-4f45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cbecedef-5945-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) Since _Roe_ was overturned, threats have skyrocketed: Nearly 300 death threats or threats of harm were reported just last year.

clean_body: Repealing the FACE Act puts our clients in danger | Dear Peter, We warned you this was coming—and now it's here. Tomorrow morning, the House Judiciary Committee will debate repealing the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act, the only federal law protecting patients and providers from threats, harassment, and violence. | "TELL YOUR REPS: NO REPEAL" Over the past few weeks, we've shared the stories of our clients—independent abortion providers and reproductive health clinics fighting on the frontlines. Since Roe was overturned, threats have skyrocketed: Nearly 300 death threats or threats of harm were reported just last year. "SAY NO" We can't afford to stay silent. In solidarity, Nancy Northup President & CEO "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

Peter, The situation in CA continues to deteriorate. In an unprecedented move, Trump seized control of the CA National Guard and deployed them to launch a brutal crackdown against anti-ICE protests occurring in LA and the Secretary of Defense has begun preparing to deploy Marines on American soil against its own citizens. **Now, Trump has escalated even further and is calling for the arrest of CA Governor Gavin Newsom**.
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-yWrHjdHKY3sIlQx7o5ZoOrFIImMsENBVgz_GCKWrpIexwUH0emMk9UXg6NGVbFc04vzkZ4v2GFpP5KeBlVV39r1CnOhiBYiE6U77-W3zILbKNIIsXG-iC1n37jSNYBehFj1B0SgucK4fUXUaIkj953dmf27B56HEH7pG6mJdOpuQNqIRMarF9yaYJv87537coM4WATbzZr1zaH3m-pKveT6rARCV5S4IzxFc-b2WsnFpzrcZFZfrMWF9R052hlzVaJfFoszdJ-kcGfiWik5a3Tg_aSaHA5Is-PCfXPF3gF7WqY4jzmgd1Jg2BQEqSrUOkGGbCCkxRlFhBx4xkXH1o7ATB_pEcI3_THC8_jkT5i2/4h7/3kbvqcdAQKmLGqolUxD7uQ/h1/h001.rivoutpdOspIBCZclBMrl1No7pKjkATcYZIKCwI_g_c)

It is notable that Trump is calling for Tom Homan, director of ICE, to arrest Newsom as**ICE is quickly emerging as Trump 's personal hit squad **which he is using to attack political enemies**.** Trump has used ICE to indict and arrest the Mayor of Newark as well as Congresswoman Monica McIver (D-NJ) and is also using the agency to arrest and deport political dissidents opposed to his Israel policy. The only reason why Trump isn't conducting arrests _en masse_ of his political opponents is because courts would shut it down. Which is why he is doing everything in his power to shut them down. **That 's where Defend our Courts comes in...** We are working non-stop to protect our courts in key flash points where Trump is attacking them such as in Pennsylvania where MAGA is moving to dismantle the PA Supreme Court and ensure that PA will never be a swing state again. [Will you help us throw sand into the gears of Trump's plan for total control and rush a donation to help us defend American courts - the only thing standing in the way of a full MAGA takeover?](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-yWrHjdHKY3sIlQx7o5ZoOpx_kpqUHEmp5vA6MTzzXI-WwZSOW3z4IayKjS4md570Pe1lh0Tlg7gGMngmjy4ulB6ogz1NR0LWvVp42PZeOgIMPTxznZtEO5IKB1cze_jgvsEJCDtwhgrj5DaIacuJDZi3dJLfSknVI-6KQ6nkxQahfXcr3F8k3r1NFtcrECKUTfIGRIo-1FODuiRZB3VUghpaoNiRpWdZfn-bA1XSwqE828mwvwvkbpv9fyHI83LVY22itBgtuzrdgiDUEsmendBUTVnLp3tK1EFigTB1OQE249MvOlHcRkent8C_5tRqQaxl9gMqnXNh5QO_Wy7iyNAachBJUc3swgDRZKAFmXR/4h7/3kbvqcdAQKmLGqolUxD7uQ/h2/h001.eQ0zvkkmYCMWiCp8_sfFyVY37_OGASid214sbfao2a4)

clean_body: It is notable that Trump is calling for Tom Homan, director of ICE, to arrest Newsom as ICE is quickly emerging as Trump’s personal hit squad which he is using to attack political enemies. | | Peter, The situation in CA continues to deteriorate. In an unprecedented move, Trump seized control of the CA National Guard and deployed them to launch a brutal crackdown against anti-ICE protests occurring in LA and the Secretary of Defense has begun preparing to deploy Marines on American soil against its own citizens. Now, Trump has escalated even further and is calling for the arrest of CA Governor Gavin Newsom. | It is notable that Trump is calling for Tom Homan, director of ICE, to arrest Newsom asICE is quickly emerging as Trump 's personal hit squad which he is using to attack political enemies. Trump has used ICE to indict and arrest the Mayor of Newark as well as Congresswoman Monica McIver (D-NJ) and is also using the agency to arrest and deport political dissidents opposed to his Israel policy. The only reason why Trump isn't conducting arrests en masse of his political opponents is because courts would shut it down. Which is why he is doing everything in his power to shut them down. That 's where Defend our Courts comes in... We are working non-stop to protect our courts in key flash points where Trump is attacking them such as in Pennsylvania where MAGA is moving to dismantle the PA Supreme Court and ensure that PA will never be a swing state again. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: In solidarity, Team Defend our Courts | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. name: John Rich
subject: J6 defendants PUNISHED for being veterans
body:
I recently came across a striking statistic... 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE1zwiAQhn8N3MzABkI4cNBaPDjjtOOh0yMCaWiDieRr9Nd3tDbX3Wf3feY1sWtCdVVIbBBAHVyPAFC-RgCXzzmm8Tvud6tOsNvqUhwiv2_h5YlOsMBna_b7n2M7zeOmd_zNnmW6THTBh2vnF_gZmvloQnOfii12Kq8cYdgrKphkkpZM4lqZQpyccKySlgMtXGm5EcRL7ks4gec4KCDASUEkFVwAz3jOCllRKpwBykpAjDxyMhN9CtbQfphNSm0bM9tG3Kh6GLr-IaYR6Dm12Xm0jR_7vzPbRgT6qYxATwj0yR0PH-8p7WqU60dp-ZbvXm-arDcJJ-W6OTRN6AuBGPn6f4MnBb8BAAD__-b6bwE)
| | [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8z0GvnCwUxvFPgzsNHATGhYv3vma6mKRp0lVXNwwcR1oBB1Bz--kbJ2a2P_7J4dF-md341RP1QQAmZzMBIPw_AvD8tfu0_va3b_Wi2r_1U3734niF_890g3ccjL7d_vyM275-ZCt-mNCl58beefla8B2fRxv02s2HqqGyPR8tbSvsmWq7tmOXtqumniOzUvOL4HeUTMvRjhyZAir4BS3TleuBgqCSdkwJBaIRvJXdyJiyGlh7AdLS151Ge0zOaJbLrlOK0Tcm-mrup1KW_PrYlcA1o1kTNjqgjeUoDis62NqFukxYP_Ry0L3WprgYCL-uxX8a7RftHoHwAQQVtCMgD_do3eoJHxJuedIJTy-YDgUqpfjcEzs5xzUZJHzI91NMDAVDIXyY4yNWqbfL7ubZZalISx-vZceOrYd_AQAA__-jyo7T)
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8z8GunCAUxvGnwZ0GjoDDwkVvzXQxSdOkq65ujsAoraADqJk-_Y0TM9sf_-TwoV8md3-2pPkgAKMziQCQ-hsBePzZfVz_-tuPcmn4__Ihf3pxvML3M93gHQeNt9u_3_O2rx_JiF86qPjY2DvPz8W-4_NoZT266dCmK0xb3w3lhW1ZwxVX7MJVMbZc9VQpxhiXqAWX2KNSAi4IvdQ9NYVrgYKgkirWiAZEJWou1Z2xxiAwfgHC6etOhd5Gp5GlvGOM8-wrPftiasecl_T62JXANVm9RlthsGbOR3FYxmBKF8o82nLA5aC-RJ3dHEh9XbP_1OgXdEMgdQeCCqoIyMO9NW71pO6i3dKI0Z6ebTwUqJTic4_s5DSvUVtSd6k_Rc8h25BJ3TmPg2VFbM2yu2lySTaE0-G17ViytfAVAAD__0u5jvc)

Friend,

I recently came across a striking statistic.

**72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.**

And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for _**harsher penalties**_.

_Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service?_

I’ve always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream _because_ of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice.

And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven’t received justice.

The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured.

That’s why I’m proud to support Stand in the Gap.

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

[If you believe in liberty, in due process, and in standing up for our fellow Americans, I hope you’ll make a donation to Stand in the Gap today. >>](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8z82O2yAUhuGrwTtbcPjxsPCiUytdRKoqddVVROAkpmOwA9ju9OpHjqxsH17p8Jkwj_722ZH2nQAM3mUCQPg3AvD4s4W0_A3nH_Xciv_1Q_0Mcn-F70e6wiuO1pzPH7-ndVves5O_bNTpsbJXXj5nfMXH0QaD8eOubV-5jt8cFRV2rBVaaPYmdDV0-sopor5KaRXnSimjFbPSCdlaIW5Y-Q4oSKqoZq1sQTaSC6VvjLXOABNvQAR93mlMwOStYblsJqVpCo2dQjV2Qylzfn7sROCU0S4JGxPRTWUvdismutrHugxY382807U2tvgpEn5aSrhYE2bj75HwHiSVVBNQuwd0fgmE9wnXPJiEhxdMuwJVSl62xA7O05IsEt7n6yF2igVjIbwv-K9cRh8_WJU6N29-HH1WLRH0_ty3r1k7-AoAAP__vDCQ3Q)
[Donate](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8z0HvmyAYx_FXgzcNPIDowcM60x2aLEt22qlBwMomYAE13av_x8b0-uGbPPykW2Y7vjokLghgsjohAES_IYDnn93F9a-7_SgXwf6Xz_qn48crfD_TDT6xV_J2-_c7bPt6SZr_Ur6Nz4188vxazCc-j1bGSTsfKvpCd3TUmBWmI4K1rCUNa4upk2IcOW30yAVrlGg4aZqhHkQzMowNpoXtAAPHNW6J4AJ4xSmr25EQoSUQ1gBi-H2nks5EqyRJeZcxhuAqFVwxd1POS3p_7Irgmoxao6mkNzrkozgsS69L68s8mfIhl4OGUqpsg0f0umZ3V9It0j48oj1wzHGLoD7cGW1Xh2gfzZYmGc3p2cRDAdc1v--RnJzCGpVBtE_DKSr4bHxGtNfBy2zuw5pz8KSInV52O8821QIx_HhvPBZtHXwFAAD__-VTklk)
Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.
Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties finding a job
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in.

Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need.

**There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance.**

Let’s show these patriots they’re not forgotten.

clean_body: I recently came across a striking statistic... 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders. | | Friend, I recently came across a striking statistic. 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders. And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for harsher penalties. Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service? I’ve always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream because of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice. And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven’t received justice. The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured. That’s why I’m proud to support Stand in the Gap. This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was. Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face... Difficulties finding a job Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison And even homelessness. For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming. Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually. Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in. Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need. There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance. Let’s show these patriots they’re not forgotten. This isn’t about politics. It’s about justice. These are real Americans — veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens — who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs. If we don’t fight for our fellow patriots now, who will? When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you’re not just defending individuals. You are defending the soul of our country. As long as there’s breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I’ll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. I hope you’ll join me by taking action right now. For faith, freedom, and country, John Rich Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap’s tax identification number is 93-1417599.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Michigangers want to know - are we going to be ok?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Maybe you share that sense of concern.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2288%2E135344%2E-2_MaP)

Friends -
I held a town hall in Lansing this weekend with my friend, Representative Kristen McDonald Rivet. Hundreds of Michiganders packed a high school gym to do that most American of things: stand up and ask their elected representatives questions about what’s happening in Congress.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-june25.1m9fWS&refcode=em250609-1&t=2&akid=2288%2E135344%2E-2_MaP)
Almost every question I received expressed a sense of concern about President Trump’s “Big, Beautiful Bill” – and what's going to happen with health care, the price of food, nutrition assistance and programs millions of people care about. People just wanted to know, “are we going to be ok?”
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-june25.1m9fWS&refcode=em250609-1&t=3&akid=2288%2E135344%2E-2_MaP)
Maybe you share that sense of concern.
So first, I want to be very clear about what President Trump and Republicans' bill does:
This bill cuts a bunch of programs that we all care about – particularly health care – to pay for permanent tax cuts for the wealthiest tax brackets.
That is not a political statement – that is just what the bill does.
You can't give big tax breaks if you're not cutting something big.
And second, I want to be clear that this bill will impact EVERYONE's health care. Either you are going to be at risk of losing your health care or paying more for your health care.
Think about it.
If you're cutting a bunch of people off health care, they are still walking into the emergency room and needing care.
And the response to that, when they can't pay, is that health care providers pass on that cost by charging more to those with private insurance.
This is a health care conversation. Because what President Trump couldn’t do in this first term – repealing Obamacare – he is trying to do this time with a thousand cuts.
No one wants to feel fearful about how government decisions are going to impact their lives. But that is where we are, and it’s critical all Americans know the facts of this bill.
Thank you for reading,
Elissa Slotkin
* * *

👋🏻 **Wait, before you click away!** 🇺🇸
United States Senators often keep on fundraising after their election ends, but Elissa doesn't want to keep bombarding your inbox with fundraising requests.
What we will do is send you good, timely content – like this message. Stuff you might open without dread.
But she does hope you may consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution. Even just $5 or $10 – so we don't have to send those mass fundraising emails while Elissa is focused on her work as a Senator.
[**Make a recurring contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign here.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-june25.1m9fWS&refcode=em250609-1&t=4&akid=2288%2E135344%2E-2_MaP)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your recurring contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $10 MONTHLY](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3243?c0=ebs-em-june25.8pUC7M&refcode=em250609-1&t=5&akid=2288%2E135344%2E-2_MaP)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-june25.1m9fWS&refcode=em250609-1&t=6&akid=2288%2E135344%2E-2_MaP)**
---
****

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=2288%2E135344%2E-2_MaP).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=2288%2E135344%2E-2_MaP)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

Solicitations made by Elissa Slotkin are limited by Federal law. As a Federal candidates and officeholder she is soliciting only donations of up to $3300 per election from individuals and up to $5000 per election from multi-candidate political committees. She are not soliciting donations in any amount from corporations, labororganizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks.

subject: Target on my back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
Let me explain:

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109272551/550555020/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmIwOWU4Zi01YjQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6qeSyFG5ByWp2WQ-rD5-Nj2DwSi3LqVqDBOxjuy5jlY=)
---
Peter, it’s Ritchie. [I’m going to ask for your help today, and I can explain why. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109272552/550555044/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250609_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmIwOWU4Zi01YjQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6qeSyFG5ByWp2WQ-rD5-Nj2DwSi3LqVqDBOxjuy5jlY=)

→ I’m pro-Medicaid, and that makes me a target for the GOP.

→ I’m pro-affordable housing, and that makes me a target for the GOP.

→ I’m pro-Democracy, and that makes me a target for the GOP.

**If I have a target on my back for doing what’s right — _for standing up for marginalized voices, for defending the rule of law, and for refusing to stand by and allow the GOP to destroy our Democracy_ — then so be it. But Peter, that means I *really* need your help:**

[If we get just 5 more donations in Cresco, we’ll have the fuel we need to handle the GOP trifecta and their attacks on our Democracy. subject: Our Voices of New Mexico tour by the numbers:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109273026/550556719/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTllYzg0MS01YzQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zkLn43MVsbmBga-Qn_RU3LcS8raHzHpUCCd2iueSzHI=&emci=d56d7327-4645-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=919ec841-5c45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=252045)

Team, Thank you to all the New Mexicans who joined our Voices of New Mexico tour! By the numbers, we spent 4 days on the road, stopped in 8 different counties, spent around 20 hours driving more than 1,300 miles, and had the privilege of talking to over 200 New Mexicans. Members of our team talked to veterans, servicemembers, educators, parents, and grandparents, and we’re looking forward to sharing their stories over the coming weeks. We asked folks about their concerns and how the Trump administration is impacting them and their communities. We’ve heard folks’ fears about losing Medicaid, their Social Security checks not arriving, or their medications no longer being covered. We’ve talked to veterans, servicemembers, and their families about our foreign policy — and whether or not they’re safer now than they were before. We’ve talked to educators and parents about what’s going on in our schools, and making sure our children get the future they deserve. **[We’re going to continue having these conversations. There are so many counties and communities we weren’t able to visit this time around, but we’re not stopping here. Will you pitch in today to help fund our next Voices of New Mexico tour, and keep the conversations going?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109273027/550556748/-1386246667?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTllYzg0MS01YzQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zkLn43MVsbmBga-Qn_RU3LcS8raHzHpUCCd2iueSzHI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109273028/550556750/-1386246667?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTllYzg0MS01YzQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zkLn43MVsbmBga-Qn_RU3LcS8raHzHpUCCd2iueSzHI=)

The Trump regime has ramped up immigration raids, denied people due process, abducted and trafficked them to foreign countries and locked them up indefinitely in dangerous prisons. This would be the first time the National Guard would be used to enforce a snatch and kidnap operation. The Trump regime is not committed to democratic principles, transparency, or the protection of individual rights, and they are using our troops to do their dirty work.** Thank you for your support. -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. name: Deb Haaland
subject: I have a message for Donald Trump:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
You can’t teach people to love this country by lying about it.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2494%2E400544%2Euw8XlO)
Can I show you a piece of news that stopped me in my tracks?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250609_1_nps?amount=5&refcode=em20250609-2494&refcode2=2494_400544_uw8XlO&akid=2494%2E400544%2Euw8XlO)
_This news didn’t make any front pages, but I’m sharing it now because it’s too important to ignore._
Donald Trump’s Interior Secretary recently issued an order that instructs folks who visit our national parks to report any signs or information they find to be “negative” or “disparaging” about living or past Americans.
**They’re attempting to whitewash our history.**
This backwards move is part of a larger effort by the Trump administration to censor the truth about our country’s past. It’s frustrating to see this happen at our national park sites, because so many places tell important stories about our past – stories that can only be told truthfully by acknowledging that there are parts of American history that shouldn’t ever be repeated.
Take it from me: My Native ancestors endured the horrors of the forced-assimilation policies carried out by the very department I led as Secretary of the Interior. I didn’t ignore that part of my history when I signed up for the job – I reckoned with our past in order to lead our country into a fairer, more just, and more equitable future.
**This is the type of leader I’ll be as governor of New Mexico.** Someone who can look hard truths in the face and be transparent about the solutions we need to actually solve our problems. If that sounds like the type of leadership you want to see in this moment, I’m asking for your support:
[**Can you make a $5 donation to our grassroots campaign right now? Your support will be essential as we fight to win this race and build a New Mexico that finally works for all its people.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250609_1_nps?amount=5&refcode=em20250609-2494&refcode2=2494_400544_uw8XlO&akid=2494%2E400544%2Euw8XlO)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250609_1_nps?amount=5&refcode=em20250609-2494&refcode2=2494_400544_uw8XlO&akid=2494%2E400544%2Euw8XlO)**
Manzanar National Historic Site. Birmingham Civil Rights National Monument. Stonewall National Monument. Consider for a moment trying to convey the true significance of these important places without being open and honest about the darker moments in our nation’s history.
**I have a message for Donald Trump: Rewriting our history doesn’t silence its echoes, and you can’t teach people to love this country by lying about it.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250609_1_nps?amount=5&refcode=em20250609-2494&refcode2=2494_400544_uw8XlO&akid=2494%2E400544%2Euw8XlO)
_You can’t tell the story of national monuments like Stonewall without being honest about our past._
Right now, it’s more important than ever that people like you and I keep speaking truth to power, learning from our past, and striving towards a future the next generation will be proud to look back on. I hope you’ll keep up that fight alongside me.
[**If you can, please make your first $5 contribution to our grassroots campaign for governor. History shows us that, if we organize together, we will win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250609_1_nps?amount=5&refcode=em20250609-2494&refcode2=2494_400544_uw8XlO&akid=2494%2E400544%2Euw8XlO)
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250609-1&t=2&refcode2=2494_400544_uw8XlO&akid=2494%2E400544%2Euw8XlO)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=2494%2E400544%2Euw8XlO)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=2494%2E400544%2Euw8XlO)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Do you agree with 50% of Americans?
body:
Peter, great news: 50% of Americans say our country is on the ‘right track’! But here’s the bad news............If Chuck Schumer, Elizabeth Warren, and Bernie Sanders take control of the Senate, Trump will have no way to pass his America First agenda. |
---
💥 TEAM GRAHAM FLASH POLL 💥
Peter, great news:

**A majority of Americans say our country is on the ‘right track'!** With President Trump in the White House and Republican majorities in Congress, Americans are more optimistic than ever.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c64c465d391f4c27a6dd240103ae55f1&_e=Nc_lLshuhnWBZxWU5VKy7vs-OWQxDjuZL8N5WiQKuEULch4JyBMDshWY19UvSxbJqZdBSXLouAJ43AGWCQcgTX2b9XmIwzXSE5eI8aAjZ93uv9i1RKHY66qwFWXSztH-tRc60dkI3iK31IyZXmD3Nf2NcgSKcb7DHLQquLwK_KOGdqNqHD_e0pWJgC0kmmmcCN3FFKc9NeiVzuoZ9Y_tketeSDmHUkc3mJVOEarsweIUOlzBAWHNyqc-2aKJn44oPkgZhR5pPwkoKhu4cTdUhBO25P-HSWrFzDHIxT9j50SIDakagRJ1qxEO6zbbQjpE_pF0uW2Dmfu2YU5QWGVE4T2_jVPpGp7z3bFjyQvIRgVDYLZYHPCYozmIV4aY9F0OvaOp6rxBIBYZtZOYTVxiJg%3D%3D)
**But here's the bad news: if Chuck Schumer, Elizabeth Warren, and Bernie Sanders take control of the Senate, Trump will have no way to pass his America First agenda.**

It's critical that I hear from you in the next 48 hours so we can show the strength of our movement and continue making President Trump's campaign promises of reality.

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Fani Willis is facing my husband in court right now
body:
My police officer husband is in court| | |
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been abusing her office to target innocent police officers.And right now, my husband is facing Fani Willis in court as she’s trying to lock him up for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.**[Before I ask for your urgent help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7ef5c56954544554b94c825497d15e6d&_e=p9qTpJTRQIngvBIiNzmFGKNSQru0d7XaUH4YQV1HmfFqBCgFfZ8Q_smiaU5FGC-09L75O7JxR-XIyjn6QrNwAPYUQHf3fYAZNe0Ips2gVB29VeL1pyvAe-526UsQ3typ0fuMH3y2CsEAPPfEeYW2FQY4ANxtXc6WnvCGSXZ-ictjYBbLqLsN2JrFiu6EZz63PE2Oykql5J1SouVxUZVUq3T0V2whQTAcvqABeCvmmpdB96_nKhpZpuaER9JKudGnTK83S770yGHnLPAPCKcAbSGhmCgPFknqeXqNU7UjymrwRQqf2Z_xKTR91b_h4KFSf-ufgWmP7hFjSXCUaMKf9fBFp1T0_ZNXAEs9RbKaDwu91PXV2rDx-rwEly0OIwoCs4bq3LVbmHmizUzpJWKafA%3D%3D) **My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7ef5c56954544554b94c825497d15e6d&_e=p9qTpJTRQIngvBIiNzmFGKNSQru0d7XaUH4YQV1HmfFqBCgFfZ8Q_smiaU5FGC-09L75O7JxR-XIyjn6QrNwAPYUQHf3fYAZNe0Ips2gVB29VeL1pyvAe-526UsQ3typ0fuMH3y2CsEAPPfEeYW2FQY4ANxtXc6WnvCGSXZ-ictjYBbLqLsN2JrFiu6EZz63PE2Oykql5J1SouVxUZVUq3T0V2whQTAcvqABeCvmmpcTbNhyJTdUEotzhtoQ510yHlMEO7BABRsvY0M-zMJX3nUk5MDSLxTWYcb0b_KJ_TzXx3RyCZG5BtotwPOVErfy8tu3LayVRn6VMbn4eDUwIg60V3m1Wl2haqzqdFXiazrns0I8fHNFJSHGDIm92_35MS3vE49xAjRiz2dkL9HIWw%3D%3D)
---
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way in court... **life in prison** could be his reward.Our nightmare started nine years ago, when my husband responded to a call about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate._That's when it happened._ The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.With only a split second to act, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!** You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So, the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why [**I'm turning to you for help.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7ef5c56954544554b94c825497d15e6d&_e=p9qTpJTRQIngvBIiNzmFGKNSQru0d7XaUH4YQV1HmfFqBCgFfZ8Q_smiaU5FGC-09L75O7JxR-XIyjn6QrNwAPYUQHf3fYAZNe0Ips2gVB29VeL1pyvAe-526UsQ3typ0fuMH3y2CsEAPPfEeYW2FQY4ANxtXc6WnvCGSXZ-ictjYBbLqLsN2JrFiu6EZz63PE2Oykql5J1SouVxUZVUq3T0V2whQTAcvqABeCvmmpeNxmUe3m76wY3Zx_ogIUpk6LoRdph5q2LUunlbDKOxO_21sPTLMm4A0x-LeN1QNXDYGtz5fQy34KyOM68AizIJwHpZrAhPRoiVJRq16C5ydgElikLz8Jf9jY2MHTVV0jtnK_X0lbgI2uuXkgOJR9xJ4FdWPdPm_omrYWxCMHh1Jw%3D%3D) James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.Fani Willis just wants to make an example out of my husband. Friend, for years we've been trapped in limbo. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult.As you can imagine after 9 years of prosecution, what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.When we ran out of money, we had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.** If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.Friend, that's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... **[Could you send an emergency gift today to help defend James while his trial is ongoing?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7ef5c56954544554b94c825497d15e6d&_e=p9qTpJTRQIngvBIiNzmFGKNSQru0d7XaUH4YQV1HmfFqBCgFfZ8Q_smiaU5FGC-09L75O7JxR-XIyjn6QrNwAPYUQHf3fYAZNe0Ips2gVB29VeL1pyvAe-526UsQ3typ0fuMH3y2CsEAPPfEeYW2FQY4ANxtXc6WnvCGSXZ-ictjYBbLqLsN2JrFiu6EZz63PE2Oykql5J1SouVxUZVUq3T0V2whQTAcvqABeCvmmpdF-YtSGKY8aUzvIbQmXGoa_HIdzVjlSKa7scw3oXrk-L2ELdfF3xTQcuY8I3EAc02mv0sB96cfZR81EntnJ7Amo02wrts3bimRXMU14p0krF4bL7t17Cv2J_5s-moZtFs5sL-Q88jYqta5tRvrTFMMDDdN5iMQpOWrUNhBLdF3ug%3D%3D)** His legal team is working day and night as they fight Fani Willis’ team in the courtroom and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. We have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband as the trial can conclude any day now and we’re quickly running out of time. **[So, if you're able, can you send your emergency tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF today to defend James before it’s too late?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7ef5c56954544554b94c825497d15e6d&_e=p9qTpJTRQIngvBIiNzmFGKNSQru0d7XaUH4YQV1HmfFqBCgFfZ8Q_smiaU5FGC-09L75O7JxR-XIyjn6QrNwAPYUQHf3fYAZNe0Ips2gVB29VeL1pyvAe-526UsQ3typ0fuMH3y2CsEAPPfEeYW2FQY4ANxtXc6WnvCGSXZ-ictjYBbLqLsN2JrFiu6EZz63PE2Oykql5J1SouVxUZVUq3T0V2whQTAcvqABeCvmmpc7v2aH0jDxxdU7qVRRL7DtJrE2LO6l6e5LVkf4JHJBT8CZmIcmQDZfOGjVWEqg0vqJZhg_gnkoiSL2XgSweBgPsLeVBxtul_c4S-G98CpR7kgMWIREwsummqB_moqJB01Pq604Wtw3AG_6S1lYcAyIRbr137uA3AZK55zyECbC-A%3D%3D)** It's [**your emergency gift of $35**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7ef5c56954544554b94c825497d15e6d&_e=p9qTpJTRQIngvBIiNzmFGKNSQru0d7XaUH4YQV1HmfFqBCgFfZ8Q_smiaU5FGC-09L75O7JxR-XIyjn6QrNwAPYUQHf3fYAZNe0Ips2gVB29VeL1pyvAe-526UsQ3typ0fuMH3y2CsEAPPfEeYW2FQY4ANxtXc6WnvCGSXZ-ictjYBbLqLsN2JrFiu6EZz63PE2Oykql5J1SouVxUZVUq3T0V2whQTAcvqABeCvmmpcvmAVSY5Z72vvVsraOpL7QEagPrFHb5lCwHoQ36arn_8rbsv71IF7xU8_HMJ_Ec0uubIwiHWRmahx5bCPmwIIm5d5BFWwUEn0rn4gj3RUE2SsUATowtmzv2DsyVCSpyY-6G_hHZt84EP0QMNTwLJNRPwk6xb2d7EpSbSdsJbAi9g%3D%3D) that could make the difference between defeating radical Fani Willis and ensuring justice -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison.Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.
---
Sincerely,
---
Jenna Burns
---
P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way in court. Please help James before it's too late! His trial is currently ongoing. [**Please follow this link right now to make your emergency tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7ef5c56954544554b94c825497d15e6d&_e=p9qTpJTRQIngvBIiNzmFGKNSQru0d7XaUH4YQV1HmfFqBCgFfZ8Q_smiaU5FGC-09L75O7JxR-XIyjn6QrNwAPYUQHf3fYAZNe0Ips2gVB29VeL1pyvAe-526UsQ3typ0fuMH3y2CsEAPPfEeYW2FQY4ANxtXc6WnvCGSXZ-ictjYBbLqLsN2JrFiu6EZz63PE2Oykql5J1SouVxUZVUq3T0V2whQTAcvqABeCvmmpcfpiDjr61mwry7G6ssEGIjflWqefL5eFec9JhQtAlYpGvk9vVdAc7pXm6a7ndEGlY3J6IS3yFmKqo0MT1ok-2yj7I0vHXqP-pVEfp_sRWzwDPMuAX4YFCYFJcBfDOlyjY-FdE3nqitfbyl5T0dmjT9LaEDya4WO7BqDhva6AOobg%3D%3D) Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. clean_body: My police officer husband is in court| | | Dear Fellow Patriot,If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been abusing her office to target innocent police officers.And right now, my husband is facing Fani Willis in court as she’s trying to lock him up for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way in court... life in prison could be his reward.Our nightmare started nine years ago, when my husband responded to a call about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.With only a split second to act, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So, the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.Fani Willis just wants to make an example out of my husband. Friend, for years we've been trapped in limbo. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult.As you can imagine after 9 years of prosecution, what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.When we ran out of money, we had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.Friend, that's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... His legal team is working day and night as they fight Fani Willis’ team in the courtroom and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. We have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband as the trial can conclude any day now and we’re quickly running out of time. It's that could make the difference between defeating radical Fani Willis and ensuring justice -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison.Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way in court. Please help James before it's too late! His trial is currently ongoing. Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

Hey Peter, it’s Rebecca. As you may know, our next FEC fundraising deadline is quickly approaching. Grassroots supporters like you are the reason we can run this campaign, so I want to keep you in the loop on our fundraising progress. **We’re pushing hard to lead by example and show the way forward for working folks who can’t rely on oligarchs. [**We have three weeks left to show strength and keep the Van Orden campaign on their toes. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109274031/550560623/-319689629?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDI1OTg4YmMtNWU0NS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j3PWd-PfXToGuaQDygybQmZU54oZoQW5_wU1O8TU0Po=) Team, There is no reason for Trump to take over the California National Guard and send them into Los Angeles, against our community’s wishes. There’s even less excuse for him to talk about sending in the Marines. Local law enforcement is capable of handling situations in our region. This is a volatile moment that requires us to stand behind our convictions, while not playing into Trump’s trap. We must keep attention on what Trump and Republicans are doing to our families, our friends and our neighbors – not fanning the flames of violence that will give Trump what he wants – an excuse to declare martial law in California. Trump needs a distraction to hide the life-changing cuts to your healthcare that he and the Congressional Republicans are pushing through, in the dead of night. He doesn’t want you to focus on the real threats: _To our health
To our families
To our environment
And, yes, to our immigrant neighbors_ That’s why we must keep focused and maintain protests without violence. Together, we can and will hold the line. Laura

name: Schrier HQ
subject: The GOP is trying to manipulate Americans. Full stop.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Let's be VERY clear about something: [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109275159/550564466/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjQxYmVkOS02MTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ebRaVscmyTaiaYQ9oYZzZAzt4lJBN9_59ORwl54YjqY=&emci=ecc4cbe4-6842-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6b41bed9-6145-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15820338)
---

Peter,

According to Speaker Mike Johnson, millions of Americans “will choose” to lose their Medicaid coverage.

_Not because of the extreme bill Republicans just passed._

_Not because of new barriers to care._

_...But because Americans supposedly made the wrong choice?_

**WHAT?!**

**[Can Kim count on you to chip in $5 or more to help her hold GOP extremists accountable for THEIR actions?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109275160/550564467/-1978405529?refcode=em25_250609_medica_fndd_gq_act___shq_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250609_medica_fndd_gq_act___shq_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=6b41bed9-6145-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&refcode2=6b41bed9-6145-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjQxYmVkOS02MTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ebRaVscmyTaiaYQ9oYZzZAzt4lJBN9_59ORwl54YjqY=)**

Let’s be very clear: The GOP’s latest “big, beautiful” bill includes massive cuts to Medicaid. It erects new bureaucratic hurdles designed to kick people off their coverage—not help them stay insured.

**And now, the same Republicans who voted to gut Medicaid are trying to blame the people who are losing it?** That’s not just dishonest—it’s despicable. Kim herself spent 26 hours on the House floor fighting back against these cuts. As a pediatrician, she knows firsthand what this will mean for countless families.

clean_body: Let's be VERY clear about something: Peter, According to Speaker Mike Johnson, millions of Americans “will choose” to lose their Medicaid coverage. Not because of the extreme bill Republicans just passed. Not because of new barriers to care. ...But because Americans supposedly made the wrong choice? WHAT?! = Let’s be very clear: The GOP’s latest “big, beautiful” bill includes massive cuts to Medicaid. It erects new bureaucratic hurdles designed to kick people off their coverage—not help them stay insured. And now, the same Republicans who voted to gut Medicaid are trying to blame the people who are losing it? That’s not just dishonest—it’s despicable. Kim herself spent 26 hours on the House floor fighting back against these cuts. As a pediatrician, she knows firsthand what this will mean for countless families. For too many folks in WA-08 and across the country, Medicaid is the only path to seeing a doctor, filling a prescription, or affording a hospital visit, and Kim won’t stand by while Republicans lie to the American people and try to dodge accountability for what they did. So here’s what we do: We fight back, hold them accountable, and take back the House in 2026 to make sure they never get away with this again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks for your continued support, Schrier HQ Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: This vote is coming fast, and we need to act now.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250609-1379-foote&t=1001&akid=1379%2E342411%2ERY3yAB ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Republicans in Congress are set to vote on a sweeping tax and spending
bill — and it’s worse than we feared.

Their so-called “One Big Beautiful Bill” is a sweeping tax scheme that
guts Medicaid to fund handouts for billionaires and corporations. If it
passes, over 10 million Americans could lose their health coverage.
Millions more could see their access to life-saving care vanish almost
overnight.

This isn’t about balancing budgets. It’s about balancing the interests of
the ultra-rich on the backs of everyone else.

The Squad is fighting back. Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida, and the
rest of our progressive champions are sounding the alarm. They’re pushing
back — but they can’t do it alone.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250609-movement.TOZzG-&refcode=em20250609-1379&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1379%2E342411%2ERY3yAB ]Will you join the movement alongside the Squad, by chipping in
$3 to defeat this dangerous bill and safeguard our
progressive values? The vote is coming fast, and we need to act now.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250609-movement.TOZzG-&refcode=em20250609-1379&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1379%2E342411%2ERY3yAB ]Contribute ››

Extremist Republicans are betting that we won’t fight back. Let’s prove
them wrong.

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1379%2E342411%2ERY3yAB

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

name: Matthew Frohlich, WAGOP Executive Director
subject: Please Support WAGOP State Senate Candidate Chad Magendanz
body:
Please Support WAGOP State Senate Candidate Chad Magendanz (06.09.2025) | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/please-support-wagops-election-integrity-efforts-2699113?e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,

Olympia is broken.

Out-of-touch politicians just passed a 78-billion-dollar budget packed with nine billion in new taxes, and they gave themselves a raise while doing it. This is what happens when one party holds unchecked power. [**And if we don’t act now, it will only get worse.**](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=7a7dae723a&e=6a281f566d)

Opportunities to be effective before then are rare. That’s why we need to make the most of this opportunity and [support Chad Magendanz now. ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d0ecba82a5&e=6a281f566d)

With your support, we have a real chance to break the Democrats’ supermajority, restore balance, and stop another record tax increase in 2026.

The other side knows that this is exactly what is at stake.

We can’t afford to fall behind. Your support is more important than ever before.

Let’s send Olympia a message: taxpayers are done being ignored. Let’s elect Chad Magendanz. Please consider contributing to Chad’s [campaign. ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=c19b7fe81a&e=6a281f566d)

All best,

Jim Walsh
WAGOP Chairman
