body:
The chaos President Trump is creating in Los Angeles to justify force is deeply concerning.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109276964/550570974/2116327045?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGNjNDZlMS02NTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9qRqsKyHVqxufgKdKQ_HFmcKLSXGG0dZv42kUeAxItE=&emci=73874edb-6545-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a4cc46e1-6545-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=6681226)
---
| Peter,

The chaos President Trump is creating in Los Angeles to justify force is deeply concerning.

This is not about public safety. It’s a show of power meant to scare immigrants and silence critics.

California’s police are focused on keeping people safe, not tearing families apart.

Trump’s move to take over our National Guard is to create unrest, not respond to it.

I am outraged. I urge you to continue speaking out, peacefully.

For those in our community in fear, I want to reiterate that no matter your immigration status, you have rights. The Immigrant Legal Resource Center has created red cards, [_**linked here**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109276965/550570976/-1645141099?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGNjNDZlMS02NTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9qRqsKyHVqxufgKdKQ_HFmcKLSXGG0dZv42kUeAxItE=&emci=73874edb-6545-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a4cc46e1-6545-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=6681226), to help assert your rights in the face of an ICE raid.

—

El caos que el presidente Trump está creando en Los Ángeles para justificar el uso de la fuerza es profundamente preocupante.

Esto no se trata de seguridad pública. Es una muestra de poder empleada con la intención de asustar a la comunidad inmigrante y silenciar a los críticos.

La policía de California está enfocada en mantener a la gente segura, no separar a las familias.

Hay que ser claros: La decisión de Trump de movilizar a la Guardia Nacional sin la autorización de nuestro gobernador, es un abuso de poder el cual ahora esta creando disturbios, no respondiendo a ellos.

Estoy indignada. Les insto a que sigan hablando, pacíficamente.

No importa su estatus migratorio, tiene derechos. El Immigrant Legal Resource Center (Centro de Recursos Legales para Inmigrantes) se ha encargado de crear tarjetas rojas con información sobre sus derechos, en caso de una redada de ICE. Si gusta imprimirla y compartirla, [_**dirijase a este enlace.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109276966/550570978/-1645141099?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGNjNDZlMS02NTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9qRqsKyHVqxufgKdKQ_HFmcKLSXGG0dZv42kUeAxItE=&emci=73874edb-6545-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a4cc46e1-6545-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=6681226)

Con la frente en alto,

Linda

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: I want to pull back the curtain for you and explain what this FEC deadline really means
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friend, you’ve probably heard other campaigns talk about the FEC deadline coming up at the end of the month.
I want to pull back the curtain for you and explain what that really means.
The FEC is the Federal Election Commission. At the end of this month, we are legally required to submit all of our fundraising data to the FEC. That includes all the money we’ve raised and spent so far in 2025.
They then publish those numbers online for all to see — you, us, the press, PACs, campaigns — anyone. And trust us, when those numbers drop a lot of people will be watching.
That’s because the amount of money you raise, and more importantly, the number of donors you have, sends a message about the size and strength of your operation.
With the GOP coming off a victory in last year’s election, they’re going to be looking to see if progressive groups like ours still have the energy and enthusiasm to fight back and compete in the midterms.
So when we make a big fuss about our FEC deadline at the end of the month, it’s because this is our chance to show we’re prepared to not only stand up to Trump’s administration but elect the leaders who will block his far-right agenda.
[**That’s why I’m asking you to make a contribution of whatever you can afford to The Long Run today. I wouldn’t ask if this wasn’t such an important deadline for this team.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-june25.d8eHX2&refcode=em250609-1-300&t=1&akid=5567%2E196590%2Eqyl0-2)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

I appreciate the support you’ve shown over the last two years, and we hope we can continue to count on your help.
Mandela Barnes

clean_body: | | | Friend, When John launched his campaign for Congress in Colorado’s 4th District, he knew it wouldn’t be easy taking on Lauren Boebert and her MAGA machine. But John also knew our team had something they didn’t: a grassroots squad ready to fight for real leadership and real solutions. Now, we’re up against our first big test— the June FEC fundraising deadline. We’ve set a goal to raise $25,000 by June 30th— and we’re counting on supporters like you to help prove that this campaign has the momentum to flip this district. Things are NOT going well. Boebert’s president and her party are crushing our economy, hurting our farmers, and driving prices up for business owners and consumers alike. Enough is enough. Every dollar we raise helps reach voters across all 21 counties in CO-04 — and shows Boebert that this district is ready for a change. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for being part of this from the start. Best, Padora for Colorado John Padora is a manufacturing engineer and candidate for Congress in Colorado’s 4th District. He’s running to bring commonsense leadership to Eastern Colorado—fighting for farmers, working families, and real solutions, not political theater. Paid for by Padora for Colorado

**“Get off of Social Security. Get back into the workforce.”
— Rep. Mike Collins (R-GA)** Peter — Yes, you read that right. Georgia Republican Mike Collins looked America’s seniors in the eye and told them to get off of the Social Security they earned and get back to work. Collins and his Republican allies in Congress are pushing an extreme agenda to gut Social Security — **leaving millions of Georgians behind while they keep doling out favors to billionaires**. We’re sounding the alarm. **It’s time to show them just how many of us are ready to fight back**. [Add your name today to tell Mike Collins and Georgia Republicans: Keep your hands off our Social Security.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109277373/550572569/-220126102?source=SBD_DPG_EM_EN_060925_SOCIALSECURITY_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWYwYWE2Zi02NzQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Ez8KfmhOgk9TOLNLcYS2PM2U9sYxBLaTIFQ6-v1jOY=&emci=aacc46e1-6545-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=81f0aa6f-6745-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=43566853) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109277374/550572570/-220126102?source=SBD_DPG_EM_EN_060925_SOCIALSECURITY_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWYwYWE2Zi02NzQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Ez8KfmhOgk9TOLNLcYS2PM2U9sYxBLaTIFQ6-v1jOY=&emci=aacc46e1-6545-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=81f0aa6f-6745-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=43566853)**

subject: Trump calls for ICE to arrest Gov. Newsom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee
body:
In remarks to the press this morning, Trump called for the Director of ICE to arrest California Governor Gavin Newsom. Trump has already used ICE to arrest and indict political enemies including the Mayor of Newark, Congresswoman LaMonica McIver (D-NJ). | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DaYvb3cG4AgnaAd1KsuObgA2K6-IhBoCR6ELn9YFAvosCM1GQCs7JCR4Cg3z3W4FQ49QYxF_5FuOnPpB8XKI_xg2SRY1GGuKxPoHaJvvR_wZ_amkioG5WWLND4xj62Mf1D1nG4ZXyuatgKzOMyEbMZYlz_7b4oHmb5PJqXhc29Xg80mViepYK31QgxB-qyRaGZqhkc2fVL7VLhuTQlwRI-e5OaLrhJAiVcxSKjvRAGv9zlOM6ri12240i35mWKpmevf2NnzFwZrRa7A-UZnXmZNagcOCfIjLElcrt4Nw0FNoEuNJ5X_n2beiZKRNQ4V6qkPoRxm0IkHvJvtS9FNlP5px0ovkhR0xpGJt54D4otJC7JgMVh0ldsqF1gNoNyPbC/4h7/x6Q-VGgOSyyZOOVoP8xcRA/h0/h001.WcrwEfwR5CM4LZLSCzIvaTA7rvb6W8WIhpDEFpJp_gI)
---
Friend, Yesterday, in a Rubicon moment, Trump seized control of the California National Guard and deployed them to Los Angeles to be used against American citizens on American soil. Now Trump has escalated things even further. In remarks to the press this morning,**Trump called for the Director of ICE to arrest California Governor Gavin Newsom**.
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DaYvb3cG4AgnaAd1KsuObgA2K6-IhBoCR6ELn9YFAvosCM1GQCs7JCR4Cg3z3W4FQJU9G7byUggP39cJsA873V0u9rLr2drxnH1aoIRRfi39o2eruDCjionJFYufk-d8fuGXRjhNzJgvvFPHYqJNDbjatKVGOWo0Yakqu-DNu6Se79QuVFn_1yRstU3_tuLzKWKIdjw6S5YWm-Y3C9U59myp2h04UFNTtwGbAkQ-lVRZv44lAIAcMx6oCvgh4tKVQYYNC_FOjVysIr3qy39HA8eHDUpq7YAJSPGNfHknwMX7hE3uJ2_dwRn_DjLDEcXOYdEqJT3WVU_MReeJszcC2NwXIZTwO43WyjB1_ZFjQSbp8CwkrkfwGMrx9Rd62NbLO/4h7/x6Q-VGgOSyyZOOVoP8xcRA/h1/h001.al_AgeFodc5BnXKMbI7uMav-39aCcsBF-wBjZllRbmc)
---
Trump has already used ICE to arrest and indict political enemies including the Mayor of Newark, Congresswoman LaMonica McIver (D-NJ), and students critical of the President's Israel policy. Now he plans to use them to arrest a sitting governor, _something unprecedented in American history_. As we've been saying over the past few weeks, although these events are deeply troubling, for the time being we still have a democracy and _we can 't _let these moments freeze us into hopelessness and apathy. **We need to fight. ** Democrats across the country are using this summer to build the infrastructure we need to build a historic blue wave that will take back Congress and give us back a much needed tool to stop the administration. While the National Party focuses on a few dozen set piece battleground districts it's on No Dem Left Behind to shore up our flanks in rural districts - _places where we can 't afford to leave democrats behind_. [**Showing up everywhere is how we defeat MAGA. clean_body: In remarks to the press this morning, Trump called for the Director of ICE to arrest California Governor Gavin Newsom. Trump has already used ICE to arrest and indict political enemies including the Mayor of Newark, Congresswoman LaMonica McIver (D-NJ). | | Friend, Yesterday, in a Rubicon moment, Trump seized control of the California National Guard and deployed them to Los Angeles to be used against American citizens on American soil. Now Trump has escalated things even further. In remarks to the press this morning,Trump called for the Director of ICE to arrest California Governor Gavin Newsom. | Trump has already used ICE to arrest and indict political enemies including the Mayor of Newark, Congresswoman LaMonica McIver (D-NJ), and students critical of the President's Israel policy. Now he plans to use them to arrest a sitting governor, something unprecedented in American history. As we've been saying over the past few weeks, although these events are deeply troubling, for the time being we still have a democracy and we can 't let these moments freeze us into hopelessness and apathy. We need to fight. Democrats across the country are using this summer to build the infrastructure we need to build a historic blue wave that will take back Congress and give us back a much needed tool to stop the administration. While the National Party focuses on a few dozen set piece battleground districts it's on No Dem Left Behind to shore up our flanks in rural districts - places where we can 't afford to leave democrats behind. If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donations will go through immediately: Thank you in advance for your support. No Dem Left Behind Staff | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Announces $4.975 Million Settlement of Ashli Babbitt Wrongful Death Lawsuit with U.S. Government
body:
Judicial Watch announced a $4.975 million settlement in the wrongful death lawsuit against the U.S. Government filed on behalf of the family of Ashli Babbitt, the U.S. Air Force veteran who was shot and killed inside the U.S. Capitol by then-Capitol Police Lt. Michael Byrd on January 6, 2021. Ashli Babbitt was the only January 6 homicide victim.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jun 9, 2025
---|---|---
| [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74521&L=32849&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoYm9vay5jb20/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2d4ef7f355a4ae58114b59484ce7da67eecb4a6531f3b54561a26a85955f8099) | |

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced a $4.975 million settlement in the wrongful death lawsuit against the U.S. Government filed on behalf of the family of Ashli Babbitt, the U.S. Air Force veteran who was shot and killed inside the U.S. Capitol by then-Capitol Police Lt. Michael Byrd on January 6, 2021. Ashli Babbitt was the only January 6 homicide victim. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jun 9, 2025 ---|---|--- | | | | RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" \- Sean Hannity Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced a $4.975 million settlement today in the wrongful death lawsuit against the U.S. Government filed on behalf of the family of Ashli Babbitt, the U.S. Air Force veteran who was shot and killed inside the U.S. Capitol by then-Capitol Police Lt. Michael Byrd on January 6, 2021. Ashli Babbitt was the only January 6 homicide victim. ---|--- | | | | | “It is an injustice that the courts would deny a federal candidate the ability to challenge an election provision that could lead to illegal votes being cast and counted for two weeks AFTER Election Day,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The Supreme Court’s decision to hear this case is a critical opportunity to uphold federal law, protect voter rights, and ensure election integrity. Illinois’ 14-day extension of Election Day thwarts federal law, violates the civil rights of voters, and invites fraud.” ---|--- | | | | | Though President Trump issued an executive order banning governmentwide diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) programs on the day of his inauguration, two federal law enforcement agencies that operate near the White House continue to implement, celebrate, and promote controversial DEI initiatives launched under the Biden administration. ---|--- | | | | | Long plagued by waste and corruption, the nation’s massive food stamp program has reached a new low with a multi-million-dollar fraud and bribery scheme abetted by an insider at the U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA), the agency that administers the scandal-plagued welfare program. It gets better. ---|--- | | | The Epoch Times Judicial Watch, the group that brought the appeal on behalf of the petitioners, hailed the Supreme Court’s decision to accept the case. “It is an injustice that the courts would deny a federal candidate the ability to challenge an election provision that could lead to illegal votes being cast and counted for two weeks after Election Day,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton told The Epoch Times. The Hill In their petition to the high court, Bost and the two electors said the decision disrupts a long line of cases enabling federal political candidates to challenge election regulations. “In the aftermath of the 2020 elections, however, for a variety of reasons, courts have limited candidates’ ability to challenge the electoral rules governing their campaigns. This case presents the latest—and an extreme—example of this trend,” their attorneys wrote. Judicial Watch “These records detail how the DEI agenda helped change the mission statement of West Point – and how leadership under the Biden administration tried to cover it up,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2025, All Rights Reserved |

body:
The Left is blocking President Trump’s deportation orders.
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=978c9960fd714b43b7a9b456d3ab7e45&_e=pAGQYHxCh5jivkPTiUKHkpSlHKsOwJAZDxXodbdGo_7aA0LL5zzBQJOMGcfTlwsN_a-E5MGDzKe3cRLejSsCDvh5pbsM69T_ea-VOmcSMBUsb0rsV1Jcqw8JojOcIUviOFf0DqfvQtEuNZe5Mne4zY-1koFAtEtWcxB5tiZGSQRQQ1l9MVuk0tYj8nMAAmwTmk4tmHQir68tBZLKwm7P4niAd0OslsaPdp3x6anJgYFnQHLzcJxkwyo40AViiYMFZHs7BE8fF0LwfIAwJkzb-72i_8aLZZlHdo2ELf1zmkWG7MM29Q8hzbkJOnYdPB4hcK-ox_N-Sg2ftG74X6retRPlwX1ORADRKewsk49tW1fEJYlb1LTQMrJH75y9x-Nhq93WSRLIqawIwpy5uEknmDg6MRKP9cR_gSlO036uoWU%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

President Trump is fighting tooth and nail to **get dangerous illegal criminals out of our country** --but the radical Left is doing everything they can to **BLOCK him.**

This is madness--and it's happening right now.

_They 're funneling money into lawsuits, obstructing ICE, and attacking our law enforcement._ And now, they're ramping up their efforts.

That's why we've launched an emergency **$50,000 rapid-response goal** that we MUST hit by **MIDNIGHT TONIGHT** to counter their efforts.

The American people elected President Trump to put **America First,** and now is the time to prove it.

_**[Will you step up before midnight to help deport violent criminal illegals and defend the rule of law?>>](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=978c9960fd714b43b7a9b456d3ab7e45&_e=pAGQYHxCh5jivkPTiUKHkpSlHKsOwJAZDxXodbdGo_7aA0LL5zzBQJOMGcfTlwsN_a-E5MGDzKe3cRLejSsCDvh5pbsM69T_ea-VOmcSMBUsb0rsV1Jcqw8JojOcIUviOFf0DqfvQtEuNZe5Mne4zY-1koFAtEtWcxB5tiZGSQRQQ1l9MVuk0tYj8nMAAmwTmk4tmHQir68tBZLKwm7P4niAd0OslsaPdp3x6anJgYFnQHLzcJxkwyo40AViiYMFNEqjYzC1xiDbbv09RgEmZSqu-6cWoZB04CCMq20THl-dp8ltfPxljT3uJHkYjZwbwQ39ofhME5AISBVyjx5UgZ5FXbdPQNrYmecB18hfBuyva5ZQkGTpEPZF2aX9HUjkKpOK6mP1jXjtCjtQ8xH3UEqkRcq1bsfOCskFSZUwkHg%3D)**_

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=978c9960fd714b43b7a9b456d3ab7e45&_e=pAGQYHxCh5jivkPTiUKHkpSlHKsOwJAZDxXodbdGo_7aA0LL5zzBQJOMGcfTlwsN_a-E5MGDzKe3cRLejSsCDvh5pbsM69T_ea-VOmcSMBUsb0rsV1Jcqw8JojOcIUviOFf0DqfvQtEuNZe5Mne4zY-1koFAtEtWcxB5tiZGSQRQQ1l9MVuk0tYj8nMAAmwTmk4tmHQir68tBZLKwm7P4niAd0OslsaPdp3x6anJgYFnQHLzcJxkwyo40AViiYMFxFgUDTnDxcvR1AJpuT1yEOPbQP3DpzHsOANjcUkaUE05sySA3BR30aAICP_uPS1bji5rw5k1c_stWpbAD38jHoNgCiQkyl-AOgu6y4iMb7RXVq-oDkgpwUTdq2WC-fdjo2h9XB8Gz3xbzbAgkGQMfZOp9_UOGhquQ3PJg6NpX5s%3D)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Today, Trump’s travel ban takes place
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Trump’s entire immigration agenda is a far-right crackdown on civil liberties, human rights, and all of our communities.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1663%2E791427%2ErJ45xt)

Friend, Trump’s travel ban takes place today under the backdrop of massive public outcry against ICE raids across the country.
**Trump’s entire immigration agenda is a far-right crackdown on civil liberties, human rights, and all of our communities.**
The travel ban going into effect would bar people from 12 different countries from entering the US, targeting countries in Africa and the Middle East.
For some Americans, it will mean their partners, spouses, or children will be banned from reuniting with them here. It will mean missing weddings and graduations and funerals.
And it’s not a mistake that most of the affected countries are Muslim-majority. This is a racist policy that will not make us safe — it will only sow more division, endanger lives, and betray our values.
Meanwhile, Trump has been using ICE as a personal secret police, arresting college students for exercising free speech, ripping families apart, and sending US residents to a dangerous prison in El Salvador without any charges or due process.
It’s no surprise that Trump was looking for the first chance he could get to send the National Guard into a city like Los Angeles and escalate a situation into violence — **this administration is dead set on brutally enforcing its far-right agenda. Americans have a right to resist.**
I am doing everything I can as an immigrant myself, who came to this country for the promise of a better future, to build a movement that protects immigrants and their essential place in our nation.
To make sure that everyone knows their rights, and that this administration is held accountable for violating them. If you’re with me, please:

Congress has a crucial role to play in defending our democracy and our American values alongside those who are protesting to defend their communities.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june25.Nm0oDJ&refcode=em250609-1-210&t=2&akid=1663%2E791427%2ErJ45xt)

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: selling you out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
I’m showing up and fighting back – not just with words, but with actions.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109277825/550574055/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-06-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2VhZTg4Ny02OTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x50YnSvkB_5KLRaKetWJ1BVACFXPJz72MYkPXP4Fu3o=)
---
| Here’s the truth, team –

Republicans are no longer the "party of family values" or "fiscal responsibility." They’re the party of selling out those who need the most help for those who ALREADY have the most.

We saw this play out last month, when a Republican House majority pushed through a disastrous budget bill – the single biggest cut to healthcare in history, and the biggest tax breaks to billionaires and big corporations.

**Not only are they ripping away your hard-earned money, they’re ripping away your hard-earned benefits too.**

I’m showing up and fighting back – not just with words, but with actions. I’m fighting to protect affordable healthcare, preserve the Great Lakes, and support Michigan’s rail and clean energy projects to create jobs and strengthen our rural communities.

**I’ll never stop fighting, but right now, national Republican mega-donors are planning to flood our state with millions of dollars in attack ads to cover more ground and undo the progress we’ve made. clean_body: I’m showing up and fighting back – not just with words, but with actions. | = | Here’s the truth, team – Republicans are no longer the "party of family values" or "fiscal responsibility." They’re the party of selling out those who need the most help for those who ALREADY have the most. We saw this play out last month, when a Republican House majority pushed through a disastrous budget bill – the single biggest cut to healthcare in history, and the biggest tax breaks to billionaires and big corporations. Not only are they ripping away your hard-earned money, they’re ripping away your hard-earned benefits too. I’m showing up and fighting back – not just with words, but with actions. I’m fighting to protect affordable healthcare, preserve the Great Lakes, and support Michigan’s rail and clean energy projects to create jobs and strengthen our rural communities. I’ll never stop fighting, but right now, national Republican mega-donors are planning to flood our state with millions of dollars in attack ads to cover more ground and undo the progress we’ve made. At JanePAC, we believe in showing up and showing receipts. So today, we’re giving you a look at exactly where we’re investing _our_ time and _your_ grassroots dollars. **_Take a look at some of our upcoming races where we’ve endorsed incredible climate leaders:_** | **Election Date** | **State** | **Candidates** | **Seat**
---|---|---|---
**6/10** | **New Jersey** | **Katie Brennan & Ravi Bhalla** | **Assembly, LD-32**
**11/4** | **Virginia** | **Kimberly Pope Adams** | **HD-82**
**11/4** | **Virginia** | **Rodney Willett** | **HD-58**
**11/4** | **Virginia** | **Joshua Cole** | **HD-65**
**11/4** | **Virginia** | **Atoosa Reaser** | **HD-27**
**11/4** | **Virginia** | **Rae Cousins** | **HD-79**
**11/4** | **Virginia** | **Phil Hernandez** | **HD-94**

**11/4** | **Virginia** | **John McAuliff** | **HD-30**

**11/4** | **Virginia** | **Rozia Henson** | **HD-19**
**11/4** | **Virginia** | **Marty Martinez** | **HD-29**
While the federal government wages an all-out war on climate progress, with your help, we’re investing in some of the most critical races that can have the biggest impact on the air you breathe, the water you swim in, and the neighborhoods we call home.
**These are must-win opportunities to elect climate leaders who will actually step up for our communities — and hold the line where Washington won’t.[Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars so we can continue to help these candidates _(and more)_ reach and mobilize the voters they need to win?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109278011/550574780/2105508926?refcode=ea.4427589d-6a45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.4427589d-6a45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0Mjc1ODlkLTZhNDUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gM5eyDxN1eL9m98hKd52JDZL4Cu3D-S7iNA1LhJn4Nw=)**
As you can see, we’re heavily focused on Virginia, and for good reason. Every single seat in the House of Delegates is on the ballot this November. Republicans only need to flip **TWO seats** to take back control, and they’re already spending six figures in ads attacking some of these incredible climate leaders to make it happen.
But we’ve been here before. Together, we flipped this chamber in 2023, and now we’re working around the clock to keep it that way.
Meanwhile, in New Jersey, our endorsed candidates are running in one of the most competitive legislative primaries in the state — **and it’s happening tomorrow!** This is a race we can’t afford to overlook.
**[By investing in JanePAC’s work today, you’re owning a piece of the victories to come in 2025 and beyond. We know this team can help maintain our momentum, so we’re asking: Will you chip in a few dollars to help us power these climate champions to victory?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109278012/550574781/2105508926?refcode=ea.4427589d-6a45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.4427589d-6a45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0Mjc1ODlkLTZhNDUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gM5eyDxN1eL9m98hKd52JDZL4Cu3D-S7iNA1LhJn4Nw=)**

clean_body: We’re proud to be transparent about the fights we’re in. | At JanePAC, we believe in showing up and showing receipts. So today, we’re giving you a look at exactly where we’re investing our time and your grassroots dollars. Take a look at some of our upcoming races where we’ve endorsed incredible climate leaders: | Election Date | State | Candidates | Seat ---|---|---|--- 6/10 | New Jersey | Katie Brennan & Ravi Bhalla | Assembly, LD-32 11/4 | Virginia | Kimberly Pope Adams | HD-82 11/4 | Virginia | Rodney Willett | HD-58 11/4 | Virginia | Joshua Cole | HD-65 11/4 | Virginia | Atoosa Reaser | HD-27 11/4 | Virginia | Rae Cousins | HD-79 11/4 | Virginia | Phil Hernandez | HD-94 11/4 | Virginia | Lily Franklin | HD-41 11/4 | Virginia | John McAuliff | HD-30 11/4 | Virginia | Elizabeth Guzman | HD-22 11/4 | Virginia | Rozia Henson | HD-19 11/4 | Virginia | Marty Martinez | HD-29 While the federal government wages an all-out war on climate progress, with your help, we’re investing in some of the most critical races that can have the biggest impact on the air you breathe, the water you swim in, and the neighborhoods we call home. These are must-win opportunities to elect climate leaders who will actually step up for our communities — and hold the line where Washington won’t.= As you can see, we’re heavily focused on Virginia, and for good reason. Every single seat in the House of Delegates is on the ballot this November. Republicans only need to flip TWO seats to take back control, and they’re already spending six figures in ads attacking some of these incredible climate leaders to make it happen. But we’ve been here before. Together, we flipped this chamber in 2023, and now we’re working around the clock to keep it that way. Meanwhile, in New Jersey, our endorsed candidates are running in one of the most competitive legislative primaries in the state — and it’s happening tomorrow! This is a race we can’t afford to overlook. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s do this. Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

I just walked out of a weekly meeting with my team, and they are putting me to the test, Patriot.

They told me I need 900 patriots to join my **2025 Exclusive Patriot First Membership,** and right now, I'm only _204 members shy_ of hitting that goal.

I'm writing to ask you to confirm your membership before 11:59 p.m. tonight because I **know** you care about our mission. As a member, you will be among the first to hear from me about critical updates, exclusive campaign content, and benchmarks we are hitting along the way to undo Joe Biden and his liberal pals' policies.

body:
The reason you are hearing so much about Los Angeles right now is because Donald Trump wants to distract the media and provoke a response.
#
Peter:
The reason you are hearing so much about Los Angeles right now is because Donald Trump wants to distract the media and provoke a response.
He wants violence and disorder because it gives him justification to enact his dictator’s wish list: Invoking the Insurrection Act, declaring martial law, and suspending the Constitution.
He wants people looking at Los Angeles because it will help him pass his disaster of a budget — gutting health care, food assistance, vital services, and giving billionaires a massive tax cut — without any scrutiny or attention.
He started this fire, and he’s politicizing the National Guard so he can act like he’s putting it out. With Trump, it is always spectacle before substance. This is no different.
It’s going to take a lot of focus and resolve to make sure he does not get what he wants. We must exert political pressure and hold Trump and his thugs accountable if we’re going to force them to back down.
That starts with demanding that Trump rescind his order federalizing the California National Guard. Take the Troops out of harm's way and de-escalate before more people get hurt.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Human rights activists attacked and abducted by Israeli forces
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

As millions of Palestinians, including children and infants, face
starvation and man-made famine in Gaza while the Israeli government
continues to block aid, a group of unarmed activists known as the Freedom
Flotilla Coalition bravely tried to sail to Gaza on a humanitarian mission
to deliver baby formula, food, and medical supplies to Palestinians.

But last night, the Freedom Flotilla’s ship, the Madleen, was attacked and
intercepted by Israeli forces.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250609-signup-israelarmsembargo?source=em20250609-36745&akid=36745%2E1203867%2EqKbqZj ]Security camera image of passangers on the Madleen being detained by
Issraeli forces.

Among those on board were Swedish activist Greta Thunberg and French
member of the European Parliament Rima Hassan, both of whom were detained.
Israeli authorities now say they plan to show the activists footage of
October 7 before deporting them, an act meant to intimidate, deflect, and
justify violence, rather than address the humanitarian crisis at hand.

Israel does not have the legal authority to detain civilians in
international waters.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250609-signup-israelarmsembargo?source=em20250609-36745&akid=36745%2E1203867%2EqKbqZj ]Screenshot of a post on X from Mehdi Hasan (@mehdirhasan) that reads:
'Let’s be clear: Israel, an occupier, has no authority under international
law to board or divert the Madleen. This is a hijacking, plain and simple.
A hijacking of a UK-registered ship, with multiple European citizens on
board. Anything to say @Keir_Starmer or @vonderleyen?'

Once again, Israeli officials have acted with total impunity just to stop
desperately needed food and supplies from reaching Palestinians — a war
crime.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250609-signup-israelarmsembargo?source=em20250609-36745&akid=36745%2E1203867%2EqKbqZj ]Israel must be held accountable for its ongoing crimes against
humanity, including this abduction of human rights activists. Add your
name to demand an arms embargo NOW!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250609-signup-israelarmsembargo?source=em20250609-36745&akid=36745%2E1203867%2EqKbqZj ]Add Your Name

Israel is breaking international law by starving millions of Palestinian
civilians and obstructing the delivery of humanitarian aid. The U.S.
cannot continue to supply Israel with weapons and enable its genocide —
It’s beyond time for Congress to act.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250609-36745-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36745_1203867_qKbqZj&akid=36745%2E1203867%2EqKbqZj

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, As millions of Palestinians, including children and infants, face starvation and man-made famine in Gaza while the Israeli government continues to block aid, a group of unarmed activists known as the Freedom Flotilla Coalition bravely tried to sail to Gaza on a humanitarian mission to deliver baby formula, food, and medical supplies to Palestinians. But last night, the Freedom Flotilla’s ship, the Madleen, was attacked and intercepted by Israeli forces. [ ]Security camera image of passangers on the Madleen being detained by Issraeli forces. Among those on board were Swedish activist Greta Thunberg and French member of the European Parliament Rima Hassan, both of whom were detained. Israeli authorities now say they plan to show the activists footage of October 7 before deporting them, an act meant to intimidate, deflect, and justify violence, rather than address the humanitarian crisis at hand. Israel does not have the legal authority to detain civilians in international waters. [ ]Screenshot of a post on X from Mehdi Hasan (@mehdirhasan) that reads: 'Let’s be clear: Israel, an occupier, has no authority under international law to board or divert the Madleen. This is a hijacking, plain and simple. A hijacking of a UK-registered ship, with multiple European citizens on board. Anything to say @KeirStarmer or @vonderleyen?' Once again, Israeli officials have acted with total impunity just to stop desperately needed food and supplies from reaching Palestinians — a war crime. [ ]Israel must be held accountable for its ongoing crimes against humanity, including this abduction of human rights activists. Add your name to demand an arms embargo NOW! [ ]Add Your Name Israel is breaking international law by starving millions of Palestinian civilians and obstructing the delivery of humanitarian aid. The U.S. cannot continue to supply Israel with weapons and enable its genocide — It’s beyond time for Congress to act. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

He’s challenging the administration's civil rights investigation targeting City Hall for its rightful appointment of individuals who mirror Chicago’s vibrant diversity. clean_body: | | | Local governments are emerging as formidable bastions of resistance against Trump's draconian agenda, demonstrating the incredible potential of our communities to defy tyranny with courage and conviction. Take Chicago, for instance, where Mayor Brandon Johnson is pushing back against Trump's naked racism and authoritarianism. He’s challenging the administration's civil rights investigation targeting City Hall for its rightful appointment of individuals who mirror Chicago’s vibrant diversity. Johnson's bold stance serves as a rallying cry for local leaders to counter Trump's insidious weaponization of the Justice Department, aimed at imposing a racist agenda on our communities. Now, more than ever, amplifying initiatives that fortify local democracy is imperative. By supporting the Local Democracy Project, you become an integral part of a grassroots movement building an indomitable network of resistance. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. This is not just about resisting an authoritarian figure; it's about empowering our communities to embrace diversity and equity. Across the nation, Democrats and local leaders are seizing opportunities to counter Trump's divisive tactics, standing up for their constituents, and energizing their ranks. Mayor Johnson’s actions remind us of the critical role local governments play in safeguarding democracy. Join us in our fight to save democracy and empower local communities to create lasting change.** Resistance is local. -Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109279913/550581337/14197196?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_WhatIf_250609_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzRmMThlZi03MDQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QW7Qxa-KEFgbEYNgbaPgjVXwv0uQtTWZhtuB8yMf9nk=) Team,

We’re writing to you today to ask if there’s anything we can say to convince you to **_[donate to the Ohio Democratic Party before our numbers go public at the end of the month.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109279914/550581338/14197196?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_WhatIf_250609_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzRmMThlZi03MDQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QW7Qxa-KEFgbEYNgbaPgjVXwv0uQtTWZhtuB8yMf9nk=)_**

What if we told you that the outcome of next year’s election in Ohio is being shaped _**right now?**_

What if we told you that Republicans aren’t waiting for 2026 — they’re already laying the groundwork to outspend and attack us in key districts?

Here’s the truth: if we want Ohio Democrats to win races up and down the ballot — from local offices to statewide contests — we can’t afford to fall behind now. Whatever happens next year will be thanks to the grassroots movement we build _**today.**_

Ohio Republicans have deep pockets and national billionaire allies ready to flood Ohio with outside spending. But we’ve got something stronger: people like you who believe in building a state that works for all of us, not just the powerful few.

So what if we told you that your donation — right now — could help power the kind of movement that wins tough races?

**_[If you’re able, please chip in anything you can to help us win up and down the ballot next clean_body: | = Team, We’re writing to you today to ask if there’s anything we can say to convince you to = What if we told you that the outcome of next year’s election in Ohio is being shaped right now? What if we told you that Republicans aren’t waiting for 2026 — they’re already laying the groundwork to outspend and attack us in key districts? Here’s the truth: if we want Ohio Democrats to win races up and down the ballot — from local offices to statewide contests — we can’t afford to fall behind now. Whatever happens next year will be thanks to the grassroots movement we build today. Ohio Republicans have deep pockets and national billionaire allies ready to flood Ohio with outside spending. But we’ve got something stronger: people like you who believe in building a state that works for all of us, not just the powerful few. So what if we told you that your donation — right now — could help power the kind of movement that wins tough races? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Ohio Dems = | Ohio Democratic Party PO Box 130 Columbus, Ohio 43216 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

subject: UPDATE: National Guard now ON THE GROUND in Los Angeles!!
body:

This moment requires IMMEDIATE ACTION. Help us support Democrats FIGHTING BACK against these authoritarian tactics by chipping in any amount now!!! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=060925_rr_GA2]

subject: Brace yourself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:

Right now, the GOP is using LGBTQ+ people as pawns. They’re not offering solutions to make everyone's lives better. Instead, they’re busy launching attacks — on our rights and yes, on me. **As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be moments like this. But I didn’t run for Congress to debate which bathroom I use or entertain cruelty from my Republican colleagues. ** I ran to deliver for working families. To fight for paid leave. To protect our freedoms. And I will never stop defending the LGBTQ+ community from attacks, manufactured distractions, and the hostility too many of us endure every day. I won’t let the GOP’s pettiness and bullying derail my work. Has it been easy? No. These fights never are. But I’ve never felt alone — because I have people like you and Fair Shot PAC standing with me. **[If I can count on your support this Pride Month, split a donation of $5 or whatever you can between my campaign and Fair Shot PAC today. Growing up, I couldn’t imagine a future like mine. I wasn’t sure this country’s heart was big enough to love someone like me.
Over the last decade, though, I’ve been able to bear witness to change that once seemed so impossible to me as a kid that it was almost incomprehensible. Because people believed it could. Because we fought for it.
That’s what Pride means to me. It's a call to action and a reminder that even in the face of hate, we have the power to fight back with love, with truth, and with unshakable resolve.
[**So this Pride Month, if you’re ready to do your part to create a better future for all of us, please consider making a split donation of $5 between my campaign and Fair Shot PAC.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109280760/550584315/1135572402?amount=5&refcode=AU_FSP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzRlZWNiNC03NDQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DQT9vHOmxExOctGOqTxKgK-GbxI85Hlzs8q278OHLkY=)

clean_body: I’ve never felt alone because I have people like you standing with me. | = = Hi Peter, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride. Right now, the GOP is using LGBTQ+ people as pawns. They’re not offering solutions to make everyone's lives better. Instead, they’re busy launching attacks — on our rights and yes, on me. As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be moments like this. But I didn’t run for Congress to debate which bathroom I use or entertain cruelty from my Republican colleagues. I ran to deliver for working families. To fight for paid leave. To protect our freedoms. And I will never stop defending the LGBTQ+ community from attacks, manufactured distractions, and the hostility too many of us endure every day. I won’t let the GOP’s pettiness and bullying derail my work. Has it been easy? No. These fights never are. But I’ve never felt alone — because I have people like you and Fair Shot PAC standing with me. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Growing up, I couldn’t imagine a future like mine. I wasn’t sure this country’s heart was big enough to love someone like me. Over the last decade, though, I’ve been able to bear witness to change that once seemed so impossible to me as a kid that it was almost incomprehensible. Because people believed it could. Because we fought for it. That’s what Pride means to me. It's a call to action and a reminder that even in the face of hate, we have the power to fight back with love, with truth, and with unshakable resolve. = = Thank you and Happy Pride! Sarah Fair Shot PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States | mailto:info@fairshotpac.org | Paid for by Fair Shot PAC

| | Friend, The road to 2026 is already underway, and the financial groundwork we lay today will determine what is possible in the fights ahead. I want to be transparent with you: right now, the End-of-Quarter deadline we are staring down is not looking good. We are pacing at roughly 20% behind our projections for our End-of-Quarter deadline. _Fortunately, I have the most committed and thoughtful team of supporters in the country—people like you who understand what is at stake and believe in a better future for our communities._ [**We have built real momentum. We are delivering results and refusing to back down when the stakes are high. clean_body: From the desk of Tom Kean.| | | | | Friend, The road to 2026 is already underway, and the financial groundwork we lay today will determine what is possible in the fights ahead. I want to be transparent with you: right now, the End-of-Quarter deadline we are staring down is not looking good. We are pacing at roughly 20% behind our projections for our End-of-Quarter deadline. Fortunately, I have the most committed and thoughtful team of supporters in the country—people like you who understand what is at stake and believe in a better future for our communities. So I am asking: will you make a contribution today to help us close the gap and finish this quarter strong? | | | | | | | | | | Every major victory starts with moments like this. This race will always be a nail-biter because it’s one of the most competitive in the country. Believe me when I tell you:_every dollar counts._

If we don’t meet our FEC goal, it sends exactly the wrong message to the Republicans and outside groups watching this race closely.

Sen. Markwayne Mullin **[dropped a truth bomb on CNN,](https://substack.com/redirect/8f9a95e4-e1bc-417e-8467-15a6638b23cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Sunday, after Dana Bash cited California police who claimed the riots are "under control" and that Trump's National Guard deployment is making the situation worse.
She wasn't ready for him to say this...
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8f9a95e4-e1bc-417e-8467-15a6638b23cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8f9a95e4-e1bc-417e-8467-15a6638b23cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Why does this situation justify the president bypassing California's governor entirely?" Bash asked the senator.
"You have a very weak, lawless governor, Governor Newsom, who is not enforcing the nation's laws, and then you have a Biden administration for the last 4 years who didn't enforce our immigration laws," Mullin fired back. "If the governor or mayor of the city isn't willing to protect the citizens of their state or city, then the president will!"
Bash asked, "The LA County Police say that they have it under control, and Governor Newsom says that sending the National Guard is purposefully enflaming and will only escalate tensions there."
**["I'll ask you, does it look like it was under control?"](https://substack.com/redirect/8f9a95e4-e1bc-417e-8467-15a6638b23cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Mullin returned the question. "It doesn't! It is absolutely not under control! You saw rioters throwing rocks, being extremely aggressive not only at federal agents but also the county and local PD that was there."
Watch Mullin blast CNN with the cold hard facts about the raging LA riots:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8f9a95e4-e1bc-417e-8467-15a6638b23cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Sponsored by Health Science Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/205b611f-4c5c-410d-ba55-aa688dd3ad55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Trump admin targets COVID vaccine [Big Pharma LIVID]**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/205b611f-4c5c-410d-ba55-aa688dd3ad55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader
He's done it again...
RFK Jr is finally following the science and tossing out guidelines saying children need yearly COVID vaccines, and Big Pharma is LIVID.
The COVID vaccine is one of their biggest cash cows... making them over $25 Billion in 2023 alone!
But what really scares them is what could be coming next. RFK Jr is now in perfect position to reveal **[Big Pharma's biggest secret](https://substack.com/redirect/205b611f-4c5c-410d-ba55-aa688dd3ad55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. We're talking about hundreds-of-billions in ill-gotten profits and dark money political donations, which is why they'll do anything to keep you from learning about **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/205b611f-4c5c-410d-ba55-aa688dd3ad55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
You can get full details on **[the secret](https://substack.com/redirect/205b611f-4c5c-410d-ba55-aa688dd3ad55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Big Pharma hopes you'll never hear by watching **[this video](https://substack.com/redirect/205b611f-4c5c-410d-ba55-aa688dd3ad55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** TODAY.
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/205b611f-4c5c-410d-ba55-aa688dd3ad55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. Republicans and democrats will be equally outraged by this **[stunning Big Pharma secret](https://substack.com/redirect/205b611f-4c5c-410d-ba55-aa688dd3ad55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** ... But most importantly, it could just save your life. Get the full facts **[here now](https://substack.com/redirect/205b611f-4c5c-410d-ba55-aa688dd3ad55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available online.
* * *
# BREAKING: 500 Marines to deploy to LA riots
A battalion of 500 U.S. Marines from the 2nd Battalion, 7th Marines at Twentynine Palms **[is being deployed to Los Angeles](https://substack.com/redirect/1537b311-48c2-4710-b3bc-7f7889471681?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to respond to anti-immigration enforcement riots. The Marines will protect federal property and personnel in an open-ended deployment, though they won't have a law enforcement role.
* The Marine deployment comes after President Trump already sent 2,000 National Guardsmen to the riot-affected city over the weekend. It's unclear what the Marines' rules of engagement will be if protesters become violent or throw objects at them.
* Trump expressed confidence that the situation is improving, telling reporters "I think we have it very well under control" and that while it "was heading in the wrong direction," it's now "heading in the right direction." The deployment suggests federal authorities are taking a significant security posture in response to the unrest.

* * *
# Trump vows to SHUT DOWN "insurrectionist mob" in Los Angeles
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c8236816-3807-4760-81ad-2287e594dc24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Donald Trump announced he would "liberate Los Angeles" in a Sunday **[Truth Social post,](https://substack.com/redirect/c8236816-3807-4760-81ad-2287e594dc24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** outlining his intention to put down the uprising of violent anti-ICE radicals.
* **Trump Speaks Out on Truth Social:** "A once great American City, Los Angeles, has been invaded and occupied by Illegal Aliens and Criminals. Now violent, insurrectionist mobs are swarming and attacking our Federal Agents to try and stop our deportation operations," Trump wrote.
"But these lawless riots only strengthen our resolve," he continued. "Order will be restored, the Illegals will be expelled, and Los Angeles will be set free. Thank you for your attention to this matter!"
* **Trump Summons his Cabinet:** Trump announced he would be involving Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem, Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth, and Attorney General Pam Bondi, "in coordination with all other relevant Departments and Agencies," to liberate Los Angeles from the "Migrant Invasion."
* **Federal Response to Unrest** : The deployment followed escalating demonstrations in response to federal immigration raids in the city, including vandalism, freeway blockages, and protesters throwing cement and setting off fireworks at law enforcement.
* **State and Local Opposition** : California Governor Gavin Newsom and Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass have condemned the federal intervention, calling it unconstitutional and an infringement on state sovereignty. In another Truth Social post, Trump blamed these Democrat leaders poor leadership for the chaos in the first place.

* * *
# Sean Hannity CONFRONTS former Biden spokesperson on live T.V. for covering up Biden's mental decline
Sean Hannity **[confronted a Biden special assistant](https://substack.com/redirect/b7ab58ae-194d-448e-b994-71f9855ce102?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Fox News, accusing him of covering up the former president's mental decline.
_" I don't believe you!!!"_
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b7ab58ae-194d-448e-b994-71f9855ce102?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b7ab58ae-194d-448e-b994-71f9855ce102?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The conversation occurred amid a recent book published by CNN's Jake Tapper about the media's bias when covering the President's clear mental decay over the course of his presidency.
Many conservatives find the book ironic, as CNN is a notoriously liberal media outlet and the main culprit of the skewed reporting they are now claiming to expose.
Michael LaRosa, former press secretary to First Lady Jill Biden, stayed consistent about his claim that he did not see any sort of mental decline from the former president until the first debate with President Donald Trump in June of 2024.
"**[I think you're full of crap,](https://substack.com/redirect/b7ab58ae-194d-448e-b994-71f9855ce102?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**" Hannity said. "I could spend the next hour...playing him struggling, shaking air, not knowing where to go, talking to dead people. He could barely utter a sentence. He was a shell of his former self."

"Either you don't have eyes to see or ears to hear, or you're just politically blinded, if I'm being charitable, or you're just a political hack, but**[you can't say you didn't see it. I don't believe you."](https://substack.com/redirect/b7ab58ae-194d-448e-b994-71f9855ce102?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **Hannity added.
LaRosa refused to admit he realized the president's mental decline earlier on, claiming, "The American people saw the same thing, and the same access that you did, and he still won by 7 million votes, and has the most votes ever received by any president in American history!"
**[Watch Hannity call this guy out on live T.V:](https://substack.com/redirect/b7ab58ae-194d-448e-b994-71f9855ce102?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Cheesy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I feel so loved.
#

Hi friend — Gabby here. As you might’ve heard, yesterday was my birthday.
I just wanted to take a minute and say THANK YOU! Thank you for all the birthday wishes. I feel so loved.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250609-1-b&t=1&akid=10563%2E3935704%2EpF4Yql)
I’m not supposed to share my wish, but I can’t help it. **I wish to continue our progress to make our communities even safer from gun violence.**
I know it’s cheesy, but I’m serious.
When GIFFORDS was founded, elected officials didn’t dare to touch the issue of guns. They thought it was political poison.
We changed that narrative.
We said enough is enough. We put the NRA on defense. And we defied the odds to pass lifesaving legislation across the country.
But you and I both know there’s more work to do. We must continue taking on these tough fights and raising our voices — for our children. For our communities. For our country.
I’m so grateful for your commitment in this fight.
Best,
Gabby Giffords
**Hi — before you scroll away! Can you help make Gabby’s birthday even more special?**
June officially marks the end of the quarter. Believe it or not, this is the first full FEC deadline since Donald Trump took office.
The Trump administration is working to undo our progress every day, including stripping millions of dollars from student mental health grants and essentially legalizing machine guns._
We must turn up the pressure. While Donald Trump relies on wealthy, far-right billionaires to power his campaign, we’re counting on folks like you — chipping in just a few bucks at a time._
[**If you’re able, we’d appreciate it if you can pitch in a contribution to help Gabby continue the fight. Our average gift is around $25.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/62474?c0=giffords-em-june25.Mpc_cX&refcode=em250609-1-b&t=2&akid=10563%2E3935704%2EpF4Yql)
| | **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/62474?c0=giffords-em-june25.Mpc_cX&refcode=em250609-1-b&t=3&akid=10563%2E3935704%2EpF4Yql)**
---
| **[OTHER AMOUNT](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250609-1-b&t=4&akid=10563%2E3935704%2EpF4Yql)**
---

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=10563%2E3935704%2EpF4Yql) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Eliza Walton
subject: Take action: tell legislators to pass SB 1153 and protect our rivers!
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109281544/550587045/-1953338736?contactdata=gwRP+mVSj7LCU6GqNry/L94XAST92w/Ge+aqyL1O0qDOc7gRoZpjiZTshHZj4SLk7fnyjgp/VMOjg2Wq2O9F4bdOHNBM+ffuBbHShptCdVi/j2G0MzEWkc/b2eKB6u8j&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjMmQzZGU4LTc2NDUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Rm2aOUefljsFUlZLlZid8exBk6m2OGhGk09kpLL6doI=&emci=1199151e-2e42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=cc2d3de8-7645-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2107230)
---
Dear Peter, Clean water, strong rivers, and healthy fish and wildlife are part of Oregon’s identity — yet many of our state’s outdated water laws are at odds with those values. Right now, with [SB 1153](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109281545/550587046/1482363131?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjMmQzZGU4LTc2NDUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Rm2aOUefljsFUlZLlZid8exBk6m2OGhGk09kpLL6doI=&emci=1199151e-2e42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=cc2d3de8-7645-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2107230), we have a chance to protect the public benefits our rivers provide: by tightening a dangerous loophole that currently allows the Oregon Water Resources Department to approve water right changes even if they hurt our streams. [**Will you send your legislators a message to pass SB 1153?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109281546/550587047/-1953338736?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjMmQzZGU4LTc2NDUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Rm2aOUefljsFUlZLlZid8exBk6m2OGhGk09kpLL6doI=&emci=1199151e-2e42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=cc2d3de8-7645-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2107230) Right now, the state can approve applications to change existing water rights without any consideration of environmental harm. In other words, owners of water rights can modify how water is used without considering impacts to fish, wildlife, water quality, and recreation. Many of our streams are at risk of running dry, so reforms are critical for our shared water future. [**That’s why we need your help now to pass SB 1153**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109281547/550587048/-1953338736?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjMmQzZGU4LTc2NDUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Rm2aOUefljsFUlZLlZid8exBk6m2OGhGk09kpLL6doI=&emci=1199151e-2e42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=cc2d3de8-7645-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2107230), which would require the Oregon Water Resources Department to consider potential streamflow impacts as part of its existing process for reviewing proposed water right changes (called “[transfers](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109281548/550587049/-587905704?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjMmQzZGU4LTc2NDUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Rm2aOUefljsFUlZLlZid8exBk6m2OGhGk09kpLL6doI=&emci=1199151e-2e42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=cc2d3de8-7645-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2107230)”).
---
[ **Take action** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109281549/550587050/-1953338736?contactdata=gwRP+mVSj7LCU6GqNry/L94XAST92w/Ge+aqyL1O0qDOc7gRoZpjiZTshHZj4SLk7fnyjgp/VMOjg2Wq2O9F4bdOHNBM+ffuBbHShptCdVi/j2G0MzEWkc/b2eKB6u8j&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjMmQzZGU4LTc2NDUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Rm2aOUefljsFUlZLlZid8exBk6m2OGhGk09kpLL6doI=&emci=1199151e-2e42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=cc2d3de8-7645-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2107230)
---
There have been recent amendments made to SB 1153 that reflect months of hard-fought negotiations and narrow the bill to focus on non-municipal water changes with the highest risk of harm — moving streamflow diversions further upstream, and moving groundwater wells within 1⁄4 mile of a stream. SB 1153 just made it out of committee and will now be moving through the Senate and House for votes in the weeks ahead, so it needs your help now. clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, Clean water, strong rivers, and healthy fish and wildlife are part of Oregon’s identity — yet many of our state’s outdated water laws are at odds with those values. Right now, with , we have a chance to protect the public benefits our rivers provide: by tightening a dangerous loophole that currently allows the Oregon Water Resources Department to approve water right changes even if they hurt our streams. Right now, the state can approve applications to change existing water rights without any consideration of environmental harm. In other words, owners of water rights can modify how water is used without considering impacts to fish, wildlife, water quality, and recreation. Many of our streams are at risk of running dry, so reforms are critical for our shared water future. , which would require the Oregon Water Resources Department to consider potential streamflow impacts as part of its existing process for reviewing proposed water right changes (called “”). There have been recent amendments made to SB 1153 that reflect months of hard-fought negotiations and narrow the bill to focus on non-municipal water changes with the highest risk of harm — moving streamflow diversions further upstream, and moving groundwater wells within 1⁄4 mile of a stream. SB 1153 just made it out of committee and will now be moving through the Senate and House for votes in the weeks ahead, so it needs your help now. Thank you for your support, Eliza Walton (she/they) OLCV Coalition Director | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | Team, we should be investing more in caregivers and families who rely on Medicaid, **not ripping resources away from them.** **[If you agree with me, will you sign our petition and demand that Republicans put a stop to these Medicaid cuts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109282002/550588825/1189738626?refcode=AU_JH_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGM0Y2VlNS03ODQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0u3jD3fQM98uKKZAtQy8EzdkwYb4pHg6w_JsQNDHMi4=&emci=276e0087-6a45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=50c4cee5-7845-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15529135)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109282005/550588828/1189738626?refcode=AU_JH_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGM0Y2VlNS03ODQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0u3jD3fQM98uKKZAtQy8EzdkwYb4pHg6w_JsQNDHMi4=&emci=276e0087-6a45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=50c4cee5-7845-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15529135)
---
Medicaid is a deeply important program in our country — and that Republicans are cutting funding in the dead of night shows how out-of-touch and extreme they have become.
Republicans had disabled protestors who spoke out about the impacts of Medicaid wheeled out of committee. They are not holding town halls in their districts. _**They are doing everything they possibly can to ignore the people who are demanding that we step up and protect Medicaid.**_
Nearly 40% of children in Connecticut rely on Medicaid to access the health care they need.
41% of new moms and babies in Connecticut rely on Medicaid to stay healthy.
Almost HALF of working-age adults with disabilities need Medicaid to access the care they need to live full and happy lives.
And almost 70% of nursing home residents need Medicaid to pay for caregiving and prescriptions.
**[We cannot defund this essential service to give _another_ handout to wealthy billionaires. Will you add your name right now and stand with me in the fight to protect Medicaid?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109282006/550588830/1189738626?refcode=AU_JH_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGM0Y2VlNS03ODQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0u3jD3fQM98uKKZAtQy8EzdkwYb4pHg6w_JsQNDHMi4=&emci=276e0087-6a45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=50c4cee5-7845-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15529135)**

clean_body: | | Team, we should be investing more in caregivers and families who rely on Medicaid, not ripping resources away from them. | Medicaid is a deeply important program in our country — and that Republicans are cutting funding in the dead of night shows how out-of-touch and extreme they have become. Republicans had disabled protestors who spoke out about the impacts of Medicaid wheeled out of committee. They are not holding town halls in their districts. They are doing everything they possibly can to ignore the people who are demanding that we step up and protect Medicaid. Nearly 40% of children in Connecticut rely on Medicaid to access the health care they need. 41% of new moms and babies in Connecticut rely on Medicaid to stay healthy. Almost HALF of working-age adults with disabilities need Medicaid to access the care they need to live full and happy lives. And almost 70% of nursing home residents need Medicaid to pay for caregiving and prescriptions. Thank you for your support today, Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. body:
Elementary school children should not be introduced to gender-affirming ideologies in the public school system. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=edf308b467354328bce75b959671d8f9&_e=Wj81TPFxON4CDgxquIe6WE1hqb69qBbHvfic_NpiWDK1ECLobRh69WXhJxjw_SZwvQ0lr9fhXOjucyPUN4ns7FzT3FJSKJ_5q3MVOoWVhOnSoRBc_5-RTXgGSE9yAmqm1272Ahu2ESQMZ1nhyTDCDrU-OJFZ5bPsstbzJY1lRF2htDF8KgIKOrm2JE9kLx1qayqbeLt9PwAZ298gBVfBE5SZhCo2tA3pSfcUKqtkqxsUMdtZYA1p5dkleal7PsGu6T1R_pjOlEv9waUQlMQGiT1KXAA-05WLqkzvU5dateJYHdqGi85i188YdK9KlZS9yqRRUkzID_o32_eDF7yOBgFzk7U_oIgiVYS_sNpF-KrsQUQrdyvgF-ABQyo27UYqC6PYbN-nSlCPgWkNIqRbGDuBHWDICsOvjvx59FxosrM%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m asking for just a few moments of your time right now.

I’m well aware that if you’re reading this right now, you’re likely receiving many emails from countless would-be politicians introducing themselves and asking for your money.

I’m not one of them.

_**I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **_who has put his body through the ringer serving this great nation of ours, but has so much left to give for a country that has given me so much.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

A few months ago, I decided that the best way to do that would be by running for U.S. Senate against **Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** After living through this man’s governorship, his failed vice presidential campaign last fall, and having seen firsthand what his **looneytoon policies** have done to the state of Minnesota, I decided I couldn’t sit back and let another Democrat waltz into the Senate.

**Navy SEALs fight to win** , and that’s what I will do - for Minnesota and for you. I was recently asked why I would open my life up to the scrutiny of a federal campaign. While there are numerous reasons, **I want to tell you about one of the most important today: childhood education.**

Here in Minnesota and around the nation, our children are being indoctrinated. They’re being forced to learn topics beyond their years that are not in the ordinary curriculum.

Our kids deserve an education, not an agenda. Here in Minnesota, boards of education and radical left politicians, like my opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, regularly override the will of parents.

**Did you know that elementary schools around America are beginning to institute gender studies in K-5 classes? This type of curriculum should be reserved for college campuses, and only on an elective basis. Kids in first through 5th grade have no concept of this adult material and shouldn’t.
**
_**When did the government stop listening to parents and putting the will of crazed left-wing activists ahead of the concerns and beliefs of parents?**_

It’s time to put parents back in the driver's seat.

**[If you agree, please contribute a few dollars to my campaign today. I’m starting with absolutely nothing and would very much appreciate your support.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=edf308b467354328bce75b959671d8f9&_e=Wj81TPFxON4CDgxquIe6WE1hqb69qBbHvfic_NpiWDK1ECLobRh69WXhJxjw_SZwvQ0lr9fhXOjucyPUN4ns7FzT3FJSKJ_5q3MVOoWVhOnSoRBc_5-RTXgGSE9yAmqm1272Ahu2ESQMZ1nhyTDCDrU-OJFZ5bPsstbzJY1lRF2htDF8KgIKOrm2JE9kLx1qayqbeLt9PwAZ298gBVfBE5SZhCo2tA3pSfcUKqtkqxsUMdtZYA1p5dkleal7PsGu6T1R_pjOlEv9waUQlMQGiYOtfeVjRF-9WAvFuTGH_cJ1oLGDgUJZqFcR89UDVGZS3YR6P1NOBwyouYQ9INFQtjCmCAjUrRRBH2BZUQVQ6Wq3VrMVbXaUNDUG_Se43HpSUOxB04-wJC2_js0PHwyxBKMOmDDmFb2c-PcBrGJq-Wo%3D)**

[**SEND a sealTO THE SENATE**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=edf308b467354328bce75b959671d8f9&_e=Wj81TPFxON4CDgxquIe6WE1hqb69qBbHvfic_NpiWDK1ECLobRh69WXhJxjw_SZwvQ0lr9fhXOjucyPUN4ns7FzT3FJSKJ_5q3MVOoWVhOnSoRBc_5-RTXgGSE9yAmqm1272Ahu2ESQMZ1nhyTDCDrU-OJFZ5bPsstbzJY1lRF2htDF8KgIKOrm2JE9kLx1qayqbeLt9PwAZ298gBVfBE5SZhCo2tA3pSfcUKqtkqxsUMdtZYA1p5dkleal7PsGu6T1R_pjOlEv9waUQlMQGiSUlIwISURT1dpRQRfhUUR3vqo0Am2uh0CDN7_YmTjnEiMnHLzcGHXF7CYTNFtNYoqDZNZ4U1bsMQUCQj0IjhApbq4uapRj3MLEANnriywGslZKW6tNewx_5MUyysp-D1Wvc7nM8y_cQno65d7at450%3D) **_

I’m running for the United States Senate because, as a retired Navy SEAL, I’ve seen the dangers of the world, and**[I can tell you unequivocally that the radically left and woke ideologies they espouse are a form of domestic terrorism.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=edf308b467354328bce75b959671d8f9&_e=Wj81TPFxON4CDgxquIe6WE1hqb69qBbHvfic_NpiWDK1ECLobRh69WXhJxjw_SZwvQ0lr9fhXOjucyPUN4ns7FzT3FJSKJ_5q3MVOoWVhOnSoRBc_5-RTXgGSE9yAmqm1272Ahu2ESQMZ1nhyTDCDrU-OJFZ5bPsstbzJY1lRF2htDF8KgIKOrm2JE9kLx1qayqbeLt9PwAZ298gBVfBE5SZhCo2tA3pSfcUKqtkqxsUMdtZYA1p5dkleal7PsGu6T1R_pjOlEv9waUQlMQGiSEU5ujWyv5OsHCXZs2f3FWXgtYWgOuwLIh1UZeeJOf4AWLAxdrhjN86ar8nmtmiHyKPmwXY38UTjaAYzSx_gtD1uSMXUI8JGf76ovltPKU-vnHAtILZeBToNoSChUzVO7X1A4-OZOVw7jWpwlZguQI%3D)**

In liberty,
Adam Schwarze

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109282221/550589439/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjMyY2VjZTAtNzk0NS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UjHED07pct6a6OLJpjQYrafvIzBMNBf71tQu9c4-nnI=) Friend — Today, we’re reaching out to ask you to make a [**$3 contribution**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109282222/550589440/-629675555?refcode=email_060925_RS-041325&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjMyY2VjZTAtNzk0NS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UjHED07pct6a6OLJpjQYrafvIzBMNBf71tQu9c4-nnI=) to Janelle Bynum’s campaign for re-election. That’s it. Just $3. This entire campaign is powered by small dollar donations from folks across Oregon and supporters throughout the country. So when we ask you for $3, it’s not a typo. **[It’s crucial that we hit the ground running as early as possible, so even a $3 donation right now will go a really long way towards helping to keep this swing seat blue.
