clean_body: Whether serving in the Marines or as the Co-Manager of President Trump's historic winning campaign, I learned that every decision, every voice, matters. And now that the adults are once again in control, I'm turning to you for advice. This isn't just a survey. It's your chance to shape our party's strategy for the midterms, defend our MAGA majorities, and advance President Trump's America First agenda. Peter, anyone who knows me knows that I've never backed down from a fight - and we are in the fight of our lives. Radical Leftists are pouring billions into flipping red states and silencing patriots like you. We need to hear from the grassroots now, before it's too late. You've been identified as one of the top patriots in Peter, and your input will directly influence how we prioritize our resources and message in key battlegrounds. Click this personalized link to take the official Patriot Census and represent Peter: After you complete the census, I hope you'll consider making a small contribution to help the Republican National Committee build the war chest needed to keep winning. Every dollar fuels our mission to secure a future where America comes first - always. Thank you for stepping up. Chris LaCivita Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Sarah McBride
subject: As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be times like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I’ve never felt alone because I have people like you standing with me
#
Hi, it's Sarah McBride.
Right now, the GOP is using LGBTQ+ people as pawns. They’re not offering solutions to make everyone's lives better. Instead, they’re busy launching attacks — on our rights and yes, on me.
**As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be moments like this. But I didn’t run for Congress to debate which bathroom I use or entertain cruelty from my Republican colleagues.**
I ran to deliver for working families. To fight for paid leave. To protect our freedoms. And I will never stop defending the LGBTQ+ community from attacks, manufactured distractions, and the hostility too many of us endure every day.
I won’t let the GOP’s pettiness and bullying derail my work. Has it been easy? No. These fights never are. But I’ve never felt alone — because I have people like you standing with me.
[**If I can count on your support this Pride Month, pitch in $5 or whatever you can today. Every donation helps me defend the LGBTQ+ community and keep up the fight for working families in Congress.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250609-1?refcode=em20250609-2087&amount=5&refcode2=2087_21716_m6KyJL&akid=2087%2E21716%2Em6KyJL)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250609-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250609-2087&refcode2=2087_21716_m6KyJL&akid=2087%2E21716%2Em6KyJL)**
Growing up, I couldn’t imagine a future like mine. I wasn’t sure this country’s heart was big enough to love someone like me.
Over the last decade, though, I’ve been able to bear witness to change that once seemed so impossible to me as a kid that it was almost incomprehensible. **Because people believed it could. Because we fought for it.**
That’s what Pride means to me. It's a call to action and a reminder that even in the face of hate, we have the power to fight back with love, with truth, and with unshakable resolve.
[**So this Pride Month, if you’re ready to do your part to create a better future for all of us, please consider pitching in $5.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250609-1?refcode=em20250609-2087&amount=5&refcode2=2087_21716_m6KyJL&akid=2087%2E21716%2Em6KyJL)
Thank you and Happy Pride!
Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250609-1&t=1&refcode2=2087_21716_m6KyJL&akid=2087%2E21716%2Em6KyJL)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2087%2E21716%2Em6KyJL)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2087%2E21716%2Em6KyJL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2087%2E21716%2Em6KyJL)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

#
---
Hi Peter — The next few days are going to be jam-packed, so I wanted to reach out to you personally with an update. This week, the Senate returns to debate Trump’s “Big, Beautiful Bill,” and Republicans will be laser-focused on pushing their regressive budget forward. Senate Republicans aren’t even trying to hide it anymore: **Trump’s budget directly attacks several federal programs that Americans — _including their own constituents_ — depend on to live.** Trump and his cronies are working to cut Medicaid funding and rip health care away from millions of people. _Why?_ To pay for tax cuts for billionaires and throw more money at Trump’s plans for mass deportations — which will shamelessly enrich the private prisons they’re holding immigrants in without due process. **I’m in the Senate to deliver for the people of Hawaii, defend their interests, and fight back against Trump’s hateful, anti-immigrant agenda.** Trump wants to put the American dream behind a paywall or private prison bars, but I refuse to stand by and let him erode the values that built this country. **[If you’re with me, please chip in to fuel my work to hold this administration accountable, support Democratic candidates, and flip the Senate blue in 2026.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109282310/550589758/-171743829?amount=&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjU4YjQ5Mi03YTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eejwtg_1Pz--uYTEAW9zHA0ijWzACPrqJxR9oNgjXvk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109282311/550589759/-1316975115?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjU4YjQ5Mi03YTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eejwtg_1Pz--uYTEAW9zHA0ijWzACPrqJxR9oNgjXvk=)

name: EMILYs List Press
subject: Donald Trump crossed a dangerous line in Los Angeles
body:
Dictators do this. Presidents shouldn’t. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109282322/550589801/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE623_20250609_ICE_PL&sourceid=1056368&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2EzZWQ1Zi03YTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AZFJA91na8LBz2iicb_gcw1TLasRR42IJOc2t3DLx9E=) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
June 9, 2025 **SOUND THE ALARM: Trump Provokes Chaos & Fear in Los Angeles ** WASHINGTON, D.C. — In an unprecedented move, **Donald Trump crossed a dangerous line** in the use of military force against communities in Los Angeles. Trump ignored the wishes of the local and state governments and sent National Guard troops to confront peaceful protests. This decision was met with objections from California officials, including Gov. Gavin Newsom, Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass, and the Los Angeles Police Department. This is the first time in 60 years a president has deployed the National Guard without the governor's consent. It is a dangerous power grab meant to manufacture a crisis, provoke people, and create chaos.

_**Read statements from EMILYs List women who are fighting back:**_ **"Deploying federalized troops on the heels of these raids is a chaotic escalation...The fear people are feeling in our city right now is very real — it’s felt in our communities and within our families and it puts our neighborhoods at risk."
\- Mayor Karen Bass (Los Angeles, CA)** **"Trump wants a spectacle to distract Americans from what he and the Congressional Republicans are doing in Washington. He doesn't want you to focus on his threats to our rights, our healthcare, our infrastructure, our environment, and our future. Don't give Trump what he wants."
\- Rep. Laura Friedman (CA-30)** **"This deployment of the National Guard is a dangerous step towards misuse of the U.S. military in our streets...No President has the right to use the uniformed military in a way that violates the Constitution and taints the apolitical military."**
**\- Sen. Elissa Slotkin (MI)** **"Los Angeles is my home. And like so many Americans, I am appalled at what we are witnessing on the streets of our city. Deploying the National Guard is a dangerous escalation meant to provoke chaos. In addition to the recent ICE raids in Southern California and across our nation, it is part of the Trump Administration's cruel, calculated agenda to spread panic and division. This Administration's actions are not about public safety — they're about stoking fear. Fear of a community demanding dignity and due process. Protest is a powerful tool — essential in the fight for justice."
\- Former Vice President Kamala Harris** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109282323/550589802/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE623_20250609_ICE_PL&sourceid=1056368&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2EzZWQ1Zi03YTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AZFJA91na8LBz2iicb_gcw1TLasRR42IJOc2t3DLx9E=)

clean_body: Dictators do this. Presidents shouldn’t. | = FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE June 9, 2025 SOUND THE ALARM: Trump Provokes Chaos & Fear in Los Angeles WASHINGTON, D.C. — In an unprecedented move, Donald Trump crossed a dangerous line in the use of military force against communities in Los Angeles. Trump ignored the wishes of the local and state governments and sent National Guard troops to confront peaceful protests. This decision was met with objections from California officials, including Gov. Gavin Newsom, Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass, and the Los Angeles Police Department. This is the first time in 60 years a president has deployed the National Guard without the governor's consent. It is a dangerous power grab meant to manufacture a crisis, provoke people, and create chaos. Read statements from EMILYs List women who are fighting back: "Deploying federalized troops on the heels of these raids is a chaotic escalation...The fear people are feeling in our city right now is very real — it’s felt in our communities and within our families and it puts our neighborhoods at risk." \- Mayor Karen Bass (Los Angeles, CA) "Trump wants a spectacle to distract Americans from what he and the Congressional Republicans are doing in Washington. He doesn't want you to focus on his threats to our rights, our healthcare, our infrastructure, our environment, and our future. Don't give Trump what he wants." \- Rep. Laura Friedman (CA-30) "This deployment of the National Guard is a dangerous step towards misuse of the U.S. military in our streets...No President has the right to use the uniformed military in a way that violates the Constitution and taints the apolitical military." \- Sen. Elissa Slotkin (MI) "Los Angeles is my home. And like so many Americans, I am appalled at what we are witnessing on the streets of our city. Deploying the National Guard is a dangerous escalation meant to provoke chaos. In addition to the recent ICE raids in Southern California and across our nation, it is part of the Trump Administration's cruel, calculated agenda to spread panic and division. This Administration's actions are not about public safety — they're about stoking fear. Fear of a community demanding dignity and due process. Protest is a powerful tool — essential in the fight for justice." \- Former Vice President Kamala Harris | = = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Team Powered by People
subject: Our punk rock spirit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
We don’t cater to a specific audience. We don’t tell people what they can or can’t say. Anyone is welcome to join us and voice their opinions about our democracy.
#
Hey,
We’re doing something powerful in Texas, and people are taking notice:
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250609.pN_b-O&refcode=ema20250609-240145&t=1&akid=240145%2E444211%2EuC1pyL)
We’ve been crisscrossing the state, hosting town halls filled with energy so vibrant Beto describes them as a “punk rock show.” The conversations we’re having are open, passionate, and authentic.
We don’t cater to a specific audience—we don’t check Party affiliation at the door. We don’t tell people what they can or can’t say. Anyone is welcome to join us and voice their opinions about our democracy.
This raw, unfiltered “punk rock” spirit is exactly what we need to find our way forward as a country. Texans deserve spaces to speak freely about the issues that matter to them and demand change from their elected officials.
That’s why Powered by People is out here organizing in every corner of Texas. From big cities to small towns, we’re listening to voters and putting together a plan to build real and lasting political power.
We don’t plan on slowing down, but we need your support to keep up this work. Putting on town halls, mobilizing volunteers, and registering voters all requires a lot of resources.
[**Can you donate $3 to Powered by People to help us continue our work? This movement to change Texas is fueled by grassroots supporters like you.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250609.pN_b-O&refcode=ema20250609-240145&t=2&akid=240145%2E444211%2EuC1pyL)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250609.pN_b-O&refcode=ema20250609-240145&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=240145%2E444211%2EuC1pyL)**
Thank you,
Team Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20250609-240145-footer&t=22&refcode2=240145_444211_uC1pyL&akid=240145%2E444211%2EuC1pyL)**

name: Lee Johnson
subject: The opposite of Lindsey Graham
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109282845/550591687/2109746102?refcode=250609_MFC_Johnson_OppositeOfLindsey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTZkZTgxNy03YzQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SNXowryGMAyo2e2_lpXhbjm2kRxBH14KY9znpyUMRQ0=) Friend, Who is Lindsey Graham? He is a career politician who only thinks about himself, is constantly chasing power, and has lost touch with the lives of everyday South Carolinians. I am running for the United States Senate to be the opposite Lindsey Graham. I believe that South Carolinians deserve a leader who will put their interests first, who will care more about people than power, and who understands what their constituents are going through on a day-to-day basis. For every time that Lindsey flip-flopped on an issue, I vow to be **consistent**. For every time Lindsey missed an important vote to appear on Cable TV, I will **show up when it counts.** While Lindsey Graham has run for re-election time and time again for twenty years, I promise to serve no more than two terms as your Senator. **Lindsey has had decades to try to make progress on the issues that count. I believe it’s well past time for a change.** [**You can support this mission by contributing $30 to our campaign today -- split with Seth Moulton. With your support, we can build the team that will end Lindsey’s career once and for all.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109282846/550591688/2036686014?refcode=250609_MFC_Johnson_OppositeOfLindsey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTZkZTgxNy03YzQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SNXowryGMAyo2e2_lpXhbjm2kRxBH14KY9znpyUMRQ0=) Thanks,
Lee Johnson
Candidate for U.S. Senate

### Trump Tests His Power To Raid & Invade Our City Streets
Los Angeles is now the stage for something far bigger than a street protest. What started as a demonstration has erupted into a full-blown constitutional crisis, with somewhat-more-gassy-than-a-dirigible, Donald Trump, ordering the National Guard into California--over Gov. Gavin Newsom's clear objections.
Trump's move reeks of authoritarianism--in the same way that his clothes reek of week-old beer cheese and hazard-taped, Oklahoma State Fair porta-potty--with Trump bypassing laws that define who controls the Guard within state borders. This isn't about public safety--it's power. And Newsom, to his credit, isn't backing down, and spoke in exactly the defiant tone Democrats should below:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1268d931-1187-4cdf-8539-e451cdee5b33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Let's be clear: this is a political standoff. But also a moral and constitutional one. On one side, a governor defending state sovereignty and the right of peaceful protesters to...peacefully protest. On the other, president-wannabe-tough guy, who ordered the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff to shoot peaceful protesters outside the White House his first term--_as he hid in a bunker_. Bone spurs can flare up any time, ya know.
Trump who cares about nobody and nothing but his own gelatinous, moldy corpus, is using military muscle as a PR stunt, and a test for the future. Trump wants headlines showing force, not peace. He wants confrontation, not resolution. It's a page out of the old dictator playbook: create a crisis, then show up as a savior. And as always, the people caught in the middle--the protestors, the communities, the National Guard troops themselves--are the ones who suffer.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3c941b94-a89d-4199-94af-e38de3f561f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But here's the twist: _just days ago, the news cycle was dominated by the Trump vs. Elon Musk feud. Budgets. Tariffs. Epstein files._ Accusations flying like shrapnel between two putrid humans with unearned egos, and heads filled with more bullshit than he Dutton Ranch in _Yellowstone_.
Then--bam--LA explodes into focus. Coincidence? Maybe. But let's not pretend Trump doesn't know how to hijack a narrative. Let's also remember what else dominated the headlines: **Vladimir Putin being absolutely outplayed and humiliated by the Churchillian Vladomir Zelenskyy, who delivered drones in trucks causing $7 billion in damage** while destroy over 40 aircraft Putin used to bomb civilians.
We know Putin owns Trump, from Manafort's poll sharing to Trump's Helsinki Shuffle. As for Musk, he not not only has been having private conversations with Putin, but advocated cutting all aide to Ukraine and pulled their Starlink, just when they needed it to attack Russian troops. Putin just offered Musk asylum after his feud with Trump broke out. I think we can see what's going on there pretty clearly.
Let's just say shirtless-Pootie also had a reason to want a narrative change and may have called an audible. Like Putin, Trump--while dumber than a dingo--understands a few things--let's call them the 3Ds: Distract. Deflect. Dominate.
Los Angeles could've easily been a spark he lit to drown out the Musk storyline, or orders could've come in from his borscht boss, or Elon--while pulling down that tweet about Epstein with no explanation--could've also heard from a little Pootie that it'd be best stop fighting on Twitter, and let/help the majestically malignant moron in the White House start the fighting in Los Angeles.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bf4e7324-6afd-4b8d-961b-61f0b4f337a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
While the media squabbles over who's winning the meme war, we must ask, besides the Zelenskyy story disappearing, there are many ways Putin, who's long wanted an America divided, destabilized and distrustful of its own institutions, benefits from the chaos. A president who sends troops into liberal cities, governors who defy federal orders, oligarchs at each other's throats--_**this is the chaos dream scenario**_. And the more Trump acts like a Kremlin wannabe, the more suspicious the whole thing gets.
**This is a five-alarm fire for democracy**. Don't get lulled by spectacle--whether tanks on boulevards or billionaire babies pissing out tantrums. The real story is our system's being tested, bent and maybe broken. We have a president who thinks he's above the law, a state fighting for its rights and its people and corporate media muttonheads too distracted by stupid or clicks to follow the money and power behind the scenes.
Keep your eyes open. This isn't just about LA. It is far more than that. This is about who controls the United States of America--and the gangrenous galoots trying to tear us apart. **We must fight them every day to not only reestablish our democracy, but create new structures to enhance it, to keep it, so we never go through this again.**

### _**... Yo, Check This Out!**_
#### _Trump 's Loyalists Break Ranks Over LA Crackdown_
**Even His Allies Say the National Guard Move Went Too Far**
* **Ileana Garcia** , Florida st. senator and co‐founder of Latinas for Trump (I guess she slept thru his speech in 2015 about Mexicans here being "criminals and "racists") broke with the Trump this weekend--describing the LA immigration arrests and use of federal troops as "_unacceptable and inhumane_." She emphasized that due process is non‐negotiable, even under a Trump administration
* **Sen. Rand Paul (R ‐KY)**, a self-professed libertarian (or Neo-Confederate numbskull, even if right this time), joined the dissent. Citing constitutional limits and Posse Comitatus Act, Paul reiterated his long-standing position that **military use domestically --especially deportations or protest suppression--is legally dubious and a red line**, reinforcing his skepticism of Trump's approach

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e3401a38-2d24-4a93-abef-b362fb8e44b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Our friend, award winning reporter and author Brian Karem, has been covering the events in LA on the ground.** He wrote about Trump's actions there [for us just yesterday](https://substack.com/redirect/e037711a-1e20-4983-be1d-053962314a0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and covered more of [Trump's maneuvers & malfeasance](https://substack.com/redirect/6a0b3f50-40e2-4cf8-bde0-2ad1d9714fc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at his Substack, which you should read, and to which you should SUBSCRIBE!

Budgets. Tariffs. Epstein files. Accusations flying like shrapnel between two putrid humans with unearned egos, and heads filled with more bullshit than he Dutton Ranch in Yellowstone. Then--bam--LA explodes into focus. Coincidence? Maybe. But let's not pretend Trump doesn't know how to hijack a narrative. Let's also remember what else dominated the headlines: Vladimir Putin being absolutely outplayed and humiliated by the Churchillian Vladomir Zelenskyy, who delivered drones in trucks causing $7 billion in damage while destroy over 40 aircraft Putin used to bomb civilians. We know Putin owns Trump, from Manafort's poll sharing to Trump's Helsinki Shuffle. As for Musk, he not not only has been having private conversations with Putin, but advocated cutting all aide to Ukraine and pulled their Starlink, just when they needed it to attack Russian troops. Putin just offered Musk asylum after his feud with Trump broke out. I think we can see what's going on there pretty clearly. Let's just say shirtless-Pootie also had a reason to want a narrative change and may have called an audible. Like Putin, Trump--while dumber than a dingo--understands a few things--let's call them the 3Ds: Distract. Deflect. Dominate. Los Angeles could've easily been a spark he lit to drown out the Musk storyline, or orders could've come in from his borscht boss, or Elon--while pulling down that tweet about Epstein with no explanation--could've also heard from a little Pootie that it'd be best stop fighting on Twitter, and let/help the majestically malignant moron in the White House start the fighting in Los Angeles. | | ---|---|--- While the media squabbles over who's winning the meme war, we must ask, besides the Zelenskyy story disappearing, there are many ways Putin, who's long wanted an America divided, destabilized and distrustful of its own institutions, benefits from the chaos. A president who sends troops into liberal cities, governors who defy federal orders, oligarchs at each other's throats--this is the chaos dream scenario. And the more Trump acts like a Kremlin wannabe, the more suspicious the whole thing gets. This is a five-alarm fire for democracy. Don't get lulled by spectacle--whether tanks on boulevards or billionaire babies pissing out tantrums. The real story is our system's being tested, bent and maybe broken. We have a president who thinks he's above the law, a state fighting for its rights and its people and corporate media muttonheads too distracted by stupid or clicks to follow the money and power behind the scenes. Keep your eyes open. This isn't just about LA. It is far more than that. This is about who controls the United States of America--and the gangrenous galoots trying to tear us apart. We must fight them every day to not only reestablish our democracy, but create new structures to enhance it, to keep it, so we never go through this again. `Independent Media For Just $1.32/Week!` We launched our Substack show, "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter." To celebrate,you get full access to Blue Amp for only $1.32 per week! G et exclusive news/truth corporate media ignores --from a former Biden ad writer & Emmy-winning MSNBC anchor who know where the bodies are buried Amplify Good.Support Indy Media! ... Yo, Check This Out! Trump 's Loyalists Break Ranks Over LA Crackdown Even His Allies Say the National Guard Move Went Too Far Ileana Garcia , Florida st. senator and co‐founder of Latinas for Trump (I guess she slept thru his speech in 2015 about Mexicans here being "criminals and "racists") broke with the Trump this weekend--describing the LA immigration arrests and use of federal troops as "unacceptable and inhumane." She emphasized that due process is non‐negotiable, even under a Trump administration Sen. Rand Paul (R ‐KY), a self-professed libertarian (or Neo-Confederate numbskull, even if right this time), joined the dissent. Citing constitutional limits and Posse Comitatus Act, Paul reiterated his long-standing position that military use domestically --especially deportations or protest suppression--is legally dubious and a red line, reinforcing his skepticism of Trump's approach | | ---|---|--- Our friend, award winning reporter and author Brian Karem, has been covering the events in LA on the ground. He wrote about Trump's actions there and covered more of at his Substack, which you should read, and to which you should SUBSCRIBE! 🐱 KITTY PIC! Torchy found his spot, and even had something to say about it 🎥 VIDEO ON DEMAND! National security & counter-terrorism expert, Malcolm Nance spoke to us for our livestream on the sick military display by Trump in LA and coming to DC June 14th for his treasonous, tank-filled, self-celebration. Malcolm has another plan: NO KINGS Day. The largest protest in U.S history on "Trump's day." WATCH & Find out more! 🧷 Know Your Rights Before They 're Deployed Against You. if Trump's sending troops into cities, you'd better know what the Constitution actually says. 📥 | | ---|---|--- #### Thanks for! It's the only way we can keep adding content from our fully independent publication The Blue Letter will be back Friday! * Invite your friends and earn rewards If you enjoy Blue Amp, share it with your friends and earn rewards when they subscribe. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

Elon Musk has deleted some of his tweets about President Trump and showed support for his leadership as Los Angeles burns to the ground under Governor Gavin Newsom and Mayor Karen Bass. It all started when Assemblyman Jose Luis Solache Jr. saw ICE agents going into a federal ICE facility in Los Angeles. As a panicked Jose started live streaming the agents, a crowd grew outside the facility until the ICE agents found themselves under attack. With encouragement from La Mayor Karen Bass, this mob grew angry and violent until absolute chaos erupted. As cars are set on fire and rocks are hurled at ICE agents and L.A. sheriff's, President Trump had finally seen enough. President Trump mobilized and federalized the California National Guard, usurping Gavin Newsom's authority. I break down the entire timeline in today's show, including Gavin Newsom, once again, proving he is a feckless leader. Penny Nance then joins me to discuss protecting girls and women in sports. This is on the heels of Simone Biles attacking and body shaming Riley Gaines for calling out a softball team whose star player is a biological boy. Penny unpacks this recent spat and the broader issue as a whole. The big, beautiful bill will end funding for trans surgeries for minors, which up until now has been funded by Medicaid. Penny is the CEO & President of Concerned Women for America and at the forefront of protecting girls, women and life in the womb and today she is here to discuss it all.
Featuring:
**Penny Nance**
Ceo & President | Concerned Women for America

name: Team WFP
subject: ICE assaulted and abducted more than 100 people this weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
We will continue to come together — with neighbors and strangers alike — to oppose their tyranny. | | | Peter, On Friday and over the weekend, ICE agents launched brutal raids across Los Angeles. In an attempt to fuel chaos and incite violence, they assaulted and abducted at least 100 people, including SEIU’s California President David Huerta. **Now they’re charging him with "conspiracy to impede an officer," a felony that could potentially imprison him for six years — all for monitoring an ICE raid.** 1 These provocations and escalations by the Trump administration are wildly dangerous. Now they’re deploying the National Guard, and threatening to send in Marines, all to create a climate of fear and stifle dissent. **It is absolutely critical that we speak up in solidarity now.** [Add your name: Urge your elected officials to demand the release of David Huerta and end the workplace ICE raids and their violent escalations in our communities.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJPAL1ElW43LKYyEutzjSxw6jaXV3bV6lG1NseHGyeWM6DeiwT1emfjbB04vrcjN_jCw0sE3pNkLhTBMU9DdifE8Dzx771rIw-PYGQK_RlBG-vJsNtgZgEMmAtaDr3PRL2g3tDl3y44EoVePyFXfZQrtwYGBvyToVw4dwUR5vvuJ6T-aeyVDXV1wi9ntnG7suFOP4PH0lfcBf1YDILe5U24TeFckmd4SVbpuPRrlLkKzwaKwebm0HUDAhBT3ZaWjKRipHjrZ8WeTeGQxblPgJ2qPza9aOWKQLhZAZAYq_ZQWRacLyBR3mm777TY-kz0eiWq-unqdPe4K_MmdQHyVQRLqFRjJRWMUaUL_gc_tE65mA/4h7/dWrx6F5wRfeLv3k71pPSHw/h0/h001.ksOCHLLzqV82wX7_X0getcoj2JCGE4CBvofoZbsj0I0) **[Add your name »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJPAL1ElW43LKYyEutzjSxw6jaXV3bV6lG1NseHGyeWM6DeiwT1emfjbB04vrcjN_jCw0sE3pNkLhTBMU9DdifE8Dzx771rIw-PYGQK_RlBG-vJsNtgZgEMmAtaDr3PRL2g3tDl3y44EoVePyFXfZQraDwsznoVH-WgZFicobAb2rj_GcijwNPt6iXlVKUVhhvRebnwPbIZzGnrUPhCp_HJcE0X7D4n5XukwveHuQMz3uWiLtXzwbnvO9ITn0Z5LITSg9kUg2S5ARp8WnePfRqpjYAN9Ef6wFPV_BrZ-BPKFOZgwkgdzto6HkpoQ_-d3_IQdWafG_t9zf9pmwDjjkGllJjfUfOMlIyYKE4ECRJdQA/4h7/dWrx6F5wRfeLv3k71pPSHw/h1/h001.-6oLOemDXGPpYJfIKZuxvq1aTB9MyiBim2-jSN1hg-E)** Let us be perfectly clear: Provoked by ICE, communities across the country have mobilized to hold peaceful actions to protect families from mass abductions. **But Trump and his cronies don’t want that.** They _want_ to incite chaos and violence, because they _want_ to find a way to justify their nationwide bounty hunt, and put working class communities in an even tighter stranglehold. **We will not take their bait.** We will continue to protect our communities that are under siege. We will continue to come together — with neighbors and strangers alike — to oppose their tyranny. And we will not be bullied or beaten into silence. In solidarity, Team WFP Source: 1\. They want to incite chaos and violence, because they want to find a way to justify their nationwide bounty hunt, and put working class communities in an even tighter stranglehold. We will not take their bait. We will continue to protect our communities that are under siege. We will continue to come together — with neighbors and strangers alike — to oppose their tyranny. And we will not be bullied or beaten into silence. In solidarity, Team WFP Source: 1\. , The Hill, June 9th, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109283469/550594095/-1175830425?refcode=header&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmZiMGExMS03ZTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CHChT9QxUiMMhLm06qUvzxz09jQKQrdLA-q9eAVxNzw=)

| Dear team — Let me be clear: What we are seeing in Los Angeles County is a purposeful provocation by the Trump Administration. From arresting immigrants to detaining labor leaders to mobilizing military personnel against peaceful citizens, to threatening the arrest of our Governor, Trump has made his intentions clear — to demonize, divide, and destroy our communities. Yet, his actions will only strengthen the resolve of Angelenos and those who call the Golden State home. We will not bow to a king or bend to the will of a dictator. We will speak up, speak out, push back, and fight back today, tomorrow, and every day until justice is won. In this moment, we must make our collective voices heard. **Peacefully. Without violence. And together.** For immigrant communities, **[know your rights](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109283470/550594096/-976547626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmZiMGExMS03ZTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CHChT9QxUiMMhLm06qUvzxz09jQKQrdLA-q9eAVxNzw=&emci=bc3991db-d844-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=86fb0a11-7e45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=560478)**. For those who take to the streets to peacefully protest, **[know your rights](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109283471/550594097/-1002936688?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmZiMGExMS03ZTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CHChT9QxUiMMhLm06qUvzxz09jQKQrdLA-q9eAVxNzw=&emci=bc3991db-d844-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=86fb0a11-7e45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=560478)**. Because if we don't find ways to speak up and speak out today, we may soon lose the chance to do so tomorrow. Speak up. Speak out. Stay safe. — Rusty

body:
What can we learn from a history of voter suppression efforts: |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109283723/550594906/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250609_f_OnThisDay_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTc4NjNhZi03ZTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xCjRLNqtqJkmpnZ6NXi2GFGdf9SiPQsr-HkTANibcP0=&emci=c67863af-7e45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c97863af-7e45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1037277)

| | **“We are going to make you wish you was dead.”** Those were the words of a white Mississippi patrolman to civil rights activist Fannie Lou Hamer, after being beaten and arrested while returning home from a voter education workshop in South Carolina. **62 years ago to the day,** civil rights activists in Winona, Mississippi were met with anti-Black violence and arrested upon their arrival at a rest stop after the police were called by the bus driver who notified them of the activists sitting in the “whites only” section. **But their purpose of traveling for voter registration efforts and for working towards voter empowerment and education was well known to authorities.** This was a coordinated effort by southern authorities during Jim Crow to dismantle voter registration efforts being done by civil rights activists. Friend — today, the coordinated efforts to dismantle voting freedom we see feel _eerily_ familiar. While the efforts may not be through police violence, they are seen blatantly through legislation, backroom deals, and in the court room. **Right now, the SAVE Act lies in the Senate. If passed, it has the potential to disenfranchise millions of Americans, disproportionately impacting historically marginalized communities.** [**This strategy is not new. It’s intentional. But Fair Fight Action is fighting back. Chip in to help fuel our fight for fair and free elections.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109283724/550594907/877737893?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250609_f_OnThisDay_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTc4NjNhZi03ZTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xCjRLNqtqJkmpnZ6NXi2GFGdf9SiPQsr-HkTANibcP0=) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109283725/550594908/877737893?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250609_f_OnThisDay_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTc4NjNhZi03ZTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xCjRLNqtqJkmpnZ6NXi2GFGdf9SiPQsr-HkTANibcP0=) | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109283726/550594909/877737893?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250609_f_OnThisDay_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTc4NjNhZi03ZTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xCjRLNqtqJkmpnZ6NXi2GFGdf9SiPQsr-HkTANibcP0=)

We must never forget the freedom fighters who came before us — who they were, their experiences, and the things they sacrificed to protect and advance voting freedom.
Civil rights activists faced violence in Winona in June 1963 — but still, they prevailed.
We will too, friend. _We have to. _
Fair Fight Action is exposing voter suppression in every shape and form. We’re educating voters about their freedom, sounding the alarm on far-right extremism on the state and national level, and are putting in the work to build a truly representative, multi-racial democracy.
**But we can’t do it alone. **
Just like the folks in Winona pushed forward, we must remain in solidarity with one another as we fight against the anti-democracy forces against us.
[**As a national leader in the fight for voting rights and democracy, Fair Fight Action is on the frontlines in the fight for voting freedom. Make a contribution to Fair Fight Action now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109283731/550594914/877737893?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250609_f_OnThisDay_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTc4NjNhZi03ZTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xCjRLNqtqJkmpnZ6NXi2GFGdf9SiPQsr-HkTANibcP0=)

But Hochul isn’t going to leave the governor’s mansion without a fight.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Marines should not be on the streets of Los Angeles
body:
Trump and Hegseth aren’t sending the Marines and the National Guard into Los Angeles to solve any problem. They’re putting on a show to look tough on TV.
#

I’m a Marine.
I’ll always be a Marine.
And I am telling you this without any reservations: The Marines should be nowhere near these protests.
Trump and Hegseth aren’t sending the Marines and the National Guard into Los Angeles to solve any problem. They’re putting on a show to look tough on TV. It’s a deliberate provocation. It’s a waste of time. It’s an insult to the men and women who serve.
The military exists to defend our Constitution and our people from foreign threats. They are not political pawns. They are not props for Trump to play with and showboat. This has to stop, or it is only going to escalate.
**I’m calling on Trump and Hegseth to roll back these orders.**
[**Join me and demand that Trump and Hegseth rescind the orders federalizing the California National Guard and sending the Marines into Los Angeles. This is not necessary, and it only invites more violence.** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_LA/?source=em250609-1-160&akid=3886%2E734936%2EJg3lcW) We’ve got to press for cooler heads to prevail now. That’s my responsibility, and I’m going to continue pushing for it. Hold fast, Ruben

body:
# [#] Friends, tomorrow is Election Day!

Polls will be open from 6 a.m. to 8 p.m.

If you’re in line to vote at 8 p.m., STAY IN LINE!!!

You can click here to find your polling location and any other voting information! [https://www.nj.gov/state/elections/vote.shtml]

If you voted by mail but have not returned your ballot yet, you can return it to your county’s Board of Elections office or to a secure ballot drop box by 8 p.m. tomorrow! To find a drop box location near you, click here! [https://www.nj.gov/state/elections/vote-by-mail.shtml]

Thank you,

Team Gottheimer
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zwqVCKyxzki-GzysVtmLBA2] , or to unsubscribe click here. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Want to see what the media won’t show you?
body:
These students are making the Left panic
\- This tour went somewhere no one thought we’d reach - The Left’s strongholds are crumbling - This generation is choosing freedom - The comeback is happening — and YOU made it possible - This wasn’t just noise... - Packed crowds. Roaring students. The Left? Speechless. - We’re beating the Left. On their turf.

| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=21a55ed7770b4c51befa77a39bd76042&_e=5JwcJxs2Ex_QhC_7bTegsguMU1yAYl7t1KD1xodlwQocX87X5wJcDXHrqzrsWcQCO7GlsarHbJRqt2-nBfPr1o5dHBBen6i7d9wpW5KHKEozvBjoRoubcT46ZViNi28cpn8lktjLIKt5r_CbdR5YpFOJnzx0hhT_Uv_MnkxHQ7N0T4oj9O4pnZmUIVUK6w34ykeFVk6QRFiytxaX0MuTjVslJD7Y4oNSHs3X84cZJ-PWCkdq2Qb9r-y_5hg0pVpke7dmnetaV0J9Cw5Zmq1flX0VoixY7Aee0ZeMbNy4nvUkEn3OM3g2y37WzBWK8McT)
---
Peter, I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this.Because I’ve never had this much good news to share. And I’ve never felt this much urgency to say one thing: **THANK YOU.** I don’t know if you’ve ever felt something just... _shift..._ while it was happening... But this spring on the American Comeback Tour?**I did.** And if you were standing where I stood — listening to the crowd roar before I walked up to the “Prove Me Wrong” table at our Spring Finale at UC Riverside...You would’ve felt this generational shift in real time, too.
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=21a55ed7770b4c51befa77a39bd76042&_e=5JwcJxs2Ex_QhC_7bTegsguMU1yAYl7t1KD1xodlwQocX87X5wJcDXHrqzrsWcQCO7GlsarHbJRqt2-nBfPr1o5dHBBen6i7d9wpW5KHKEozvBjoRoubcT46ZViNi28cpn8lktjLIKt5r_CbdR5YpH-J-t8-w4WgZMELmaVY_o_oVGlCBHaiPbPyFQZAg26VPqSxAqtOIBh34Mbikrz6GsLo6xu_0pfJXn6_8ssQTUI_4vm4NRzLgr3XjmewULTMD52P35vomSLG3LEPJQoNMAPYBSr8HDUsCb2cYnT8MuX5uR3BqHcXK9hZKEuIzrQz)
---
You may have seen the photos from the tour... caught some of the videos... read about the chants of _“USA!”_ from students...But let me tell you exactly what happened this spring:**Patriots like you helped launch the most powerful Conservative campus tour in American history.** It was BOLD. It was LOUD. And it was PACKED... From beginning to end.**And the American Comeback Tour’s Spring FINALE was in a place no one thought we’d ever touch: California.** The same state where Leftist professors shut down free speech... where mobs scream in the faces of our students... where conservative ideas aren’t just unpopular — _they’re punishable offenses._ And yet... We filled the campus quad at UC Riverside.Students came early. Packed shoulder-to-shoulder. Ringing around the “Prove Me Wrong” tent to hear the truth.And when I walked on stage and said: “It’s okay to love America...”They ERUPTED.
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=21a55ed7770b4c51befa77a39bd76042&_e=5JwcJxs2Ex_QhC_7bTegsguMU1yAYl7t1KD1xodlwQocX87X5wJcDXHrqzrsWcQCO7GlsarHbJRqt2-nBfPr1o5dHBBen6i7d9wpW5KHKEozvBjoRoubcT46ZViNi28cpn8lktjLIKt5r_CbdR5YpP879TI8zOScLP4S_PyJcRop-fJJBDKP6-T_UtUGbzkSvUNiQWbNHLRuGME4Kv-3dzMGanKqyJT28ZDk_blfYHYAWbPGb0oitpPyLR5xt3niPggWLYKK42sundLb5jKPwDfavOhvSgz8E7fFHDebVO4IREbjuz1W-dV2Z0NvipM9)
---
It wasn’t just another great tour stop... **It was a BREAKTHROUGH.** Because this wasn’t the first stop in California this spring — it was the fourth IN MAY and the SIXTH of the tour.And each one was just as powerful...This wasn’t just another campus tour. _It was a line in the sand._ And every single time, the story was the same: The Left tried to dismiss us, hurl their obscenities, or shut us down...The students showed up anyway. And the truth rang out louder than ever before._But let’s back up for a moment..._ Because while the California finale may have been the last stop of the Spring, this all started months ago.**Back in January, when we were laying out the calendar... These were the goals: Go BIGGER. Go BOLDER. Go DEEPER into Leftist territory.** We wanted to hit not just the battleground states... Not just the safe “Red” states... _But the ones the Left claimed as their own._ And then? We wanted to plant our flag. And because of patriots like you — that’s exactly what we did.**Let me give you the big picture:** ✅ 21 American Comeback Tour stops✅ Overflow crowds with thousands of students✅ Deep “Blue” states seeing young people rising up ✅ The Left rattled by a movement of young people who are rejecting them... _wholesale._ Students who had never once heard a Conservative speak in person... _finally heard one._ Students who were afraid to wear a cross or sport an American flag... _were loud, proud, and unashamed to stand for God and their country._ Students who were told they were alone... _realized they were part of something BIGGER than they ever imagined._ There are too many great stories, moments and pictures to pack into this one message...**But just look at what we're accomplishing:**
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=21a55ed7770b4c51befa77a39bd76042&_e=5JwcJxs2Ex_QhC_7bTegsguMU1yAYl7t1KD1xodlwQocX87X5wJcDXHrqzrsWcQCO7GlsarHbJRqt2-nBfPr1o5dHBBen6i7d9wpW5KHKEozvBjoRoubcT46ZViNi28cpn8lktjLIKt5r_CbdR5YpO_d-gS_73TUCMYFIPfVmjGmXFC9CFBc2IC5f65UfKLnbubJ47Pf1Tod1kO6AyIOktEsS9LiLqXnUEnL349MarAgLfNxFPkXwd_XXqJ4KBdT_6HJOx5Az5XrRZqFK11xumsOIb1OJL56lfy7RXYunDjFplcyMMGyjhYeJrw7mA81)
---
_Peter, this is why we fight..._ Not just for campus speeches. Not just for questions from students.**But for a generation-wide cultural reset — playing out in real time, in real places, in the hearts of real students.** This is why the American Comeback Tour matters.And I hope you know:**It wouldn’t exist without patriots like****YOU****.** Your support — your prayers, your belief in our students, your generous gifts — made all of this possible.Patriots like you put us on the road. You brought us onto these campuses. You sent us to the students who needed to hear our America First message the most.**You weren’t just watching this tour... You were powering it.** Now, let me be totally honest: _We’re not done. Not even close._ The American Comeback Tour may have just ended for the spring...But this summer?We’re preparing for something even BIGGER. We’re already mapping out new stops in the fall. New states. New targets in Leftist territory to break through.We’re building a plan to take this movement to the next level — to complete the cultural shift that started on this tour.To reach more students. To change more hearts and minds. **And raise up the boldest, most unapologetic generation of freedom-loving Americans since the founding of this country. **_I’m going to need you fighting alongside me, Peter._ Because now that we’ve tasted victory... now that we’ve seen what’s possible...We can’t back down. Not now. _Not ever._ Let’s keep building. Let’s keep pushing. Let’s keep GOING.The American Comeback is well underway. Let’s make sure it keeps rolling strong.**I can’t say “thank you” enough to the patriots like you who’ve helped make Turning Point USA the force it is today.****Together, we’re SAVING America... one student at a time.**
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=21a55ed7770b4c51befa77a39bd76042&_e=5JwcJxs2Ex_QhC_7bTegsguMU1yAYl7t1KD1xodlwQocX87X5wJcDXHrqzrsWcQCO7GlsarHbJRqt2-nBfPr1o5dHBBen6i7d9wpW5KHKEozvBjoRoubcT46ZViNi28cpn8lktjLIKt5r_CbdR5YpMXjR8bmXgEilKE3plM0uYlWpgFXvGPkcFCi1PaxDDVAkafuym379LUxU3TSSi2DYdXnmpxF05Naf_dyfZ3NzsZvBs5LRXZoNPwTzG5xBH2dZ7WvPT8ofmnMNruXpDuh50kv_7tJo9o13iZsZHZa9PKkCwcHcTpJZO321wKyingu)
---
**P.S.** I’ve been doing this for over a decade now, Peter... **_But I’ve never seen momentum like THIS._** These students are ready. They’re hungry for the truth and our ideas.This country is shifting — In a way you can genuinely FEEL.**And the Left is terrified.** You can see it in their mobs... The way they lash out at us and our students... But it’s not working anymore.**Because you and I are reaching the next generation — campus by campus, state by state, student by student.** **And that’s why I’m asking you to stand with us again today. Because every dollar you give today will be MATCHED.** That means your gift of $50 becomes $100... $100 becomes $200... And your impact? DOUBLED. _So, if you believe in this mission... If you’re proud of what we’re accomplishing... If you want to go even BIGGER this fall..._ Then this is your moment to step up and fuel what comes next.Let’s take the American Comeback Tour to every corner of this country when it returns this fall... Let’s train thousands of students this summer at our events to become the LEADERS we need for our America First movement...And let’s make sure the Left NEVER thinks they can own the hearts of America’s young people again. **[We’re not done. Let’s go DEFEAT the Left once and for all. Make your gift to Turning Point USA today and have your impact immediately DOUBLED.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=21a55ed7770b4c51befa77a39bd76042&_e=5JwcJxs2Ex_QhC_7bTegsguMU1yAYl7t1KD1xodlwQocX87X5wJcDXHrqzrsWcQCO7GlsarHbJRqt2-nBfPr1o5dHBBen6i7d9wpW5KHKEozvBjoRoubcT46ZViNi28cpn8lktjLIKt5r_CbdR5YpIN4RJsqqA4kV9HWNMPrXcK1zO7Whx9xks5fZguxAphPOLdy1UQ2XnCr1YYPTK0wSe1-S3TX7oN_Hc49_78Y6nSISr-Ub3U37hRA0lpvn6uN527IkgO6WgoDn-sDEOZB2ounsC7SSnjZqdC4xtXkRA1PFzXTA0__wlXZu3-lCKoC)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA &**
**DOUBLE Your Impact**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=21a55ed7770b4c51befa77a39bd76042&_e=5JwcJxs2Ex_QhC_7bTegsguMU1yAYl7t1KD1xodlwQocX87X5wJcDXHrqzrsWcQCO7GlsarHbJRqt2-nBfPr1o5dHBBen6i7d9wpW5KHKEozvBjoRoubcT46ZViNi28cpn8lktjLIKt5r_CbdR5YpBgyheZXggSXbjGEc9XxRap0kq6om9bjlc9OBCzk-L_NrxmOJt_rC6TajzJc7_9t8zh2ZDudv99qbqEIQbbY9WQAqoJueteuuO11WDiMaN4e7Ltn2a7Mz8vhElKYj5YwNEEiKdtkl5wJ2yooMryBPfuXkfSHB37Y0EVmSc9CfUX-)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
[Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=21a55ed7770b4c51befa77a39bd76042&_t=eNUY-hBbbdz60t-SZsZ0x1xPcLgVFfNLecpJ3d6nwQYUl8Mxm849tbUUVmRo98Iaz2lg934Ey6SHCG31USMTIYeojnjxwtzFG-Pf-UA7UVZEtgk6x3FBN4wD6Sb0njjh)

---

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Group Backed by George Soros to Plow Millions into Turning Texas Blue,** " Wall Street Journal's**Ken Thomas** - "Democrats are launching a multimillion-dollar effort, helped by megadonor**George Soros** , to turn Texas into a political battleground after suffering through decades of electoral losses in the nation's second-largest state.

Texas Majority PAC, a Soros-funded PAC, will launch a "Blue Texas" initiative Monday along with the Texas Democratic Party and a group of county parties, aiming to organize tens of thousands of volunteers, recruit candidates and boost turnout ahead of the 2026 midterm elections.

Soros, the billionaire investor and philanthropist, [has devoted millions](https://substack.com/redirect/298ca842-a1e2-4d39-a450-ff2b03713258?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to turning Texas blue in the past and donated $2.1 million to Texas Majority in 2024 and $1 million in April, records show.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/129ead00-4a35-4be7-b6e4-e30a94cb676d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Texas has been a [Republican stronghold](https://substack.com/redirect/93b63fb6-7529-494e-b6ee-b31b036e1c9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for decades, providing the GOP with its largest batch of electoral votes and supporting President Trump in each of the past three presidential elections. The growth in [the state's Hispanic population](https://substack.com/redirect/5887d256-4c4c-45a1-bad8-1b35288724fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) during the past two decades has raised hopes among Democrats, but those demographic shifts have done little to change the balance of power. Earlier organizing efforts by Democrats, such as through a group called Battleground Texas, have failed to yield significant results.

Democrats haven't won a statewide election since 1994, and Trump generated his largest margin of victory in Texas last year, defeating former Vice President **Kamala Harris** by nearly 14 percentage points. Republicans have won every presidential election in Texas since 1980, and the last Democratic U.S. senator to win an election in the state was **Lloyd Bentsen** in 1988.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/129ead00-4a35-4be7-b6e4-e30a94cb676d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The Blue Texas project will work with state and county parties to recruit candidates and sign up volunteers, starting with a series of organizing rallies in June. Organizers plan to visit more than two dozen cities in July to recruit candidates.

"If a win is on the table in 2026, we don't want to leave it there by not being organized," said **Katherine Fischer** , the deputy executive director of Texas Majority PAC. The PAC has supported a group of city council and school board candidates who won election this year.

Texas Majority, the Texas Democratic Party and the nearly dozen county parties under the Blue Texas alliance collectively spent about $35 million in the 2024 election cycle, and organizers said they expect to exceed that amount through the partnership.

The group hopes a sustained commitment to building volunteers and get-out-the-vote efforts will help in next year's Senate campaign, where incumbent Sen.**John Cornyn** faces a Republican [primary challenge](https://substack.com/redirect/3160bb45-f1b6-4c90-879c-fac2c5ef7ba5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from Texas Attorney General **Ken Paxton**." [WSJ](https://substack.com/redirect/34d50647-1fa2-44cc-a468-a4590cffef48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

TOP NEWS "Group Backed by George Soros to Plow Millions into Turning Texas Blue, " Wall Street Journal'sKen Thomas - "Democrats are launching a multimillion-dollar effort, helped by megadonorGeorge Soros , to turn Texas into a political battleground after suffering through decades of electoral losses in the nation's second-largest state. Texas Majority PAC, a Soros-funded PAC, will launch a "Blue Texas" initiative Monday along with the Texas Democratic Party and a group of county parties, aiming to organize tens of thousands of volunteers, recruit candidates and boost turnout ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. Soros, the billionaire investor and philanthropist, to turning Texas blue in the past and donated $2.1 million to Texas Majority in 2024 and $1 million in April, records show. Texas has been a for decades, providing the GOP with its largest batch of electoral votes and supporting President Trump in each of the past three presidential elections. The growth in during the past two decades has raised hopes among Democrats, but those demographic shifts have done little to change the balance of power. Earlier organizing efforts by Democrats, such as through a group called Battleground Texas, have failed to yield significant results. Democrats haven't won a statewide election since 1994, and Trump generated his largest margin of victory in Texas last year, defeating former Vice President Kamala Harris by nearly 14 percentage points. Republicans have won every presidential election in Texas since 1980, and the last Democratic U.S. senator to win an election in the state was Lloyd Bentsen in 1988. The Blue Texas project will work with state and county parties to recruit candidates and sign up volunteers, starting with a series of organizing rallies in June. Organizers plan to visit more than two dozen cities in July to recruit candidates. "If a win is on the table in 2026, we don't want to leave it there by not being organized," said Katherine Fischer , the deputy executive director of Texas Majority PAC. The PAC has supported a group of city council and school board candidates who won election this year. Texas Majority, the Texas Democratic Party and the nearly dozen county parties under the Blue Texas alliance collectively spent about $35 million in the 2024 election cycle, and organizers said they expect to exceed that amount through the partnership. The group hopes a sustained commitment to building volunteers and get-out-the-vote efforts will help in next year's Senate campaign, where incumbent Sen.John Cornyn faces a Republican from Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton." subject: Always in solidarity 🏳️‍🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress

Peter, Pride Month is a time to celebrate love, identity, and the ongoing fight for justice. As a public servant, I’ve always stood unequivocally with LGBTQ+ Arizonans. That includes trans people, who deserve to live freely, authentically, and without fear or discrimination! Showing solidarity with our LGBTQ+ community means speaking out when it counts — pride month or not! I’ve never backed down from that responsibility, and I won’t now. Thank you for being in the fight with me and for believing in a future where everyone, no matter who they are or who they love, has the freedom to thrive. "**Group Backed by George Soros to Plow Millions into Turning Texas Blue,** " Wall Street Journal's**Ken Thomas** - "Democrats are launching a multimillion-dollar effort, helped by megadonor**George Soros** , to turn Texas into a political battleground after suffering through decades of electoral losses in the nation's second-largest state.

Texas Majority PAC, a Soros-funded PAC, will launch a "Blue Texas" initiative Monday along with the Texas Democratic Party and a group of county parties, aiming to organize tens of thousands of volunteers, recruit candidates and boost turnout ahead of the 2026 midterm elections.

Soros, the billionaire investor and philanthropist, [has devoted millions](https://substack.com/redirect/02056a62-f8e4-4493-b1d8-a3a9d59830f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to turning Texas blue in the past and donated $2.1 million to Texas Majority in 2024 and $1 million in April, records show.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/2b75f275-ec12-49bb-8162-55ee0c7367b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Texas has been a [Republican stronghold](https://substack.com/redirect/5ffc95a6-63d6-4fce-a7f2-8b2d7129d854?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for decades, providing the GOP with its largest batch of electoral votes and supporting President Trump in each of the past three presidential elections. The growth in [the state's Hispanic population](https://substack.com/redirect/bcc5c865-00e2-48f3-b5e7-5773c105ee52?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) during the past two decades has raised hopes among Democrats, but those demographic shifts have done little to change the balance of power. Earlier organizing efforts by Democrats, such as through a group called Battleground Texas, have failed to yield significant results.

Democrats haven't won a statewide election since 1994, and Trump generated his largest margin of victory in Texas last year, defeating former Vice President **Kamala Harris** by nearly 14 percentage points. Republicans have won every presidential election in Texas since 1980, and the last Democratic U.S. senator to win an election in the state was **Lloyd Bentsen** in 1988.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/2b75f275-ec12-49bb-8162-55ee0c7367b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The Blue Texas project will work with state and county parties to recruit candidates and sign up volunteers, starting with a series of organizing rallies in June. Organizers plan to visit more than two dozen cities in July to recruit candidates.

"If a win is on the table in 2026, we don't want to leave it there by not being organized," said **Katherine Fischer** , the deputy executive director of Texas Majority PAC. The PAC has supported a group of city council and school board candidates who won election this year.

Texas Majority, the Texas Democratic Party and the nearly dozen county parties under the Blue Texas alliance collectively spent about $35 million in the 2024 election cycle, and organizers said they expect to exceed that amount through the partnership.

The group hopes a sustained commitment to building volunteers and get-out-the-vote efforts will help in next year's Senate campaign, where incumbent Sen.**John Cornyn** faces a Republican [primary challenge](https://substack.com/redirect/30ab84e1-ff51-4d61-8780-83ca10b963a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from Texas Attorney General **Ken Paxton**." [WSJ](https://substack.com/redirect/01f5f057-b58a-4461-922f-e7a041be3dbe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: It’s time to put parents back in the driver’s seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
Elementary school children should not be introduced to gender-affirming ideologies in the public school system. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=648b32bb860b48879f4b8755f951221f&_e=B5VKKe5af3OhFSKB5aKKdy5YQZGzBvAs7_uWVRJIRFbwEQXD0pzWh0GHaiAk5GSKa92gE27VmncO4jy2I4AssZxluxicB86aR2t_SNu2mM39GBCaPj7Xsnbygg8Gf4wapXdfIiFfR_bmNcnsIPQswgf2t1m-AyHnXRMhOD-B2Jpd8xHRD3s22kgvUaFhfn-5XF-URWa96TMV5cau90t_2XZwIyvRNXsCN-Hg-zTf4TF8wqyJ9EulNbZzYhkvRiSTlUA3A9G-tjho_q9INekgjjvPu0zYxA5nW0btZlHJnApfPFc48Utx17jJbNvjKgJ0uY9J-RjLyNnNRia9BoePoQ4E_cBnLhiT2o22gDu4lofiRVmHEqhvFoUcbIZyuOpwDBe4xnltwMScfCkrd7vG6SNX2vb9NPGWhA7eonosxYbeEowatuKW-25QPkMnjO4G)

Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m asking for just a few moments of your time right now.

I’m well aware that if you’re reading this right now, you’re likely receiving many emails from countless would-be politicians introducing themselves and asking for your money.

I’m not one of them.

_**I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **_who has put his body through the ringer serving this great nation of ours, but has so much left to give for a country that has given me so much.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

A few months ago, I decided that the best way to do that would be by running for U.S. Senate against **Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** After living through this man’s governorship, his failed vice presidential campaign last fall, and having seen firsthand what his **looneytoon policies** have done to the state of Minnesota, I decided I couldn’t sit back and let another Democrat waltz into the Senate.

**Navy SEALs fight to win** , and that’s what I will do - for Minnesota and for you. I was recently asked why I would open my life up to the scrutiny of a federal campaign. While there are numerous reasons, **I want to tell you about one of the most important today: childhood education.**

Here in Minnesota and around the nation, our children are being indoctrinated. They’re being forced to learn topics beyond their years that are not in the ordinary curriculum.

Our kids deserve an education, not an agenda. Here in Minnesota, boards of education and radical left politicians, like my opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, regularly override the will of parents.

**Did you know that elementary schools around America are beginning to institute gender studies in K-5 classes? This type of curriculum should be reserved for college campuses, and only on an elective basis. Kids in first through 5th grade have no concept of this adult material and shouldn’t.
**
_**When did the government stop listening to parents and putting the will of crazed left-wing activists ahead of the concerns and beliefs of parents?**_

It’s time to put parents back in the driver's seat.

**[If you agree, please contribute a few dollars to my campaign today. I’m starting with absolutely nothing and would very much appreciate your support.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=648b32bb860b48879f4b8755f951221f&_e=B5VKKe5af3OhFSKB5aKKdy5YQZGzBvAs7_uWVRJIRFbwEQXD0pzWh0GHaiAk5GSKa92gE27VmncO4jy2I4AssZxluxicB86aR2t_SNu2mM39GBCaPj7Xsnbygg8Gf4wapXdfIiFfR_bmNcnsIPQswgf2t1m-AyHnXRMhOD-B2Jpd8xHRD3s22kgvUaFhfn-5XF-URWa96TMV5cau90t_2XZwIyvRNXsCN-Hg-zTf4TF8wqyJ9EulNbZzYhkvRiSTlUA3A9G-tjho_q9INekgjjvPu0zYxA5nW0btZlHJnArPr8NYmUoEPHaPCEVbOg-QYyU0oyQysE8lowzPMPZP743oRmurJXINlLOQsuFuy8TId73XSy6XJoMj6AYdrdepWy7pf7po0HffsF65auJni-TXjzWyc3Sj3XvWHf0pQGh3Y2_68lbfUExsW1Z3zlkY)**

[**SEND a sealTO THE SENATE**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=648b32bb860b48879f4b8755f951221f&_e=B5VKKe5af3OhFSKB5aKKdy5YQZGzBvAs7_uWVRJIRFbwEQXD0pzWh0GHaiAk5GSKa92gE27VmncO4jy2I4AssZxluxicB86aR2t_SNu2mM39GBCaPj7Xsnbygg8Gf4wapXdfIiFfR_bmNcnsIPQswgf2t1m-AyHnXRMhOD-B2Jpd8xHRD3s22kgvUaFhfn-5XF-URWa96TMV5cau90t_2XZwIyvRNXsCN-Hg-zTf4TF8wqyJ9EulNbZzYhkvRiSTlUA3A9G-tjho_q9INekgjjvPu0zYxA5nW0btZlHJnAqXUGE7f-TLRwZPadrib80jRpwg48bcJHwgK0tU1w2VEJMf9eYpt6F7hCl5dmSGRknahKOHpaQ7XBcXwYpB3pikzVl3djjU4zUlRK3rAZ2lxSr1vspOSvx7RhMZgvDo6bWYmkXbG1_AR7n2pDt7ouYF) **_

I’m running for the United States Senate because, as a retired Navy SEAL, I’ve seen the dangers of the world, and**[I can tell you unequivocally that the radically left and woke ideologies they espouse are a form of domestic terrorism.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=648b32bb860b48879f4b8755f951221f&_e=B5VKKe5af3OhFSKB5aKKdy5YQZGzBvAs7_uWVRJIRFbwEQXD0pzWh0GHaiAk5GSKa92gE27VmncO4jy2I4AssZxluxicB86aR2t_SNu2mM39GBCaPj7Xsnbygg8Gf4wapXdfIiFfR_bmNcnsIPQswgf2t1m-AyHnXRMhOD-B2Jpd8xHRD3s22kgvUaFhfn-5XF-URWa96TMV5cau90t_2XZwIyvRNXsCN-Hg-zTf4TF8wqyJ9EulNbZzYhkvRiSTlUA3A9G-tjho_q9INekgjjvPu0zYxA5nW0btZlHJnApwILyN00NypZFmlGljsOMDJWZ-o8hZX2gB_MuyIjJMFoRDAcqlC1zJnPtVrur6v1jCh2FvIC4VWpDYKDMDX6nt78hvcNmwi4Weo_Cb9rPoU37Lck1dX-I4WdsZ6wX9SeRQw6tJAtiQGlzuut63Qydh)**

In liberty,
Adam Schwarze
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

“**Group Backed by George Soros to Plow Millions into Turning Texas Blue,** ” Wall Street Journal's**Ken Thomas** – “Democrats are launching a multimillion-dollar effort, helped by megadonor**George Soros** , to turn Texas into a political battleground after suffering through decades of electoral losses in the nation’s second-largest state.

Texas Majority PAC, a Soros-funded PAC, will launch a “Blue Texas” initiative Monday along with the Texas Democratic Party and a group of county parties, aiming to organize tens of thousands of volunteers, recruit candidates and boost turnout ahead of the 2026 midterm elections.

Earlier organizing efforts by Democrats, such as through a group called Battleground Texas, have failed to yield significant results.

Democrats haven’t won a statewide election since 1994, and Trump generated his largest margin of victory in Texas last year, defeating former Vice President **Kamala Harris** by nearly 14 percentage points. Republicans have won every presidential election in Texas since 1980, and the last Democratic U.S. senator to win an election in the state was **Lloyd Bentsen** in 1988.

The Blue Texas project will work with state and county parties to recruit candidates and sign up volunteers, starting with a series of organizing rallies in June. Organizers plan to visit more than two dozen cities in July to recruit candidates.

“If a win is on the table in 2026, we don’t want to leave it there by not being organized,” said **Katherine Fischer** , the deputy executive director of Texas Majority PAC. The PAC has supported a group of city council and school board candidates who won election this year.

Texas Majority, the Texas Democratic Party and the nearly dozen county parties under the Blue Texas alliance collectively spent about $35 million in the 2024 election cycle, and organizers said they expect to exceed that amount through the partnership.

The group hopes a sustained commitment to building volunteers and get-out-the-vote efforts will help in next year’s Senate campaign, where incumbent Sen.**John Cornyn** faces a Republican [primary challenge](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eGUT-qZUuq6VAj7Pk0pzqLTZkfk44D2a7ayE2kmrwjQagAiIWDiljlwIQ9GXEs0jbrcsRjRmhiHliFtd3JBAXWjQaRdKodnGXDKLeEECvEf9vuvP1ljc265wv1U15TOo8fUhhBqz6RvGB2fjGJ2MXOP2hIayG5WUHCOu6htPTKV_TWRkTCFS_zXUta8_Ett4r2pImvsYDgRA-OIUv2HtACZVhjlKi583_aN36aSqZp_pzBatrPgzANmjLrZoX9aZWC4urqVPXBPkWU58IbpP-2nAD0Yj5Wxf5d0U2rCq6_PfeKxeuNi9Jn61HoqqZS-Yil_tVe6aqNuBMATsN3srJjK9eekDMhrONV8EJZFJzAmAwogNrg9wR-UdxlIIaJrufDWrepV2yM90x4Ne6S654EkPWPlXvtSJGOzIzBiPuLGYr_j8G04WB2cye7ru1cjE--sKmM8AGgab9t0rOefboN-vGGhD85JbXtNRKvbZMsdO/4h7/9iR18nt6QK6VM3MuUdLuwA/h15/h001.8VgooBrTx_SbGpbYmoWaPg_qYx-c2kQW0mB8dVaJWG4) from Texas Attorney General **Ken Paxton**." Read the most recent FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr | TOP NEWS “Group Backed by George Soros to Plow Millions into Turning Texas Blue, ” Wall Street Journal'sKen Thomas – “Democrats are launching a multimillion-dollar effort, helped by megadonorGeorge Soros , to turn Texas into a political battleground after suffering through decades of electoral losses in the nation’s second-largest state. Texas Majority PAC, a Soros-funded PAC, will launch a “Blue Texas” initiative Monday along with the Texas Democratic Party and a group of county parties, aiming to organize tens of thousands of volunteers, recruit candidates and boost turnout ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. Soros, the billionaire investor and philanthropist, to turning Texas blue in the past and donated $2.1 million to Texas Majority in 2024 and $1 million in April, records show. » Texas has been a for decades, providing the GOP with its largest batch of electoral votes and supporting President Trump in each of the past three presidential elections. The growth in during the past two decades has raised hopes among Democrats, but those demographic shifts have done little to change the balance of power. Earlier organizing efforts by Democrats, such as through a group called Battleground Texas, have failed to yield significant results. Democrats haven’t won a statewide election since 1994, and Trump generated his largest margin of victory in Texas last year, defeating former Vice President Kamala Harris by nearly 14 percentage points. Republicans have won every presidential election in Texas since 1980, and the last Democratic U.S. senator to win an election in the state was Lloyd Bentsen in 1988. » The Blue Texas project will work with state and county parties to recruit candidates and sign up volunteers, starting with a series of organizing rallies in June. Organizers plan to visit more than two dozen cities in July to recruit candidates. “If a win is on the table in 2026, we don’t want to leave it there by not being organized,” said Katherine Fischer , the deputy executive director of Texas Majority PAC. The PAC has supported a group of city council and school board candidates who won election this year. Texas Majority, the Texas Democratic Party and the nearly dozen county parties under the Blue Texas alliance collectively spent about $35 million in the 2024 election cycle, and organizers said they expect to exceed that amount through the partnership. The group hopes a sustained commitment to building volunteers and get-out-the-vote efforts will help in next year’s Senate campaign, where incumbent Sen.John Cornyn faces a Republican from Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton." Peter, House Republicans just pushed Trump's “Big, Beautiful Bill” onto the Senate floor, and we need to call it what it is: one big, brutal attack on working families.

**At this point, it's no secret that Trump and Republicans want to gut vital programs to pay for a massive tax cut for the wealthy.**

They have already attacked programs like Head Start, tried to dismantle public education, and laid off tens of thousands of government employees. And now, this proposed bill slashes Medicaid for kids, seniors, and people with disabilities and guts SNAP benefits for families struggling to put food on the table.
**Let me be clear: I will not sit idly by as these critical programs are destroyed just to make the wealthy even wealthier.**

I’ve sued the Trump administration to defend education programs, fair housing, STEM research, and financial relief for low-income families. And I’ll keep going to court if that’s what it takes because I don’t work for billionaires – I work for The People, including you, Peter.

But I need to know that you're in this with me.

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: It's summer in Toledo, friend
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Friend, I love summer in Toledo.

[https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXdCnfGc8K12H46B6WrP26U3Y8sbtOljRB1NbC08pln_5GeIK_jAjKTOsvSq67tRDlu-aFx4PECnMW11vs7wuaVbweEnay3II3Qys6l86fe4IhXi3-DLZhwOdSrwFe8LnIWxbtf0?key=aMuMGbTs0AWiVzHIbHNqGQ]

The annual Point Place / Shoreland parade

Getting a Hungarian dog at Tony Packo's, seeing a Mud Hens game on a warm summer night, eating ice cream with family — it reminds me of being a kid.

Growing up here in Toledo, we never had much money. My parents didn't have a college education, and my grandparents were Polish immigrants who came to this country with little more than what they could carry.

But they made a good life for us here, the same way so many Ohioans did: with hard work, perseverance, and the support of their community.

I've never stopped fighting for this little corner of Northern Ohio, friend, because it's my home too.

Thank you for being in that work with me.

Chip in [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250608_mk_summer_b1]

— Marcy
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.

Follow Marcy
https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur [https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur] https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress]
