name: Katie Porter
subject: What’s happening in LA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Donald Trump is acting like a dictator
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39792%2E3422442%2E4TrloP)
Derek,
Donald Trump is manufacturing a crisis here in California.
First, ICE agents indiscriminately grabbed people and detained them in basements for days without food and water.
ICE agents and other federal authorities must follow the law. They should not be denying people due process and access to counsel, but that’s what we are seeing not just in California, but around the country. This isn’t a matter of right or left, denying people of their rights violates the Constitution.
When people came out to protest these unlawful detentions and cruel treatment, Trump went after peaceful protestors, escalating the conflict and seizing a state’s National Guard for the first time since the 1960s. His goal is to sow division, unrest and violence. Federal agents even arrested David Huerta—the leader of the Service Employees International Union in California, while David was peacefully protesting.
Californians and all Americans no matter their politics have a right to protest. For those of you who are, stay peaceful: do not give Trump the chaos he wants.
Now Trump is threatening to arrest Governor Newsom. He’s even calling in more and more military personnel.
Trump is acting like a dictator; trying to create conditions that will allow him to take more control.
Speak out. Show up. And do so peacefully. The future of our country and our democracy depends on all of us.
—Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250609-39792&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39792_3422442_4TrloP&akid=39792%2E3422442%2E4TrloP)**

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: Goodbye Lindsey Graham
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-annieandrews?refcode=250609em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-annieandrews?refcode=250609em]
It’s Dr. Annie Andrews — and I just launched my campaign for U.S. Senate in South Carolina to defeat Lindsey Graham.
If you don’t have time to read this full message, will you split a $50, $25, or even $3 donation between me and Tobias Read before midnight to help me launch this campaign with momentum? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-annieandrews?refcode=250609em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-annieandrews?refcode=250609em]
When I moved to Charleston over 15 years ago, I actually thought of Lindsey as a statesman.
I didn’t agree with him on policy, but I thought he had some integrity.
Now? I can barely stomach watching him speak. He’s the embodiment of everything that’s wrong with the Republican Party – spineless, shameless, and completely out of touch.
He stands for nothing. That’s the opposite of me.
I’m a pediatrician and a mom. I’m not a career politician. I’m running for Senate because I know exactly why I’m here: to fight for kids, healthcare, for our future.
I know tough fights, and even if the path is hard, I believe Lindsey Graham has to be held accountable. He doesn’t deserve a free pass back to D.C. for six more years.
I’m going to need everyone reading this to chip in $5 or $10 before midnight so we can show early strength. We set an ambitious goal to receive 10,000 grassroots donations by the end of the day. Can I count on you to chip in a split donation between Tobias Read and my campaign before midnight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-annieandrews?refcode=250609em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-annieandrews?refcode=250609em]
Thank you,
Dr. Annie Andrews
Tobias Read is Oregon's Secretary of State. To support him directly, please donate here. [https://www.tobiasread.com]
Dr. Annie Andrews is running for U.S. Senate in South Carolina. You can support her directly here. [https://drannieandrews.com/]

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: We need more people like you in the arena
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
We’re building a stronger bench of future leaders |
#
---
Hi team, I’m writing to ask you — _yes, you_ — to run for office. I know, it might sound a little wild. Maybe you’ve never seen yourself as “a politician.” I get it. I felt the same way once. But here’s the truth: **we need more people like you in the arena.** When I first ran, folks told me I wasn’t ready. Some even said a woman couldn’t win. But I believed in what I stood for, and I stepped up anyway. That decision changed my life, and more importantly, it let me fight for the people I care about. Now, I’m asking you to think about what stepping up could look like in your community. Maybe it’s your local school board. City Council. The state legislature. Whatever it is — we need you. **[If you’re even a little curious about running for office, add your name right now. clean_body: We’re building a stronger bench of future leaders | Hi team, I’m writing to ask you — yes, you — to run for office. I know, it might sound a little wild. Maybe you’ve never seen yourself as “a politician.” I get it. I felt the same way once. But here’s the truth: we need more people like you in the arena. When I first ran, folks told me I wasn’t ready. Some even said a woman couldn’t win. But I believed in what I stood for, and I stepped up anyway. That decision changed my life, and more importantly, it let me fight for the people I care about. Now, I’m asking you to think about what stepping up could look like in your community. Maybe it’s your local school board. City Council. The state legislature. Whatever it is — we need you. | You don’t need to have it all planned out. You don’t need a fancy title or a political science degree. You just need to care and be willing to take that first step. We’ll help connect you with folks who can guide you through what it actually takes to run. No pressure, just possibility. Because here’s the thing: Our progress is under attack, and the best way to protect it is to build a stronger bench of leaders who know their communities and lead with heart. If you’ve ever looked at what’s happening and thought, “Someone should do something about that” — well, maybe that someone is you. name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Shaping tomorrow’s Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
The Supreme Court is expected to rule on several cases this month.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250609-1&t=1&akid=2238%2E587540%2E9eTW0t)
Peter, the Supreme Court is expected to rule this month on cases that could reshape our country. Here are a few of the decisions we’re waiting for to drop:
* Attacks on birthright citizenship.
* Efforts to roll back LGBTQ+ inclusion in the classroom.
* Equal representation for African Americans in redistricting.

We don’t have to remind you that the far-right conservative majority has already gutted abortion rights and affirmative action. **And they’re just getting started.**
It’s easy to feel powerless while we wait for the next blow. But here’s the truth:
**We’re not powerless, Peter.**
Every decision made by this court was shaped by political choices — who holds the White House, who’s in the Senate, who gets to define what "justice" looks like.
And that’s where Leaders We Deserve comes in.
The young candidates we’re endorsing today aren’t just fighting for seats in their state legislatures. **One of them will be president in the next couple of decades.** Some of them will serve in the Senate. The young leaders who we support today will one day be nominating and confirming justices to the highest court in the land.
The Supreme Court we live with tomorrow will be shaped by the leaders we elect today. That’s why we’re in this for the long haul. And that’s why we need your help.
**[Peter, please pitch in $5 right now to power our game-changing work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250609_1_scotus?refcode=em20250609-2238&amount=5&refcode2=2238_587540_9eTW0t&akid=2238%2E587540%2E9eTW0t)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250609_1_scotus?amount=5&refcode=em20250609-2238&refcode2=2238_587540_9eTW0t&akid=2238%2E587540%2E9eTW0t)**
The GOP played the long game to take over the courts. We're doing the same — but we have **more urgency, more heart, and more grassroots power** behind us.
Thank you,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250609-1&t=2&refcode2=2238_587540_9eTW0t&akid=2238%2E587540%2E9eTW0t)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2238%2E587540%2E9eTW0t)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2238%2E587540%2E9eTW0t)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Slammed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter —
_Let me lay this out, clear as day:_
I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024.
And this Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.
If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight –– please rush $10 to my re-election campaign today.
**Here’s the link to donate:** **[https://act.electjon.com/go/Donate](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250609-full&t=1&akid=444%2E5691347%2EodgDsG)**
Or here’s why your support is so important to my campaign, especially today.
Right now, Trump’s MAGA machine is flooding Georgia with attack ads to distort my record and fuel the culture wars he relies on to cling to power.
Millions of dollars are being spent against me. And we’re still a year and a half from Election Day.
Not normal.
The GOP sees this race as the tipping point in the midterms. If a Trump loyalist wins in Georgia, they don’t just expand their majority in the Senate — they lock it in for the long-run.
With that power, Trump’s last constraints in the Senate vanish. What’s left is total submission. No oversight. No brakes on extremist nominees. No guardrails when he comes for the rule of law.
That’s what’s at stake in Georgia.
That’s why they’re pouring millions into this race.
And that’s why we have to fight back — now.
With your help, I’m fighting back. And I will win. But I can’t do it alone.
So, I’m asking:
[**Can you rush a contribution of $10 or any amount that works for you to my re-election campaign in Georgia today?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250609-full&t=2&akid=444%2E5691347%2EodgDsG)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250609-full&t=3&akid=444%2E5691347%2EodgDsG)**
Thanks for being part of this team.
As always,
Jon Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=444%2E5691347%2EodgDsG) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Medicaid is under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
The “big, beautiful” bill Republicans are pushing is a brutal attack on health care for millions of Americans.
I’ll get straight to the point: **The “big, beautiful” bill Republicans are pushing is a brutal attack on health care for millions of Americans.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109284723/550598972/1276597034?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.09_Big-Beautiful-Bill_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTZmMzRjNi04NDQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4yiP9FBRde9rTgxo1yswGeAJ3wwMEIMeDkGvK7kQ-xc=)
_— The New York Times_ Republicans claim it’s about reducing “waste, fraud, and abuse,” but according to the Congressional Budget Office, _that is not the full story._ **Trump’s bill would slash at least $600 billion from Medicaid, roll back the Affordable Care Act, penalize states that fund care for pregnant women and take coverage from nearly 11 million people.** I’ve met the people Medicaid helps – seniors in rural towns, parents struggling with medical debt, children with disabilities who rely on these programs. _This is about real people and real lives._ **This moment is about more than “budgets” and this fight is deeply personal to me.** I’ve spent my tenure in Congress putting working families first and as long as I have a voice in the Senate, I’ll continue to stand up for the care and resources Americans count on. Together, we’ll continue standing up and protecting health care now and for generations to come. [**_If you believe every family deserves access to health care, pitch in now to power our work and help elect leaders who will protect our health care._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109284724/550598973/1276597034?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.09_Big-Beautiful-Bill_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTZmMzRjNi04NDQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4yiP9FBRde9rTgxo1yswGeAJ3wwMEIMeDkGvK7kQ-xc=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109284725/550598974/1276597034?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.09_Big-Beautiful-Bill_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTZmMzRjNi04NDQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4yiP9FBRde9rTgxo1yswGeAJ3wwMEIMeDkGvK7kQ-xc=)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7248ab277e3c417c8c4f92a4a471f40e&_e=cfntDpAYHS7E2wijuHP0Uetj9UtzrV0Wh42De9JBsypPC6cbauihcZx-Lhh-a69Vowcm1Mdt31XIw6hNNICIFIUCAvKtYVDEbiQ3oSfvsK7bc8QvVE1EQo2phGLDJTG3-cy6UaNfNN5HxJ49A2Twc_PEwDoz520ujS0fJ2pQrYzEKrT-Loysr2ojpFmzFzg4yEY9IlZ_tkUzJ2WqUK_-eOGB0t5xeW48APMclZCsI6kGZxgH1TJBQmid4-sINgK5b_Hko5GJkj2cZNgZMwYY-OMM46JGDgDhW8_Hr5Eefp1ChY8UN-p7PyB40TBJMAXiRNM5hhHurkp1Zfjv0DkqjvTJRQGnqOphqhQ3a1TcRu8%3D)

subject: NEW: House passes 10-YEAR BAN on state AI regulations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109285239/550600930/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmNkNzM3OC04NTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1WvgG3Om0h5HxmDtf2DYP9WQkqRDWQXb86zO2Q1Rvjs=)
**➤➤ NEW:****House passes 10-YEAR BAN on state AI regulations** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109285240/550600933/-209663064?refcode=em-6.9.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmNkNzM3OC04NTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1WvgG3Om0h5HxmDtf2DYP9WQkqRDWQXb86zO2Q1Rvjs=)
* * *
By just a single vote, House Republicans passed a sweeping provision that would bar states from enforcing any laws regulating artificial intelligence (AI) – _for the next decade._ Tucked into Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill,” this measure bulldozes state authority – BANNING states from tackling urgent AI threats like deep fakes, biased algorithms, and privacy violations. If this is signed into law, no state can act for _ten_ years, even as the risks grow every day. At a time when AI technologies are rapidly evolving and impacting every facet of our lives, **this federal overreach prevents states from enacting timely and necessary protections for their residents.** By the end of this moratorium, AI may far exceed our ability to regulate it – **and that’s exactly what Republicans are counting on.** Democratic Secretaries of State have been at the forefront of defending state authority and ensuring that technological advancements do not come at the expense of civil liberties and democratic principles. [**Your support is crucial. By contributing $3 you help us protect your privacy and ensure the rapid advancement of AI does not outpace our democratic safeguards.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109285241/550600934/-209663064?refcode=em-6.9.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmNkNzM3OC04NTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1WvgG3Om0h5HxmDtf2DYP9WQkqRDWQXb86zO2Q1Rvjs=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109285242/550600935/-209663064?refcode=em-6.9.25-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmNkNzM3OC04NTQ1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1WvgG3Om0h5HxmDtf2DYP9WQkqRDWQXb86zO2Q1Rvjs=)**

clean_body: | = ➤➤ NEW:House passes 10-YEAR BAN on state AI regulations = By just a single vote, House Republicans passed a sweeping provision that would bar states from enforcing any laws regulating artificial intelligence (AI) – for the next decade. Tucked into Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill,” this measure bulldozes state authority – BANNING states from tackling urgent AI threats like deep fakes, biased algorithms, and privacy violations. If this is signed into law, no state can act for ten years, even as the risks grow every day. At a time when AI technologies are rapidly evolving and impacting every facet of our lives, this federal overreach prevents states from enacting timely and necessary protections for their residents. By the end of this moratorium, AI may far exceed our ability to regulate it – and that’s exactly what Republicans are counting on. Democratic Secretaries of State have been at the forefront of defending state authority and ensuring that technological advancements do not come at the expense of civil liberties and democratic principles. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Are you on some of these other lists?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
You are not an ATM.
#
Are you on other political email lists?
If so, you probably regularly receive urgent and panicky emails asking for money. **Too many politicians and organizations see their grassroots supporters as an ATM**. They use scare tactics, guilt and shame, and downright misleading language to coax people into donating.
It’s bad, and getting worse. Team AOC is determined to rise above that and treat you and our other grassroots supporters with respect. **Here’s what we believe:**
* Instead of scaring you to donate, we want to inspire you to take action. Because your time and your dollar are both valuable.
* Instead of guilt tripping you, we want our emails to provide value to you. We try to send out informative content because Alexandria believes that an educated community is an empowered community.
* Instead of misleading you about fake "5x matches" or faux threats, we’re honest with you about what’s going on and how you can help.
* Instead of only hitting you up when we need money, we’ll also send you opportunities to volunteer or help other candidates and causes who need it.

**But just like all the other campaigns in your inbox, we do have goals and deadlines.** But we’re not going to scare or scam you into donating. We’ll just ask nicely because your support of Alexandria and this movement is important and meaningful.
[**Can you make a $5 donation to Alexandria's campaign today? We're planning to get back on the road to host town halls in red, blue, and purple districts across the country — help us keep the Fighting Oligarchy tour strong.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250609.r7GpT-&refcode=em20250609-9051-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9051%2E2526796%2Emy35ZI)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250609.r7GpT-&refcode=em20250609-9051-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9051%2E2526796%2Emy35ZI)**
Whether or not you can contribute today, **thank you for standing with us**. We appreciate you reading our and Alexandria's emails.
The truth is that this email list is powerful. It’s powerful precisely because _you’re_ here with so many others. When so many of us take collective action all at once, we can make real change.
So, maybe you can’t [**donate right now**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250609.r7GpT-&refcode=em20250609-9051-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=9051%2E2526796%2Emy35ZI). But maybe you’ll get something of value from the next email we send. Or perhaps you’ll join us for a volunteer activity down the road.
No matter what: **we’re glad you’re here**. Thank you for being part of this movement.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250609?refcode=em20250609-9051-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&refcode2=9051_2526796_my35ZI&akid=9051%2E2526796%2Emy35ZI)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250609-9051-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=23&akid=9051%2E2526796%2Emy35ZI)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=9051%2E2526796%2Emy35ZI) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=9051%2E2526796%2Emy35ZI) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=9051%2E2526796%2Emy35ZI)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=9051%2E2526796%2Emy35ZI)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=9051%2E2526796%2Emy35ZI)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Benson HQ
subject: Here’s the deal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=397%2E181023%2ErIOXB9)
As a former educator and daughter of two public school teachers, Jocelyn knows firsthand that a strong education is the foundation for a strong future in Michigan.
But here’s the deal: Right now, Michigan ranks as one of the bottom ten states in public education. **Our schools can and should be better, and Jocelyn has the plans to fix them.**
As governor, she will cut through bureaucratic red tape, fully fund public schools, and provide teachers with the resources they need to deliver a world-class education to every child in Michigan and set them up for lifelong success.
But her GOP opponents are running on an anti-public education agenda to strip funding from public schools — and the ultra-wealthy DeVos family is spending _big_ to prop up their campaigns.
**[Jocelyn is counting on this grassroots team to join the fight for public education in Michigan and help her defeat the bullies and billionaires who want to take us backward. If you’re ready to defeat their anti-public school agenda and take Michigan from the bottom ten to the top ten in public education, add your name today →](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2506-public-edu?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250609_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=397%2E181023%2ErIOXB9)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2506-public-edu?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250609_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=397%2E181023%2ErIOXB9)
---
The quality of a child’s education shouldn’t be determined by their ZIP code or how much money their family makes. That’s why Jocelyn is fighting to make sure that every kid in Michigan receives a strong education.
Thanks for joining her,
Benson HQ
[DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/1872?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250609_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=2&akid=397%2E181023%2ErIOXB9)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=4&akid=397%2E181023%2ErIOXB9)

name: Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
subject: Here’s What We’re Up Against — And How You Can Help
body:
Tennessee’s future is under attack — but with your help, we can fight back and put people first. Would you like an alternate version that’s more hopeful, confrontational, or action-driven?

| | | | Hi Peter, While Tennessee families work hard every day, Republican politicians are busy pushing extremist agendas that make life harder for our families — from attacking our public schools to denying access to healthcare and undermining your rights and freedoms. But here’s the good news: **You’re part of the solution.** Every time you stay informed, speak out, and support our movement, you help us push back and fight for a Tennessee that puts people first.
* Expand access to healthcare
* Protect and fully fund public education
* Strengthen our economy and lower costs
* Fight corruption and attacks on our democracy

This is the work we’re doing — and we need you with us.
---

Tennessee House Democrats

Newsom has:

* **Failed to protect Californians,** focusing on sanctuary policies that undermine our security and safety.
* **Given preference to illegal immigrants** at the expense of the people who live and work here legally, draining resources from schools, healthcare, and our communities.
* **Pushed divisive, radical policies,** prioritizing his own anti-Trump agenda instead of the welfare of Californians.

_**It 's time for a change.** We need leadership that puts America first, and Newsom has NEVER been the right person for the job._

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: It's absolutely ridiculous
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Somebody who does not deserve a parade is Donald Trump. He’s shredding the Constitution and taking a sledgehammer to the programs and services veterans depend on.
#

Team, I served our country for 25 years. Deployed all over the world. Flew in combat. Made nearly 400 successful carrier landings.
So, I think I can say this with a little authority: Nobody in the military _really_ likes doing parades. They're almost always on a holiday, or what should be a day off. You’ve got to make sure your uniform is perfect. You’re marching in formation all day.
But, I get it. They’re fun for people. They’re a good way for people to get closer to the military. To see the folks serving our country, up close, and to show our appreciation for them. They deserve to be celebrated.
Somebody who does **_not**_ deserve a parade is Donald Trump. He’s shredding the Constitution and taking a sledgehammer to the programs and services veterans depend on. And after all he’s done, he’s got the nerve to co-opt the Army’s 250th anniversary and make it his own birthday parade?
It’s a disgrace, honestly.
If there’s anything I can do to prevent Trump from taking that special day and making it all about himself, I’m going to do it.
**If you’re with me, and you want to help me fight back:[Chip in so we can defend our democracy. **](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-june25/.u07CFH&refcode=em250609-1-600&t=1&akid=6088%2E6688874%2EsuRhl6)

Friend,
We are short of our June fundraising goal, and we need your help to close the gap.

name: Rob Bonta
subject: An abuse of authority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
The President is trying to manufacture chaos and crisis on the ground in our state.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250609&t=1&akid=1820%2E1088799%2EXOMZUs)
Breaking news:
Yesterday, President Trump and Department of Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth federalized 2,000 California National Guard troops without authorization from Governor Newsom and against the wishes of local law enforcement.
**This move was unnecessary, unprecedented, and unlawful — so the Governor and I are suing to stop it.[If you have our back, chip in now →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250609?refcode=em20250609-1820&amount=5&refcode2=1820_1088799_XOMZUs&akid=1820%2E1088799%2EXOMZUs)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250609?refcode=em20250609-1820&amount=5&refcode2=1820_1088799_XOMZUs&akid=1820%2E1088799%2EXOMZUs)
Let me be clear: _There is no invasion or rebellion in Los Angeles or the state of California._ The President is trying to manufacture chaos and crisis on the ground for his own political ends.
Calling in these troops to respond to protests is not only **counterproductive** but also deeply unfair to the members of the National Guard who are hard at work every day protecting our state, preparing for and responding to natural disasters, and training so that, if called, they can fight our nation’s wars.
**We don’t take the President’s abuse of power and violation of California’s sovereignty lightly.** We’re asking a court to put a stop to this unlawful, unprecedented order.
**[If you’re with us in this fight, please consider chipping in $5 or more to support our people-powered campaign as I focus on holding the President accountable to the law.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250609?refcode=em20250609-1820&amount=5&refcode2=1820_1088799_XOMZUs&akid=1820%2E1088799%2EXOMZUs)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250609?refcode=em20250609-1820&amount=5&refcode2=1820_1088799_XOMZUs&akid=1820%2E1088799%2EXOMZUs)**
To anyone outraged with this administration who feels moved to stand up and speak out, I urge you to do so peacefully, safely, and lawfully. We will get through this together.
Thank you,
Rob

clean_body: The President is trying to manufacture chaos and crisis on the ground in our state. Breaking news: Yesterday, President Trump and Department of Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth federalized 2,000 California National Guard troops without authorization from Governor Newsom and against the wishes of local law enforcement. This move was unnecessary, unprecedented, and unlawful — so the Governor and I are suing to stop it. Let me be clear: There is no invasion or rebellion in Los Angeles or the state of California. The President is trying to manufacture chaos and crisis on the ground for his own political ends. Calling in these troops to respond to protests is not only counterproductive but also deeply unfair to the members of the National Guard who are hard at work every day protecting our state, preparing for and responding to natural disasters, and training so that, if called, they can fight our nation’s wars. We don’t take the President’s abuse of power and violation of California’s sovereignty lightly. We’re asking a court to put a stop to this unlawful, unprecedented order. To anyone outraged with this administration who feels moved to stand up and speak out, I urge you to do so peacefully, safely, and lawfully. We will get through this together. Thank you, Rob

subject: We know how to win in 2025, and here’s proof:

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter,
GOTV PAC is now 4 for 4 in the 2025 elections we’ve invested in. That’s right — every single candidate we’ve backed this year has won, including Gina Ortiz Jones , who just made history as San Antonio’s new mayor, defeating Greg Abbott’s hand-picked candidate in a bruising, million-dollar GOP-backed runoff.
Now we’re turning our focus to Virginia, where we’re proud to be supporting two powerhouse women in the House of Delegates primaries:
🗳 Leslie Mehta in District 73
🗳 May Nivar in District 57
Both women are running people-powered campaigns in critical swing districts — and they need us now.
Democratic enthusiasm is surging at a pace that could shatter turnout records.
Here’s the challenge: Republicans are sitting this one out. They don’t have competitive primaries, so they’re saving every dollar for November and can’t afford to fall behind.
If we want to keep our perfect record and help elect bold Democratic leaders like Leslie and May, we need to show up now — before June 17th.
Will you donate $25 or whatever you can to help GOTV PAC power Leslie Mehta and May Nivar across the finish line?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

GOTV PAC

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.
